content.text:
Chapter 1650 Eternal Compression Secret Art!

Chapter 1650 Eternal Compression Secret Art!

“Voidless Ancestor, I want to invite you to join the Tower of Doom.”
said True Martial Source Ancestor, a six-Domain half-step Eternal realm expert.
True Martial Source Ancestor was one of the Extreme realm half-step Eternal realm experts Ye Tian had made contact with, and the Tower of Doom was not a force within Maple Leaf Domain, but an organization that spanned multiple spacetime domains.
This organization did not have Eternal realm experts. Or rather, once a half-step Eternal realm expert broke through to the Eternal realm, they would automatically leave the Tower of Doom.
Because the Tower of Doom was a loose organization for those seeking to break through to the Eternal realm; it could also be said to be a mutual aid organization, with the ultimate goal of becoming an Eternal realm expert.
Therefore, once one broke through to the Eternal realm, they had to leave the Tower of Doom, otherwise the nature of the Tower of Doom would change.
In fact, there was another reason: the eight-Domain half-step Eternal realm experts of the Tower of Doom also did not want some ordinary half-step Eternal realm expert to break through to the Eternal realm and then immediately step on their heads to lead them.
For Ye Tian, this organization was pretty good.
So, Ye Tian agreed to join the Tower of Doom.
On this day.
True Martial Source Ancestor brought Ye Tian to the branch of the Tower of Doom in Maple Leaf Domain.
Here, Ye Tian saw many half-step Eternal realm experts at the Extreme realm level.
After all, for many half-step Eternal realm experts, the organizational model of the Tower of Doom was still very attractive, and they did not need to pay much of a price.
The Tower of Doom in Maple Leaf Domain did not have any eight-Domain half-step Eternal realm experts; there were only seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm experts, and there were quite a few of them—twenty-three in total.
Now that Ye Tian had joined the Tower of Doom, it could be said that there were twenty-four seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm experts.
“Just the Extreme realm experts in this Maple Leaf Domain branch of the Tower of Doom far surpass those in Source Sea!”
Ye Tian could not help but sigh.
This showed that Source Sea really was not very suitable for half-step Eternal realm cultivation, but if an eight-Domain expert wanted to break through to the nine-Domain level, they still had to go to Source Sea.
There was no specific division of positions within the Tower of Doom. On the surface, everyone had the same position, but privately, those seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm experts would still ignore ordinary half-step Eternal realm experts, and even the half-step Eternal realm experts of the first, second, and third Domain levels were not qualified to communicate with them.
Ye Tian had only just joined the Tower of Doom, so naturally he could not immediately squeeze into the upper circle of the Tower of Doom, but through True Martial Source Ancestor he still learned quite a few things.
For example, in Maple Leaf Domain, the strongest member of the Tower of Doom was the seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm expert—Sang Ze.
Seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm experts were also divided into strong and weak, and Ye Tian belonged to the kind who had just broken through to the seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm, while Sang Ze belonged to that top-tier group of seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm experts.
After joining the Tower of Doom, he discovered that the scripture treasury of the Tower of Doom also recorded the secrets of how to break through from the seven-Domain level to the eight-Domain half-step Eternal realm, and he could not obtain such secret records in Source Sea.
Basically, once one’s strength reached the seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm, they would touch the boundary barrier.
This was also called the First Boundary Barrier.
And the barrier between the eight-Domain half-step Eternal realm and the nine-Domain half-step Eternal realm was called the Second Boundary Barrier.
Both boundary barriers were very difficult to break through, but the Second Boundary Barrier was more than a hundred times more difficult than the First Boundary Barrier.
After all, among the countless spacetime domains, there were still quite a few eight-Domain half-step Eternal realm experts, but nine-Domain half-step Eternal realm experts were far too rare—there might not even be any in this era.
To break the First Boundary Barrier, the secret records of the Tower of Doom gave two solutions.
The first solution was to first break through the barrier of the Eternal body. Those who could cultivate to the seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm basically all possessed an Eternal body, and had cultivated the Eternal body to the Perfected realm.
And Perfected was only the apparent Limit, but it could still be further improved, only it was extremely difficult.
Above Perfected was the Transcendence realm.
An Eternal body in the Transcendence realm was a realm that had broken through the Limit; once the Eternal body reached this realm, the First Boundary Barrier could be broken through.
But the precondition was that your strength had already touched the First Boundary Barrier.
If you were only an ordinary seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm expert or six-Domain half-step Eternal realm expert, then even if you raised the Eternal body to the Transcendence realm, you still would not be able to break the First Boundary Barrier.
The second solution was to comprehend the Innate Eternal Rule to an unimaginable height, and then use the Innate Eternal Rule to forcibly break the First Boundary Barrier.
However, the second solution was even harder.
Basically, those eight-Domain half-step Eternal realm experts all broke through by using the first method.
The strength gap between the seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm and the eight-Domain half-step Eternal realm was huge, even as different as heaven and earth.
One eight-Domain half-step Eternal realm expert could even deal with one hundred seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm experts alone, and top-tier eight-Domain half-step Eternal realm experts could even fight weaker Eternal realm experts.
“The First Boundary Barrier, Transcendence realm Eternal body!”
Ye Tian shook his head.
At present, he also had no way to break the First Boundary Barrier.
However, if he wanted to continue improving his strength and raise it to the peak of the seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm, that he could still do.
In fact, within spacetime domains, there were quite a few secret arts for increasing willpower; it was just that most of them were not as powerful as the willworld.
In addition, the half-step Eternal power of the Extreme realm could still be further compressed, infinitely approaching true Eternal power.
Otherwise, the Extreme realm experts within the spacetime domains would simply be unable to reach the peak level of the seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm, much less charge at the First Boundary Barrier.
And Ye Tian’s half-step Eternal power had never been compressed before, yet it had already risen to the combat strength of the seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm; if word of this got out, I’m afraid hardly anyone would believe it.
However, this could not be blamed on Ye Tian for not compressing it; in fact, he really did not know.
Source Sea did indeed have several seven-Domain half-step Eternal realm experts, but those few could not possibly tell him this secret, and the Extreme realm members of Source God Pavilion likewise did not know this secret.
But now that he knew, it was not too late. Once his half-step Eternal power successfully compressed, his strength would surely increase rapidly.
However, compressing half-step Eternal power was not an easy task and required an Eternal Compression Secret Art.
Moreover, different Eternal Compression Secret Arts could compress to different degrees.
For example, some Eternal Compression Secret Arts could only compress half-step Eternal power by five times, while the most top-tier Eternal Compression Secret Arts could compress it by a hundred times.
But even higher-level Eternal Compression Secret Arts were incomparably precious, and the Tower of Doom did not have them. Unless one joined some Eternal spacetime domains and pledged allegiance to those Eternal realm experts, one could obtain top-tier Eternal Compression Secret Arts.
As for the Eternal Compression Secret Art currently publicly sold by the Tower of Doom, it was an eighteen-times compression art; even so, one still had to pay some price to obtain it.
“Then I’ll first cultivate the Eternal Compression Secret Art with eighteen-times compression!”
Ye Tian decided.

Chapter 1651: Truth Mountain, the attention of the Eight Extreme Stage!

Chapter 1651: Truth Mountain, the attention of the Eight Extreme Stage!

The Eternal Compression Secret Art of the Doomsday Tower was not expensive. Ye Tian spent only a modest price to buy such an Eternal Compression Secret Art.
This Eternal Compression Secret Art was the Wheel Secret Art. It transformed one’s innate Eternal Law into a law wheel, with oneself within the law wheel, and then began compressing the semi-Eternal power inside the body.
After obtaining the Wheel Secret Art, Ye Tian spent a fairly long period of time comprehending and cultivating this Wheel Secret Art within the Maple Leaf Territory.
As time passed, the semi-Eternal power within Ye Tian’s body was compressed to become increasingly powerful and pure, and naturally, more semi-Eternal power could be fused within his body.
Therefore, although his cultivation seemed unchanged, the semi-Eternal power he contained had increased greatly, and its power was even stronger, so his strength naturally improved rapidly.
Compressing semi-Eternal power fivefold was not difficult, but after compressing it fivefold, it became somewhat difficult to continue compressing it further.
After many era-years, Ye Tian still successfully compressed his semi-Eternal power fivefold.
His semi-Eternal power had originally been very powerful, so after a fivefold compression, the increase in his strength was still quite large.
At this moment, Ye Tian felt that his strength had roughly reached the combat power of a top seven-extreme stage semi-Eternal realm, and it was not far from the first boundary barrier.
After that, Ye Tian inquired about how to improve his will or compress his own semi-Eternal power. These were also the two ways Ye Tian could currently improve his strength quickly.
Very soon, he really got the information he wanted.
Among the many spacetime territories, there were still quite a few blessed lands comparable to or surpassing Rift Wind Valley. Entering those places could slowly improve one’s will.
As for how to quickly compress one’s own semi-Eternal power, aside from a few resources that could assist in compressing semi-Eternal power, one could only rely on Eternal Compression Secret Arts.
This was also why top-tier Eternal Compression Secret Arts were incomparably precious. If Ye Tian obtained an Eternal Compression Secret Art that could compress power by 100 times, then he could easily compress his semi-Eternal power tenfold, and even spend some time to compress it to 20 times.
But an Eternal Compression Secret Art like the Wheel Secret Art could far from do that.
“Top-tier Eternal Compression Secret Arts are impossible to obtain unless one joins some Eternal realm force. And those Eternal realms would not help semi-Eternal realm cultivators for no reason. Unless one becomes their servant and joins their faction, it is very hard to obtain benefits.”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
He planned to create his own Eternal Compression Secret Art.
After all, Eternal Compression Secret Arts were also created by others, and those top-tier Eternal Compression Secret Arts came from those powerful Eternal realms.
Since those Eternal realms could create them, so could he.
He could fully use his copied bodies to try again and again. With countless attempts, he would eventually create an Eternal Compression Secret Art with good effects.
And this method was something only he could do, while other semi-Eternal realm cultivators could not imitate it, unless they were courting death.
Thus.
Ye Tian’s clones self-annihilated, and his main body condensed them out again, beginning repeated attempts to create Eternal Compression Secret Arts in the Source Sea.
Of course, Ye Tian also purchased a large number of Eternal Compression Secret Arts. Even those very trashy Eternal Compression Secret Arts, he bought some.
With so many Eternal Compression Secret Arts as reference, his chances of successfully creating a top-tier Eternal Compression Secret Art were naturally much greater.
At the same time, Ye Tian’s main body headed to a blessed land—Truth Mountain!
Truth Mountain was located in the Shaoyang Territory, and the Shaoyang Territory was occupied by a top eight-extreme stage semi-Eternal realm cultivator. Although the other party was not the territory lord and could not fully control the territory, his own strength was no weaker than that of a relatively weak Eternal realm cultivator, so he was qualified to occupy the Shaoyang Territory.
Truth Mountain was naturally also occupied by that eight-extreme stage semi-Eternal realm cultivator, but he also knew very well that he could not completely occupy this blessed land, so he openly made it available to other semi-Eternal realm cultivators. Any semi-Eternal realm cultivator could enter Truth Mountain to cultivate.
Of course.
To enter Truth Mountain, one still had to pay some resources, and these resources did not all fall into the hands of that eight-extreme stage semi-Eternal realm cultivator; the Territory Lord Alliance also took away more than half.
Otherwise, without the recognition and protection of the Territory Lord Alliance, other Eternal realm cultivators would definitely seize this blessed land.
Very soon.
Ye Tian arrived at the Shaoyang Territory through the spacetime teleportation array of the Maple Leaf Territory, making several transfers along the way.
Afterwards, Ye Tian came to Truth Mountain in the Shaoyang Territory.
This place was set up with a grand array by the owner of the Shaoyang Territory, True Yang Holy Ancestor, and many semi-Eternal realm cultivators were also stationed here to guard it. One of them was even a seven-extreme stage semi-Eternal realm cultivator who had already touched the first boundary barrier, the number one expert under True Yang Holy Ancestor.
Therefore, no one dared to act recklessly here. Even if an Eternal realm cultivator wanted to cultivate here, they still had to show True Yang Holy Ancestor some respect.
“Pay 200,000 spacetime coins, and you can enter to cultivate. The time limit is one eternal year!”
The semi-Eternal realm cultivator guarding here stopped Ye Tian and said.
Ye Tian took out 200,000 spacetime coins and entered Truth Mountain.
As soon as he entered Truth Mountain, he immediately sensed a will assault coming at him. This will seemed to be suppressing his will at every moment. Its method was different from the will impact of Rift Wind Valley, but both were generally aimed at tempering the will.
Moreover, the effect of will enhancement here was quite good, even having some effect on Eternal realm cultivators.
It was precisely for this reason that Ye Tian came here to cultivate.
Although the one he came here with was not his main body, if the will of the copied body improved, the main body’s will would also improve somewhat, and opening up a will world would naturally become much easier.
So, there was no real difference between the main body and the copied body.
Ye Tian walked step by step toward the depths of Truth Mountain, quickly drawing the attention of the other semi-Eternal realm cultivators on Truth Mountain. When Ye Tian surpassed the positions of some seven-extreme stage semi-Eternal realm cultivators and reached the summit of Truth Mountain, even True Yang Holy Ancestor was alarmed.
Somewhere in the Shaoyang Territory.
True Yang Holy Ancestor’s gaze penetrated layer upon layer of void and looked at Ye Tian on the summit of Truth Mountain.
“．‖Eternal realm?”
“No, this person is not an Eternal realm cultivator, only a seven-extreme stage cultivator. But a seven-extreme stage cultivator simply cannot reach the summit of Truth Mountain. That is a place only Eternal realm cultivators can reach. If a semi-Eternal realm cultivator dares to cultivate there, their will will be shattered, and they will directly perish!”
True Yang Holy Ancestor said in astonishment.
He quickly guessed the reason why Ye Tian could enter the summit of Truth Mountain: Ye Tian’s will had broken through the will boundary and stepped into the second-tier Eternal will, comparable to the will level of an ordinary Eternal realm cultivator.
“The second tier is Eternal will, and Eternal will helps break through the first boundary barrier. This person has not yet reached the first boundary barrier. If he breaks through it, he will at least have an 80% chance of breaking the shackles. If his semi-Eternal power continues to be compressed by some more times, then he will have a 100% chance of breaking through to the level of an eight-extreme stage semi-Eternal realm cultivator.”
“This young man is qualified for me to make friends with!”
True Yang Holy Ancestor said with a smile.
However, he did not go to meet Ye Tian immediately. It would not be too late to see Ye Tian after Ye Tian finished his closed-door cultivation.

Chapter 1652: Eight Extremes Tower!

Chapter 1652: Eight Extremes Tower!

“The effect is pretty good!”
Ye Tian was very satisfied with his cultivation on True Intent Mountain. His willpower was slowly improving. Although the improvement was very slight, once it was combined with the secret art known as Will World, it became quite good.
Occasionally, Ye Tian’s clone would cultivate together with the copied body, beginning to cultivate Will World and gradually perfecting this secret art.
Of course, the clone was still in Source Sea, not on True Intent Mountain.
After all, there were many powerful beings on True Intent Mountain, and if he condensed a clone there, it would surely draw their attention.
So Ye Tian had the clone stay in the Dark Forbidden Domain, where it could also assist the copied body in cultivating Will World.
As time passed, the will suppression Ye Tian endured grew stronger and stronger.
Although Ye Tian could cultivate here for an eternal year, others could as well, but no one would last until the end of an eternal year.
After some eon years had passed, Ye Tian felt that his will had improved quite a bit, so he let his clone begin trying to open up Will Worlds.
At first, the Will Worlds naturally failed, but after many attempts, Ye Tian still found the correct place to open up the Will Worlds.
In this way, the true body and the copied body began opening up Will Worlds.
Just like that, the number of Ye Tian’s Will Worlds kept increasing.
Before he knew it, Ye Tian had already cultivated on True Intent Mountain for a full several hundred thousand eon years.
At this time, even True Yang Sacred Ancestor was shocked.
“He actually cultivated at the summit of True Intent Mountain for so long!!!!”
True Yang Sacred Ancestor felt that even he could not cultivate at the summit of True Intent Mountain for such a long time. Afterward, he simply would not be able to withstand the will suppression of True Intent Mountain; if he forcibly remained there, his will would run into problems.
Yet now Ye Tian had stayed there for so long, and there did not seem to be any problem at all.
It was obvious that Ye Tian’s willpower was much stronger than his. After long years of bitter cultivation, his own will had only barely stepped into second-tier eternal will.
But compared with Ye Tian now, the gap was enormous.
“I’m afraid he’s not even as good as some eternal realm wills!”
True Yang Sacred Ancestor guessed.
Another several hundred thousand eon years passed.
And Ye Tian had already bitterly cultivated here for an eternal year, with his will greatly improved.
By now, he had opened up nearly a thousand Will Worlds in total during this period.
At present, his Will Worlds had reached 6277.
However, toward the later stages, opening up each Will World became more difficult. Even if he cultivated on True Intent Mountain for endless years in the future, he still would not be able to raise the number of Will Worlds to 10000. He would probably need a better place for tempering the will before there would be hope of surpassing 10000.
Of course, Ye Tian was already very satisfied with this bitter cultivation.
The improvement of his will had increased Ye Tian’s strength quite a bit.
Moreover, over such a long span of years, Ye Tian’s true body had not been doing nothing; it had been bitterly cultivating the Wheel Disc secret art and compressing his half-step eternal power.
In addition, aside from testing the cultivation of Will World, Ye Tian’s clone had also spent the rest of its time creating eternal compression secret arts.
He was not creating them out of thin air, but using the Wheel Disc secret art as the core, absorbing the essence of other eternal compression secret arts, and gradually perfecting and improving the Wheel Disc secret art.
By now, the effect of the Wheel Disc secret art had improved greatly, and he had perfected it to the extent of 33 times.
In other words, the Wheel Disc secret art could now compress half-step eternal power by up to 33 times, making its effect far stronger than before.
Under the new Wheel Disc secret art, Ye Tian successfully compressed his half-step eternal power eightfold, which was already a very good degree of compression.
Eightfold compression increased the number by nearly a thousand Will Worlds, directly raising Ye Tian’s strength by a great deal.
By now, Ye Tian could already sense the existence of the first boundary barrier, but he still had not truly touched the first world barrier.
He felt that as long as he compressed his half-step eternal power to ten times, he would reach the first boundary barrier and thus gain the qualification to charge at the first boundary barrier.
“It’s time to go out!”
Ye Tian stood up and flew out of True Intent Mountain.
Just after flying out of True Intent Mountain, a figure blocked Ye Tian’s way.
“A strong expert, a true strong expert!”
Ye Tian sensed danger; the other party was much stronger than him, and he was no match.
Combined with the situation investigated by his copy talent, he immediately knew who the person before him was.
The master of the Shaoyang territory, a half-step eternal realm expert of the Eight Extremes Realm—True Yang Sacred Ancestor.
“Greetings, True Yang Sacred Ancestor!”
Ye Tian said politely.
True Yang Sacred Ancestor was not surprised that Ye Tian could guess his identity, and instead invited him, “Does Your Excellency have any interest in coming to my True Yang Palace for a sit-down?”
“It would be my honor!”
Ye Tian smiled and said.
Immediately after, Ye Tian followed True Yang Sacred Ancestor to True Yang Palace, which was True Yang Sacred Ancestor’s residence and place of cultivation.
“May I ask how Your Excellency is addressed?”
True Yang Sacred Ancestor asked.
“Endless Ancestor!”
Ye Tian introduced himself.
“Endless Ancestor, I see that you are probably close to reaching the half-step eternal realm of the Eight Extremes Realm, right?” True Yang Sacred Ancestor said.
“I’m still far from it!” Ye Tian shook his head. “From Seven Extremes Realm to Eight Extremes Realm, one must break through the first boundary barrier. I may not necessarily be able to break it.”
“Hahaha!!” True Yang Sacred Ancestor laughed and said, “With your realm of second-tier eternal will, Endless Ancestor, breaking the first boundary barrier should naturally be very easy.”
“Second-tier eternal will can help break the first boundary barrier?”
Ye Tian was somewhat surprised; he truly did not know this.
“Of course it can!” True Yang Sacred Ancestor nodded. “It’s just that in Extreme realm, very few people raise their will to second-tier eternal will before breaking the first boundary barrier. I barely reached second-tier eternal will by relying on breaking the first boundary barrier, which greatly increased my willpower, and then cultivating bitterly on True Intent Mountain for countless years. Ordinary half-step eternal realm experts of the Eight Extremes Realm still have will at the first tier!”
Upon hearing this, Ye Tian was instantly extremely excited.
So that meant that as long as he truly touched the level of the first boundary barrier and charged at it a little, he would have a great chance of breaking through the first boundary barrier and stepping into the half-step eternal realm of the Eight Extremes Realm?
He also finally understood why True Yang Sacred Ancestor had invited him as a guest; it turned out he was being regarded as a future half-step eternal realm expert of the Eight Extremes Realm.
Afterward, Ye Tian chatted with True Yang Sacred Ancestor and learned many secrets, greatly broadening his knowledge.
When True Yang Sacred Ancestor learned that Ye Tian had joined the Doomsday Tower, he could not help but say, “Endless Ancestor, there’s really no need to join the Doomsday Tower. In fact, even those few Eight Extremes Realm experts in the Doomsday Tower don’t really manage the Doomsday Tower. Although the Doomsday Tower is a loose force with little constraint, it simply cannot bring you any benefits. I suggest you join the Eight Extremes Tower instead. The Eight Extremes Tower is also a loose force, with extremely high entry requirements. Only half-step eternal realm experts of the Eight Extremes Realm are qualified to join, and its influence is very great. Even many eternal realm experts do not dare offend the Eight Extremes Tower. Moreover, the eternal realm experts who came out of the Eight Extremes Tower are all true powerhouses among eternal realm experts, and from time to time they will bestow some opportunities upon the Eight Extremes Tower. It can be said that more than half of the Eight Extremes Realm experts who did not pledge themselves to eternal realm experts have joined the Eight Extremes Tower, and those few Eight Extremes Realm experts in your Doomsday Tower are also members of the Eight Extremes Tower.”
After weighing things up, Ye Tian decided to join the Eight Extremes Tower.
But that would have to be after he truly stepped into the half-step eternal realm of the Eight Extremes Realm, not now.

Chapter 1653: First Hearing of the Nine Extreme Domain!

Chapter 1653: First Hearing of the Nine Extreme Domain!

True Yang Supreme Ancestor gave Ye Tian a token. Once Ye Tian stepped into the Eight Extreme Domain, he could immediately join the Eight Extreme Tower.
After all, the Eight Extreme Tower was far stronger than the Doomsday Tower. Once he became an Eight Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm expert, the Doomsday Tower would no longer be of much help to him.
In fact, even if True Yang Supreme Ancestor had not said anything, Ye Tian would eventually have to find a stronger power.
Ye Tian stayed in the True Yang Palace for some days, discussing the dao with True Yang Supreme Ancestor, and only then did he leave the True Yang Palace.
After returning to Maple Leaf Territory, this clone body of Ye Tian’s condensed a clone, then self-Annihilated, and then let the clone condense this clone body again, so that his cultivation could keep up with the main body.
In the years that followed, Ye Tian also did not spend much time cultivating the world of will. Instead, he devoted all his effort to compressing the half-step Eternal power within his body.
Ye Tian’s goal now was only one thing: to compress the half-step Eternal power to ten times as soon as possible, thereby raising his strength to the level of truly touching the first boundary barrier, and then to charge at the first boundary barrier and step into the Eight Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm.
In order to break through faster, Ye Tian even bought from True Yang Supreme Ancestor a Eternal compression secret art that could compress half-step Eternal power by 50 times.
For other extreme realms, a Eternal compression secret art that could compress it fifty times was very rare, but True Yang Supreme Ancestor was an Eight Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm expert, with combat power comparable to a relatively weak Eternal Realm expert.
Thus, True Yang Supreme Ancestor naturally possessed a top-tier Eternal compression secret art.
Of course, True Yang Supreme Ancestor also felt that Ye Tian would definitely be able to break through and become an Eight Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm expert, which was why he traded it to him.
If some other Seven Extreme Domain expert wanted to buy such a Eternal compression secret art from True Yang Supreme Ancestor, that would be almost impossible.
This Eternal compression secret art was a layered secret art, far more complicated than the wheel secret art.
Although Ye Tian still wanted to perfect the layered secret art, there was no rush at the moment. He could fully cultivate the layered secret art first and compress it ten times before anything else.
Thus.
Ye Tian began cultivating the layered secret art, compressing the half-step Eternal power within his body.
One Tribulation Era after another passed; after a full several hundred thousand Tribulation Eras, Ye Tian finally succeeded in compressing the half-step Eternal power within his body to ten times.
At this moment, he felt that it was very difficult for his own strength to improve even a little, and he clearly sensed the first boundary barrier.
It seemed to tell Ye Tian that he had already reached the extreme of cultivation and could no longer further increase his strength.
This was the first boundary barrier!
Ye Tian naturally would not be misled by the perception transmitted by the first boundary barrier. He mobilized the will power of more than six thousand worlds of will, drew upon the power of his entire body, and charged at the first boundary barrier.
Rumble rumble!!!!
The first boundary barrier in the dark and unseen world was on the verge of collapse under Ye Tian’s second-stage Eternal will power. After countless charges, the first boundary barrier finally crashed down violently.
Instantly, that incorrect perception disappeared.
Transformation!
The whole body was transforming!
Endless source energy poured in from the outside world into his body, helping Ye Tian complete the transformation.
At the same time, Ye Tian’s half-step Eternal power was also rapidly surging, and his will power was quickly increasing.
It could be said that Ye Tian’s strength was improving almost every moment.
After a long while, Ye Tian finally completed the breakthrough.
At this time, his strength had far surpassed that of a Seven Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm expert, and he officially stepped into the Eight Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm level.
After the breakthrough, Ye Tian immediately had his clone body open up worlds of will.
Failure!
Success!
After the clone body failed again and again, Ye Tian kept groping forward, successfully opening up many worlds of will, and the number of worlds of will increased.
Unknowingly, Ye Tian’s worlds of will had reached more than eight thousand. This was also the benefit brought by the increase in will after breaking through to the Eight Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm.
“If Eternal will wants to reach the third stage, I’m afraid I’ll have to break through to the Nine Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm level!”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
With the worlds of will increasing so much all at once, his strength improved a little again, but within the Eight Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm he was still at the bottom.
This day.
Ye Tian came to the temporal territory where the Eight Extreme Tower headquarters was located—Evergreen Territory.
Evergreen Territory had abundant resources, and its cultivation environment was much better than that of Maple Leaf Territory. It was also almost entirely controlled by the Eight Extreme Tower, and any member of the Eight Extreme Tower could establish bases, residences, and so on here.
After arriving in Evergreen Territory, Ye Tian entered the Eight Extreme Tower holding the token True Yang Supreme Ancestor had given him, and applied to join the Eight Extreme Tower.
That token was a credential for joining the Eight Extreme Tower. Without it, an Eight Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm expert would still have to undergo a series of assessments to join the Eight Extreme Tower.
Very quickly, the Eight Extreme Tower approved the application and handled the procedures for Ye Tian.
At this point, Ye Tian became a member of the Eight Extreme Tower.
……
“The Eight Extreme Tower actually has so many Eight Extreme Domain experts!”
Ye Tian held an information orb, which recorded much of the Eight Extreme Tower’s situation, including the number of Eight Extreme Domain experts.
In other temporal territories, often several temporal territories would only give birth to one Eight Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm expert. Thus, Eight Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm experts were incomparably rare, and ordinary half-step Eternal Realm experts could hardly ever see one in person.
· ·········求鲜花··· ·····
But in the Eight Extreme Tower, there were actually many Eight Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm experts. In this era, the Eight Extreme Tower had a total of more than three thousand Eight Extreme Domain experts.
What shocked Ye Tian even more was that in this era, the Eight Extreme Tower actually also had a Nine Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm expert.
Of course, the information provided to him by the Eight Extreme Tower only showed that there was one Nine Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm expert, but said nothing else, not even a name.
Then.
Ye Tian sent a message to True Yang Supreme Ancestor, informing him that he had already joined the Eight Extreme Tower.
Very quickly, True Yang Supreme Ancestor arrived at the Eight Extreme Tower.
“Endless Ancestor, I didn’t expect you to break through so quickly!” True Yang Supreme Ancestor said with a smile.
Ye Tian hurriedly said, “It was all thanks to True Yang Supreme Ancestor’s layered secret art. Otherwise, if I wanted to break through, I would have needed a few more years.”
.... ....... .......
“How is it? The strength of the Eight Extreme Tower is still pretty good, right?”
True Yang Supreme Ancestor said.
Ye Tian nodded: “The Eight Extreme Tower’s strength is indeed very powerful. It actually has more than three thousand Eight Extreme Domain experts. What surprised me even more is that our Eight Extreme Tower even has a Nine Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm expert. True Yang Supreme Ancestor, who is this Nine Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm expert?”
True Yang Supreme Ancestor introduced him: “This Nine Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm expert is Star-Gazing Sword Ancestor. He broke through to the Nine Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm six thousand Eternal years ago, and has never gone to charge at the Eternal Realm until now. In fact, if a Nine Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm expert wants to charge at the Eternal Realm, it would be very easy. Moreover, once they break through, they would count as a true powerhouse even within the Eternal Realm.”
“Then why has Star-Gazing Sword Ancestor never broken through?” Ye Tian asked curiously.
“It is said that Star-Gazing Sword Ancestor wants to cultivate to the extreme of the Nine Extreme Domain half-step Eternal Realm before breaking through to the Eternal Realm. He wants to directly break through to the Immortal Realm of the Eternal Realm and become a lord of the Immortal Realm, so he is enduring the urge not to break through,” True Yang Supreme Ancestor said. “
Immortal Realm!
This was the third realm of the Eternal Realm.
After coming to the temporal territory, he also learned the divisions of the Eternal Realm.
The Eternal Realm is divided into realms such as Life Realm, Indestructible Realm, Immortal Realm, and so on. After all, for many half-step Eternal Realm experts in temporal territories, if one does not enter the Eternal Realm, one will ultimately be limited by lifespan. That is why the first realm of the Eternal Realm is called the Life Realm.
Basically, most territories are Life Realm.
Just like those lords who went to the Source Sea back then, they were all Life Realm lords.
Just as Ye Tian was thinking, True Yang Supreme Ancestor said, “Come, I’ll take you to a place!”
Ye Tian followed True Yang Supreme Ancestor to a place in the Eight Extreme Tower and.

Chapter 1654: Divine Sound Domain, the Eternal Body’s Transcendence!

Chapter 1654: Divine Sound Domain, the Eternal Body’s Transcendence!

“Where to?”
Ye Tian asked curiously.
“Divine Sound Domain!”
said the True Yang Supreme Being.
Divine Sound Domain?
Ye Tian had never heard of it, but that was normal. After all, there were too many space-time Domains, and many Domains were not famous.
True Yang Supreme Being led Ye Tian through several teleports and arrived at a place called Fire Spirit Domain.
“Invincible Ancestor, let us tear open the space-time barrier of Fire Spirit Domain and enter the Void Region,” said True Yang Supreme Being.
“Why?”
Ye Tian was somewhat puzzled.
True Yang Supreme Being explained, “Because Divine Sound Domain does not have any space-time passage, we cannot enter Divine Sound Domain through a space-time passage. We must fly over from the Void Domain. Divine Sound Domain is a space-time Domain completely under our Eight Extremes Tower, and it is also one of our benefits. Many Eternal Realm experts want to seize this space-time Domain, but they were forcefully suppressed by several Immortal Realm Domains that walked out from our Eight Extremes Tower. Otherwise, a space-time Domain like this would not have fallen to our Eight Extremes Tower.”
Ye Tian was full of curiosity about Divine Sound Domain. Could there be some astonishing chance inside?
However, he did not ask too much. Once he entered Divine Sound Domain, he would know what was going on.
Ye Tian and True Yang Supreme Being tore open the space-time barrier of Fire Spirit Domain and entered the Void Domain.
Once they entered the Void Domain, all laws could no longer be sensed, but the laws within their own bodies could still be used. Their strength was not weakened much, but they could not engage in prolonged battle here, and it was difficult to recover.
Because in the Void Domain, it was very hard to borrow the source power of the Source Sea.
Moreover, the Void Domain was filled with an atmosphere of nothingness—silence, gloom, suffocation, despair. All kinds of negative emotions surged into one’s heart.
An ordinary Supreme Being would probably go mad if they dared enter the Void Domain, but Ye Tian and True Yang Supreme Being had extremely powerful wills, so they did not care about the environment here.
Whoosh!
They flew through the Void Region at extremely high speed. Occasionally, they would see faint strands of light; those were one space-time Domain after another, and in the far distance there was a huge source of light. However, the light from that source could not extend very far. If not for Ye Tian’s powerful strength, he would also not have been able to sense the existence of that huge source of light.
That huge source of light was the Source Sea!
Very soon, after they reached the position of a faint source of light, their senses gradually became infinitely vast, and they sensed a space-time Domain—Divine Sound Domain.
“Let’s go in!”
True Yang Supreme Being casually tore open the space-time barrier of Divine Sound Domain and entered Divine Sound Domain.
Ye Tian followed him in as well.
The moment they entered Divine Sound Domain, the power of dozens of wills crossed through the void and peered at their arrival.
“These are members of the other Eight Extremes Tower branches; no need to mind them!”
True Yang Supreme Being introduced.
Ye Tian nodded. He did not sense any malice, so he did not care either.
In a flash, those wills all withdrew.
At this moment.
Ye Tian was feeling the differences of Divine Sound Domain. This Domain was filled with a strange sound, a sound that seemed like muttering in sleep and yet also like some kind of song, an abstruse sound formed entirely from the laws of sound.
Ye Tian sat cross-legged, sensing the profundity of this sound.
The strange power transformed from the sound seeped into his body, as though it were difficult to block this sound’s invasion.
Very quickly, he felt somewhat uncomfortable.
At first, he had wanted to resist this power and repair his hidden injuries.
But then, he abruptly realized something was wrong, and his expression immediately turned to surprise.
“Hahaha, Invincible Ancestor, have you discovered the benefits of Divine Sound Domain?” True Yang Supreme Being laughed.
Ye Tian nodded and said, “Divine Sound Domain can let us detect the flaws of the Eternal Body. No, that should not be called flaws, but rather it lets us detect the more perfect aspects. Moreover, the sound of Divine Sound Domain will stimulate our Eternal Body. Under this kind of stimulation and confrontation, we can gradually perfect the Eternal Body, and even find a path of transcendence.”
“Correct!” True Yang Supreme Being said. “Divine Sound Domain is a blessed land that can allow the Eternal Body to complete transcendence. Even an Eternal Body that has already transcended can become somewhat more perfected and stronger here, which is why many members of the Eight Extremes Tower treat this place as a cultivation ground. And your Eternal Body, Invincible Ancestor, has not yet transcended. This place is perfectly suited for your cultivation. Compared with the other members of the Eight Extremes Tower, only you can truly obtain a breakthrough here.”
“Thank you, True Yang Supreme Being, for bringing me here!”
Ye Tian said gratefully.
True Yang Supreme Being waved his hand and said, “No need to thank me. This is a place every member of the Eight Extremes Tower can come to. Even if I didn’t bring you here, it wouldn’t be long before you learned of this place. .........Next, find a place in Divine Sound Domain to cultivate. I hope you can raise your Eternal Body to the transcendent realm as soon as possible.”
“I also hope to break through as soon as possible!”
Ye Tian said expectantly.
Very soon, True Yang Supreme Being left this place. After all, True Yang Supreme Being’s Eternal Body had already transcended, and he did not know how many years he had cultivated here, so this place was of no help to him anymore.
After True Yang Supreme Being left, Ye Tian casually found a mountain peak, placed a palace there, and began bitter cultivation inside the palace.
If the copied body were to raise the Eternal Body to the transcendent realm, then the main body would be able to copy it soon after and also cultivate the Eternal Body to the transcendent realm.
As the Divine Sound of Divine Sound Domain entered his body, the flaws existing in Ye Tian’s boundless Eternal Body were revealed one by one.
Perhaps in Ye Tian’s eyes, these were not flaws, but manifestations that were perfect to the extreme. However, in the process of resisting the Divine Sound, if these places were not perfect, then they were simply not acceptable.
This was also why the transcendent realm existed.
Transcendence meant transcending perfection and forging a more perfect Eternal Body; that was the transcendent realm.
As time passed, Ye Tian gradually comprehended the transcendent meaning of the boundless Eternal Body, but to truly complete transcendence would probably require a very long period of time. It was not something that could be finished in just a little while.
At the same time.
Ye Tian’s main body was also continuously compressing the half-step Eternal power and perfecting the layered secret technique.
Unknowingly, ten Eternal years passed.
For Ye Tian, ten Eternal years was also an extremely long period of time.
On this day, with the help of Divine Sound Domain, Ye Tian finally raised the boundless Eternal Body to the transcendent realm.
The moment the boundless Eternal Body broke through to the transcendent realm, the body’s power surged many times over, and Ye Tian’s strength also surged.
Moreover, during these ten Eternal years, Ye Tian perfected the layered secret technique to the extent of sixty-five times, and compressed the half-step Eternal power to twenty times.
Now, his overall strength was much stronger than before, and he was no longer comparable to a newly advanced Eight Extremes Realm expert.

Chapter 1655: Void Beast!

Chapter 1655: Void Beast!

Ye Tian’s strength had improved. Although he was still not as strong as a Stage Eight Supreme Being like True Yang Holy Ancestor, he was definitely not far off.
With his current strength, he was about on par with the weakest Eternal Being.
However, Ye Tian still could not break through the spacetime barriers of the Source Sea and freely travel between the Source Sea and the spacetime territory.
Breaking through the spacetime barrier was not a matter of strength, but of rules. Only when an Eternal Being completely fused with Eternal rules would they no longer be blocked by the Source Sea barrier. As for a half-step Eternal Being, even if their strength reached the level of a Stage Nine half-step Eternal Being, they still could not break through the Source Sea barrier.
This day.
Ye Tian condensed a clone in the Source Sea and sent the clone to the Primordial Sea.
He had always been very curious about the Primordial Sea. He had not been able to enter this place before because his strength was insufficient, but now that he had reached Stage Eight half-step Eternal Being battle strength, he could naturally force his way into the Primordial Sea and also force his way out.
With a ripping sound!
Ye Tian entered the Primordial Sea, and his powerful aura made countless black mist insects within the Primordial Sea not dare approach.
Ye Tian had no interest in these black mist insects. Instead, he looked toward that severed arm in a certain part of the Primordial Sea. The severed arm had been sealed within a patch of void, and ordinary Extreme experts could not probe its location at all; even Stage Seven half-step Eternal Beings could not detect it.
Yet Ye Tian could see the black mist river formed by that severed arm, and he could sense the most primal aura of the arm.
“This is not the arm of an ordinary Eternal Being lord. It is between Immortal Stage and Undying Stage, so it should be the arm of a half-step Undying Stage lord!” Ye Tian estimated.
It was obvious that the one who could cut off the arm of such an Eternal Being powerhouse was, if not an Undying Stage expert, then at least a half-step Undying Stage expert.
Ye Tian probed for a while and gained little, but he still took away all the resources there.
Suddenly.
Ye Tian sensed two powerful auras rapidly approaching, so he immediately left.
Rumble!!
Two Eternal Beings arrived at the Primordial Sea.
“We’re one step too late. Someone broke into this place; it should be a Stage Eight half-step Eternal Being,” one of the Eternal Beings guessed.
“It should be some Stage Eight expert from the spacetime territory who came here trying to break through to Stage Nine and happened to discover the Primordial Sea, thinking it was some sort of treasure land.”
“Many Eternal Beings and Stage Eight experts in the spacetime territory know the origin of the Primordial Sea. It’s just that one Stage Eight expert didn’t know. But that person will definitely investigate and learn about it now, and won’t dare come again. Let’s go!”
The two Eternal Beings quickly left without investigating further.
-------------------
Eight Extremes Tower.
Ye Tian’s clone body returned here from the God Sound Territory and informed True Yang Holy Ancestor.
Very quickly, True Yang Holy Ancestor also came to the Eight Extremes Tower.
The two of them began chatting casually.
Suddenly.
Ye Tian asked, “True Yang Holy Ancestor, do you know about the Source Sea Primordial Sea?”
“Primordial Sea?”
True Yang Holy Ancestor thought for a moment, then nodded and said, “I know a little. What’s wrong?”
“I am from Source Sea life, and the Primordial Sea is a treasure land of the Source Sea, but it seems to have traces of spacetime territory forces there, so I was a bit curious and asked about it, lest I offend a force from the spacetime territory,” Ye Tian explained.
“Endless Grand Ancestor, we really cannot offend the force behind the Primordial Sea,” True Yang Holy Ancestor said gravely. “As far as I know, the Primordial Sea used to be just an ordinary treasure land, but later it was modified by Phoenix Lord and used to cultivate black mist insects. It is the hatching base of the black mist insects. Moreover, Phoenix Lord once declared to countless spacetime territories that no one was allowed to interfere with the Primordial Sea; otherwise, it would mean making an enemy of him.”
“Phoenix Lord!”
Ye Tian knew this lord; he was one of the Undying Stage lords, a powerhouse standing at the true peak of countless spacetime territories.
Under Phoenix Lord were many Eternal Beings serving him, so the force controlled by Phoenix Lord was extremely powerful.
“What does Phoenix Lord cultivate those black mist insects for?”
Ye Tian was somewhat puzzled.
“For experiments!” True Yang Holy Ancestor said. “This is information that has spread from outside. It is said that Phoenix Lord cultivates large numbers of black mist insects in the Primordial Sea, then periodically sends them to the Phoenix Territory for secondary cultivation, helping these black mist insects advance to half-step Eternal Being, so that he can harvest countless half-step Eternal Being experimental materials. However, there is also another saying: that Phoenix Lord is researching the power of the Void Beast.”
“Void Beast?”
This was the first time Ye Tian had heard of it.
True Yang Holy Ancestor introduced it: “The Void Beast is a kind of creature that drifts outside the Source Sea. It always stays in the void region, and there aren’t many of them. They were long ago killed off by those Undying Stage lords. I’m afraid only in the depths of the void region far away from the Source Sea could one find traces of Void Beasts. But not many Eternal Beings dare go there; it is too far from the Source Sea, making it impossible to distinguish directions, and it is easy to get lost. It is said that strong experts who get lost in the depths of the void region almost never return.”
“That severed arm in the Primordial Sea was the arm of a Void Beast?”
Ye Tian asked in surprise.
“Yes!” True Yang Holy Ancestor nodded. “It is said that when Phoenix Lord was still at half-step Undying Stage, he once fought a powerful Void Beast. In the end, he severed one of its arms, but that Void Beast did not die and instead escaped. What happened later is not something we know.”
“So that’s how it is!”
Ye Tian understood.
Phoenix Lord had cut off a part of a Void Beast’s arm and thrown it into the Primordial Sea. Later, he discovered that black mist insects could reproduce by relying on the Void Beast’s arm, so he used that to research black mist insects.
As for whether black mist insects were used for anything else, that was not clear.
“Back then I even collected some bones of the Void Beast. Luckily Phoenix Lord doesn’t know about this, otherwise he might have come looking for trouble,” Ye Tian thought.
Now that he knew the Primordial Sea was Phoenix Lord’s territory, Ye Tian did not plan to continue probing the Primordial Sea. Otherwise, if he really provoked Phoenix Lord, he would not be able to contend against him, and even the Eight Extremes Tower would not help him.
However, one thing could be certain: the Void Beast was probably not simple, otherwise a powerhouse like Phoenix Lord, an Undying Stage expert, would not have studied the black mist insects derived from Void Beast flesh and blood.
In fact, Ye Tian was also very curious about the Void Beast.
What kind of talent would such a lifeform possess? If his Copying Talent copied the Void Beast’s talent, wouldn’t that be equivalent to obtaining a great opportunity?
“Forget it. I should cultivate properly and strive to first touch the second barrier wall.”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
The Eight Extremes Tower often organized gatherings, and they often discussed the Dao together.
Ye Tian also often attended, and gradually became familiar with the other Stage Eight experts in the Eight Extremes Tower.
Since they could become Stage Eight experts, everyone’s goal was only one thing: to advance to Stage Nine, or to advance to Eternal Being.
This day.
A Stage Eight half-step Eternal Being powerhouse from the Eight Extremes Tower, who had touched the second barrier wall, invited many Stage Eight experts to participate in a meeting.
When Ye Tian arrived at the Eight Extremes Tower, he was immediately very shocked.
What appeared before him was actually an elderly man exuding a decayed aura, as if his life was nearly over.
And he was the Stage Eight expert of the Eight Extremes Tower who had touched the second barrier wall—Gu Heyuan Ancestor!.

Chapter 1656: The Abyssless Land!

Chapter 1656: The Abyssless Land!

“The limit of lifespan!”
Ye Tian sensed the limit of life from Gu Heyuan Ancestor. He had already gone a very, very long time without seeing anyone face a limit of lifespan. Even though many beings did not have high life cultivation, they could still live for endless ages; in theory, they had no lifespan limit. At most, after passing through endless years, their will would be unable to hold on, they would fall into stillness, and their will would eventually be extinguished, causing them to perish. But that was not a limit of lifespan.
Yet the decaying aura on Gu Heyuan Ancestor’s body proved that his lifespan was running out.
A powerhouse at the Eight Extremities Stage who had half-stepped into the Eternal Stage should still be facing a limit of lifespan—Ye Tian found this unbelievable.
Although he had heard before that those half-step Eternal Stage experts in the Time-Space Land would all have a limit of lifespan, he had never actually seen it. Now that he saw it with his own eyes, he was somewhat shaken.
A half-step Eternal Stage could live for 10 million Eternal Years, yet Gu Heyuan Ancestor was about to face a limit of lifespan. This showed that he had already lived nearly 10 million Eternal Years. What an unimaginably long span of time that was!
Even in the Source Sea, not necessarily every half-step Eternal Stage expert could live that long, because many of them, in order to survive, would inevitably venture into all kinds of precious lands and forbidden lands, and even fight other half-step Eternal Stage experts. They might die at any moment.
Therefore, although the half-step Eternal Stage experts in the Source Sea had unlimited lifespan in theory, very few could truly live beyond 10 million years.
So, many half-step Eternal Stage experts in the Time-Space Land actually did not care too much about lifespan.
For someone like Gu Heyuan Ancestor, who had reached the limit of lifespan, it was truly extremely rare.
“Greetings, fellow Source Ancestors!”
Gu Heyuan Ancestor said with a smile.
“Greetings, Gu Heyuan Ancestor!”
“Greetings, Gu Heyuan Ancestor!”
“Greetings, Gu Heyuan Ancestor!”
Many Eight Extremities Stage experts were quite respectful toward Gu Heyuan Ancestor, because he had truly lived for far too many years. Many Eternal Stage experts were not even as old as he was.
The longer one lived, the more experience Gu Heyuan Ancestor had, and the more secrets he knew.
Moreover, Gu Heyuan Ancestor was also very powerful. He had reached the Peak of the Eight Extremities Stage and had touched the barrier of the second boundary. Among experts who had touched the second boundary barrier, he was also an existence at the very top.
Unfortunately, he still had not stepped into the Nine Extremities Stage of the half-step Eternal Stage, nor had he entered the Eternal Stage.
“Gu Heyuan Ancestor, what is the matter for which you summoned us this time?”
An Eight Extremities Stage expert asked.
Gu Heyuan Ancestor said, “You should all know that my lifespan is nearly exhausted. I have been too cautious all my life, which caused me to miss many opportunities. Now I still want to make one more attempt at the Eternal Stage. However, with my current condition, there is no hope of relying on myself to break through to the Eternal Stage. So I want to go to one place. There is hope there that I can advance to the Eternal Stage, but that place is extremely dangerous. With my strength alone, entering there would be suicide, so I want to ask some Eight Extremities Stage experts to enter that place with me.”
“What place is it?”
Many Eight Extremities Stage experts became interested.
Although that place would surely be very dangerous, if it could give Gu Heyuan Ancestor hope of advancing to the Eternal Stage, then it might also give them hope of advancing to the Eternal Stage.
Although they were at the Eight Extremities Stage and their combat strength could match weaker Eternal Stage existences, they were not true Eternal Stage experts after all!
For an Eight Extremities Stage expert to charge toward the Eternal Stage was simply too difficult, and becoming a Nine Extremities Stage expert was even harder.
So they also had to seize every opportunity.
“It is the Abyssless Land!”
Gu Heyuan Ancestor revealed.
The Abyssless Land.
A small number of Eight Extremities Stage experts immediately became shocked upon hearing this name.
“Gu Heyuan Ancestor, do you know where the Abyssless Land is?” True Yang Saint Ancestor asked in shock.
Another Eight Extremities Stage expert said, “Gu Heyuan Ancestor, 900,000 Eternal Years ago, I even asked you about the Abyssless Land, but you said you didn’t know.”
Gu Heyuan Ancestor said with a smile, “Back then I still didn’t want to enter the Abyssless Land and had not made up my mind. Why would I tell you? Some of you have avatars, but I do not!”
Gu Heyuan Ancestor had no avatar, which was also the reason he had always dared not take risks.
In fact, many Eight Extremities Stage existences had avatars, but avatars differ. Some avatars have weaker strength and can hardly possess the same combat power as the main body. Others, once destroyed, require a great price to condense again.
However, Gu Heyuan Ancestor did not even have the qualification to possess an avatar. It was not that he did not want one, but that the path he cultivated was special and could not support an avatar.
Just like the heart of the Primal Tree: after other half-step Eternal Stage experts refine it, they can form an avatar, but Gu Heyuan Ancestor could not make use of it. He cultivated the Unique Sword Dao, a very powerful sword dao within the Time-Space Land, but this cultivation system could not split will or divide power. Even materials that could normally be used to forge an avatar would be shattered by the power of the Unique Sword Dao, and thus could not form an avatar.
Gu Heyuan Ancestor’s path had already been set, and he had no way to change to another path. He could only keep walking it.
Therefore,
some Eight Extremities Stage experts who had avatars dared to venture into the Abyssless Land, but he did not dare, because he only had one life.
However, the other Eight Extremities Stage experts did not know the location of the Abyssless Land, while Gu Heyuan Ancestor did.
“What kind of place is the Abyssless Land?”
Ye Tian asked curiously.
Not only Ye Tian was unclear about it; many Eight Extremities Stage experts did not understand the Abyssless Land very well either.
Gu Heyuan Ancestor wanted the other Eight Extremities Stage experts to go with him, so he explained, “The Abyssless Land is actually a nest of the Void Beast, and moreover it is a movable nest. About 6 million years ago, many Eternal Stage experts in the Time-Space Land launched a siege against the Void Beast, and the Abyssless Land was affected as well. That battle caused the Void Beast to nearly disappear from the Time-Space Land region, and it also caused huge losses to the Time-Space Land. Several Undying Stage lords fell, and the number of ordinary Eternal Stage experts who died was even greater. Multiple Time-Space Lands were even destroyed. And the Abyssless Land was said by those Eternal Stage experts who took part in the battle to have been Annihilated, but in reality it was not Annihilated. The Abyssless Land seemed to have its own consciousness. After that battle, having been severely damaged, it slipped into the depths of the Void Region. The Undying Stage lords were not very interested in the Abyssless Land, so they would not search for it, and ordinary Eternal Stage experts did not dare enter the depths of the Void Region for fear of getting lost. The reason I know the location of the Abyssless Land is that 3 million years ago, I offended an Eternal Stage expert and was forced to flee into the depths of the Void Region. By chance, I found the Abyssless Land, but I did not dare go in, so I only left a mark and waited for the future to enter it again. 2.8 million years ago, the Eternal Stage expert I had offended fell, and only then did I dare show myself again. Whoever among you wants to go to the Abyssless Land must form a space-time contract with me. Although it may not necessarily bind you, I hope that after everyone enters the Abyssless Land, at the very least you will not harm one another. If you do not form a space-time contract, I will not take you there.”
“I am willing to go!”
“I am willing to go too!”
One after another, Eight Extremities Stage experts wanted to enter the Abyssless Land.
Ye Tian was also willing to enter the Abyssless Land, so he agreed to form the space-time contract. It was only a kind of alliance contract and had little effect on Eight Extremities Stage experts, so no one really cared.
However, there were also some Eight Extremities Stage experts who did not dare to enter the Abyssless Land. These experts who did not dare to enter were basically those without avatars, and thus they did not dare take the risk, after all, they only had one life.
In addition, there were many Eight Extremities Stage experts who had not come here, perhaps cultivating in some Time-Space Land or even in the Source Sea.
After all, many Eight Extremities Stage experts who had touched the second boundary barrier would enter the Source Sea to charge toward the Nine Extremities Stage.
For example, Gu Heyuan Ancestor had spent a very long time in the Source Sea, but he had never broken through, and thus had given up on becoming a Nine Extremities Stage expert.
In the end, 376 Eight Extremities Stage experts were willing to enter the Abyssless Land.
And the time to enter the Abyssless Land was now!
Gu Heyuan Ancestor did not want the news to leak and cause an Undying Stage Eternal Stage lord to come looking for him, asking him to lead the way and ultimately taking away all the benefits.
So he would not waste time. He immediately led these Eight Extremities Stage experts toward the depths of the Void Region.

Chapter 1657: The Eternity Realm Lords Who Are Tracking Them!

Chapter 1657: The Eternity Realm Lords Who Are Tracking Them!

Everyone passed through the spacetime passage and crossed one spacetime territory after another, quickly arriving at the outermost spacetime territory—Silent Territory.
Silent Territory was a territory with an owner; it was the domain of the Silent Lord, but she had no ambition. Anyone could come to her territory, and she did not really manage affairs either. She seemed not to care about anything. Otherwise, she would not have chosen the Silent Territory, so far away from the Source Sea.
Silent Territory was one of the spacetime territories farthest from the Source Sea. Beyond that distance, spacetime territories would no longer be born, because if one was too far from the Source Sea, it would no longer count as existing by attaching itself to the Source Sea, and naturally there would be no such thing as a spacetime territory.
“Entering the Void Region from here, we’ll have to traverse a very long distance afterward. You must be mentally prepared!”
Gu He, a Domain Ancestor, reminded them.
“It’s not like this is our first time entering the Void Region. Gu He, Domain Ancestor, let’s set off quickly!”
One Eightfold Realm expert urged hurriedly.
“Go!”
Everyone immediately tore apart the spacetime barrier of Silent Territory and entered the Void Region, then headed deeper into it.
Not long after they left, one Eternity Realm expert after another appeared.
They looked in the direction Gu He, Domain Ancestor, and the others had gone, then chased after them while chatting among themselves.
“That old fellow Gu He, Domain Ancestor, actually knows the location of the Abyssless Land. Rumor has it that the Abyssless Land is one of the nests of the Void Beasts, and it contains countless precious resources. It’s a pity that back then, when the Immortal Lords fought the Void Beasts in a decisive battle, they had no time to deal with the Abyssless Land, and the Abyssless Land actually moved away, leaving no trace of where it went.”
“If we obtain some benefits in the Abyssless Land, maybe we’ll have a chance to advance into Immortality Realm Lords.”
“We also need to be careful of this group of Eightfold Realm half-step Eternity Realm experts. Their strength isn’t weak either, and there are so many of them. We’ll have to join forces too, so we don’t get bullied by a bunch of half-step Eternity Realm experts!”
“Of course!”
……
Time slowly passed. At first, some Eightfold Realm experts could still endure the environment of the Void Region, but as time went on, they too grew somewhat irritable. The fact that even Eightfold Realm experts could develop irritability showed just how terrifying the environment deep within the Void Region was.
Of course, the ones truly affected were only those Eightfold Realm experts who had not yet condensed a second-tier Eternity Will. For experts like Ye Tian, who were Eightfold Realm half-step Eternity Realm experts, the impact was very small and could almost be ignored.
However, once they ventured deeper into the Void Region, even second-tier Eternity Will began to feel somewhat uncomfortable.
At this point, one of the Eightfold Realm experts asked, “Gu He, Domain Ancestor, how much farther is it? If this goes on, I won’t be able to endure it.”
“Not far now!” Gu He, Domain Ancestor, replied.
After another few days, they finally arrived at their destination.
“We’re here!”
Gu He, Domain Ancestor, pointed to a shadowy area ahead and said.
“It really is the Abyssless Land!”
One Eightfold Realm expert after another became quite excited.
“Everyone, be careful. To enter the Abyssless Land, we must wait. Only when the Abyssless Land is about to move can we enter it; otherwise, it’s impossible to get in at any other time.” Gu He, Domain Ancestor, reminded them.
“We know!” The other Eightfold Realm experts nodded.
Immediately, the many Eightfold Realm experts sat cross-legged around the Abyssless Land and waited quietly.
Very quickly, Gu He, Domain Ancestor, changed expression and looked into the distance.
Whoosh whoosh whoosh!!!!
The auras of one Eternity Realm expert after another appeared, without any concealment.
“Eternity Realm Lords!”
Gu He, Domain Ancestor, looked somewhat ugly. He had not wanted the Eternity Realm Lords to know, but it was still exposed.
The Eightfold Realm experts present had signed contracts, so they should not have exposed it. Therefore, it could only have been the Eightfold Realm experts who left that revealed the news. But how did these Eternity Realm Lords lock onto his location?
Logically speaking, after they traversed one spacetime territory after another, the Eternity Realm Lords would not have had time to track them at all!
Suddenly.
Gu He, Domain Ancestor, saw an Eternity Realm expert and immediately understood.
“Silent Lord!”
Not only Gu He understood, the other Eightfold Realm experts understood as well.
They had left from the Silent Lord’s territory, so naturally the Silent Lord knew about it.
They had just not expected the Silent Lord to immediately notify the other lords.
And as they flew through the Void Region, their auras would leak out, making them very conspicuous. However, after a period of time, these auras would be turned into nothingness by the Void Region, leaving no trace at all.
But these lords had tracked them in time, so of course they could still follow their trail.
At this moment, there were only thirty-three Eternity Realm Lords who had arrived, not a very large number, but among them were not a few Peak Immortality Realm Lords.
Although Eightfold Realm half-step Eternity Realm experts could be comparable to weaker Eternity Realm experts—that is, weaker Immortality Realm experts—and even Gu He, Domain Ancestor, who had touched the barrier of the second boundary limit, could at most be comparable to ordinary Immortality Realm experts, they still could not defeat Peak Immortality Realm Lords.
Their only advantage was that they had greater numbers, while the arriving Eternity Realm Lords were relatively few.
“Silent Lord, I really thought you didn’t care about anything?”
Gu He, Domain Ancestor, mocked.
The Silent Lord did not care at all about Gu He, Domain Ancestor’s mockery, and said with a smile, “I truly don’t care about many things, but as for the Abyssless Land, I can’t possibly not care. I also want to become an Immortality Realm Lord, but many great opportunities have already been occupied by those Immortal Lords, and the Abyssless Land is my chance.”
Gu He, Domain Ancestor, did not want to fight either. After all, they were not in an advantageous position, but they were not easy to bully either.
So Gu He, Domain Ancestor, proposed, “After we enter, how about we avoid interfering with each other? The Abyssless Land is, after all, one of the nests of the Void Beasts. There may still be Void Beasts in it now. We are not your obstacle or enemy.”
“Rest assured. As long as you don’t cause us trouble, we won’t cause you trouble either. Our goal is simply to find opportunities!” the Silent Lord said with a smile.
That was what was said, but everyone still harbored a certain hostility toward one another.
In fact, the relationship between the Eightfold Tower and the Immortality Realm Lords was very poor; this was common knowledge in the spacetime territories.
Because Eternity Realm Lords had almost all once been ordinary half-step Eternity Realm experts, not peak half-step Eternity Realm experts, whereas if an Eightfold Realm half-step Eternity Realm expert could break through to Eternity Realm, they would almost always become an Immortality Realm Lord upon breaking through.
Eightfold Realm experts looked down on ordinary half-step Eternity Realm experts, and once they broke through to Eternity Realm, they also looked down on ordinary Immortality Realm Lords.
Now, these Immortality Realm Lords naturally wanted to take advantage of the fact that Eightfold Realm experts could not break through and come cause trouble for them.
The only thing that made Gu He, Domain Ancestor, and the others let out a breath of relief was that this time there were no Immortal Lords or Eternal Lords involved; otherwise, there would be nothing for them to share at all.
And those Eternity Realm Lords also would not notify Immortal Lords or Eternal Lords.
In the blink of an eye, several tribulation-era years passed.
On this day, the Abyssless Land began to tremble.
It was about to move!.
