Chapter 1658: The Nest of the Void Beast, Void Gold Marrow Wood!

Chapter 1658: The Nest of the Void Beast, Void Gold Marrow Wood!

“The Abyssless Land is about to move!”
Lord Gu Heyuan said excitedly.
The other eight-pole realm and Eternal realm experts also all gazed at the Abyssless Land, ready to enter it at any moment.
Rumble!!!!
It took only an instant for the Abyssless Land to go from still to moving.
At the very moment it rapidly moved, Ye Tian and the other eight-pole realm experts, as well as those Eternal realm lords, all darted into the Abyssless Land.
……
Abyssless Land.
This place had floating island terrain, like one floating island after another suspended in a void region.
Moreover, within the void there existed one Void Beast after another. These Void Beasts were in a semi-void state, sometimes revealing their physical true forms, sometimes nearly transparent, constantly switching between the two states.
“Be careful, there are Void Beasts here!”
One Eternal realm expert reminded them.
At this time, one eight-pole realm expert asked curiously, “Didn’t they say the Void Beasts had all been exterminated? I didn’t expect there to still be so many Void Beasts!”
“Exterminated?” Lord Gu Heyuan sneered. “How could the Void Beasts possibly have been wiped out? It’s just that the battle from several million years ago caused the Void Beasts in this void region of the Temporal Domain Land to nearly disappear. But deep within the void region, there are still large numbers of Void Beasts. Even Immortal realm lords dare not rashly enter the depths of the void region. Otherwise, why do you think those lords never develop the land in the depths of the void region?”
That eight-pole realm expert immediately fell silent. Clearly, such a remark had been somewhat embarrassing.
Whoosh whoosh whoosh!!!!
Those Eternal realm lords flew off in another direction, clearly not intending to stay with Lord Gu Heyuan and the others.
Lord Gu Heyuan said, “According to the contract, we must act together. Although I have never been to the Abyssless Land, I do know a little about it. The Abyssless Land not only gives birth to many rare resources, but there is also one type of material that is definitely present: Void Gold Marrow Wood! Void Gold Marrow Wood can nurture Void Fruits, and Void Beasts are born from Void Fruits. Void Gold Marrow Wood can increase the chance of fusing innate Eternal laws, which is equivalent to increasing the chance of breaking through to the Eternal realm. Let’s first go look for Void Gold Marrow Wood. Does anyone have any objections?”
“No objections!”
Everyone agreed to Lord Gu Heyuan’s proposal.
After all, a treasure like Void Gold Marrow Wood was also something they wanted. For eight-pole realm experts like them, the greatest possibility was to break through to the Eternal realm, so they were extremely eager for resources and treasures that could help with that breakthrough. Even if it could only increase the chance by a little, that was still excellent.
Whoosh whoosh whoosh!!!
Everyone followed Lord Gu Heyuan as he flew toward an island to see whether there was any Void Gold Marrow Wood there.
Suddenly.
Six Void Beasts charged toward Ye Tian and the others.
“Everyone be careful, Void Beasts can neutralize attacks. Their strength is no weaker than that of ordinary Immortal realm lords!”
Lord Gu Heyuan reminded them.
No one underestimated the Void Beasts, after all the legends about them were too terrifying.
Immediately, dozens of eight-pole realm experts joined forces to contend with these six Void Beasts. One attack after another blasted onto the Void Beasts’ bodies, but when these attacks landed, the Void Beasts became illusory, and the power of the attacks was directly neutralized in part; even attacks carrying willpower were neutralized.
It seemed capable of neutralizing any force.
Ye Tian understood very well that this was the Void Beasts’ innate power.
The moment he saw the Void Beasts, Ye Tian used his Copying Talent to investigate their talent conditions and saw a very special talent.
[Phasing: Immortal Ancestor Talent]
“They actually possess an Immortal Ancestor Talent!”
Ye Tian was very surprised.
This was the first time he had encountered a creature possessing an Immortal Ancestor Talent level. His own Immortal Ancestor Talents were formed by continuously fusing talents from the Black Mist Worm into several Immortal Ancestor Talents.
The Void Beasts not only possessed the Immortal Ancestor Talent-level Phasing, but also the three major Immortal Ancestor Talent-level talents of Strength, Defense, and Speed.
It was just that the Void Beasts had low intelligence; otherwise, this race would be far too terrifying. They would probably be able to grow to the Immortal realm level, and by then, countless Temporal Domain Lands and the Source Sea would not be able to contend with the Void Beasts.
“Copy!”
Ye Tian used his Copying Talent to copy one Immortal Ancestor Talent after another from the Void Beasts. Although the copying speed was a bit slow, he could still barely manage to copy them.
Rumble rumble rumble!!!
The six Void Beasts fought fiercely with dozens of eight-pole realm experts. They could unleash wave after wave of destructive light, and each destructive light wave was enough to kill ordinary seven-pole realm powerhouses. Even if an eight-pole realm expert was struck head-on, they would be injured.
But the dozens of eight-pole realm experts had the advantage in numbers, so they still suppressed the Void Beasts.
However, Ye Tian and the others were unable to kill these six Void Beasts.
At this time, Lord Gu Heyuan proposed, “Use formations to trap them temporarily. We can’t let them drag us down.”
The other eight-pole realm experts agreed as well, and so they began setting up formations one after another. They did not seek to trap them completely, only to hold these Void Beasts for a while, and that would be enough.
· ·········求鮮花··· ·····
The eight-pole realm experts were extremely fast at setting up formations. As long as they had materials, they could build a formation in almost a second.
In an instant, one great formation after another enveloped the six Void Beasts.
At the same time, these eight-pole realm experts took out one Eternal Source weapon after another with void-sealing effects and directly sealed off this area, making it so the six Void Beasts would take a little longer to break through the sealing formations.
“Go!”
Lord Gu Heyuan said hurriedly.
Dozens of eight-pole realm experts immediately darted away, while the six Void Beasts were temporarily trapped.
Very quickly, everyone arrived on an island.
Although the island had some resources, there was no Void Gold Marrow Wood.
Thus, everyone immediately left, so as not to waste time.
As everyone continued to go deeper into the Abyssless Land, they encountered Void Beasts again and again, and each time they used the same method to temporarily trap them.
.... ......... 0
Otherwise, in the Abyssless Land, it would be far too difficult to shake off the Void Beasts.
Suddenly.
Everyone discovered that an enormous nest had appeared on an island.
“A nest should be the place where Void Beasts are born. There must be Void Gold Marrow Wood inside. Let’s go in!”
Lord Gu Heyuan said excitedly.
Whoosh!!!
Everyone directly darted into the nest, as if entering another stretch of void.
Here, a leafless golden tree had taken root inside the nest, and on it there were three fruits.
These three fruits were the three Void Fruits that nurtured the Void Beasts.
“Cut down this Void Gold Marrow Tree. Of the Void Gold Marrow Wood obtained, I want one tenth, and the rest goes to you all!” Lord Gu Heyuan said.
“No problem!”
Everyone agreed.
After all, divided in this way, they would still obtain quite a lot. Besides, relying solely on Void Gold Marrow Wood would not truly allow them to break through.
Moreover, Lord Gu Heyuan had brought them here, so they would not reject his distribution plan.
“Five people will cut down the Void Gold Marrow Tree. The other eight-pole realm experts will guard the entrance. Make sure to block those Void Beasts. Otherwise, when we cut down the Void Gold Marrow Wood, the Void Beasts will definitely sense it and come to stop us!” Lord Gu Heyuan reminded everyone.
Immediately, Ye Tian and the others came to the entrance, prepared to intercept the Void Beasts rushing in to rescue it, while Lord Gu Heyuan and the other five eight-pole realm experts began cutting down the Void Gold Marrow Tree.
With a boom!
The felling began, and the Void Beasts born from this nest all sensed it and began gathering toward this place.

Chapter 1659 The True Yang Holy Ancestor’s avatar was killed!

Chapter 1659 The True Yang Holy Ancestor’s avatar was killed!

“The Void Beasts are here!”
In the void outside the cave, one Void Beast after another came shuttling over.
The dozens of Eight Extremity Stage experts all had grave expressions. These were all equivalent to Lords of the Eternal Realm, and even they could not contend with them; they could only delay them for a period of time.
“First use sealing-type Eternal Origin weapons to seal off the void, then use formations to hold them back for a bit, and then use defensive Eternal Arts to block these Void Beasts!”
The many Eight Extremity Stage experts began to buy time in this way.
But very quickly, dozens of Void Beasts had already gathered outside. It could be seen that the actions of the Eight Extremity Stage experts cutting down the Void Gold Essence Tree had completely enraged these Void Beasts.
Crack!
An Eternal Origin weapon that was sealing off the void directly shattered, and then the other Eternal Origin weapons also shattered one after another.
The great formations also did not hold out for long before breaking one by one.
At this point, the Eight Extremity Stage experts had to face these Void Beasts directly.
The Eight Extremity Stage experts joined forces to unleash a series of defensive Eternal Arts, forming layer upon layer of light shields that sealed the entrance tightly.
Meanwhile, the Void Beasts kept bombarding the entrance, countless laws collapsing as this stretch of void caved in.
Some of the weaker Eight Extremity Stage experts, whose bodies were also rather frail, were already unable to hold on and their physical bodies began to crack, so they could only forcibly take some pills to recover from their injuries.
The only Eight Extremity Stage expert under relatively light pressure was Ye Tian.
Ye Tian’s Endless Eternal Body was a legendary Eternal Body, and he had also reached the Transcendent realm. His ability to save his life was arguably the number one among Eight Extremity Stage experts; even if he faced multiple Void Beasts alone, it was enough for him to preserve his life.
Thus, he was not the least bit panicked.
“Ancestor Gu He, hurry up. We’re about to reach our limit!”
True Yang Holy Ancestor and the other Eight Extremity Stage experts sent transmissions to Ancestor Gu He and the other five Eight Extremity Stage half-step Eternal Realm experts, urging them to speed up.
Finally, just when the Eight Extremity Stage experts were about to completely collapse, a crack echoed throughout the nest.
The Void Gold Essence Tree broke!
“Collect it!”
Ancestor Gu He waved his hand and directly took away the Void Gold Essence Tree. Then he sent a message to the many Eight Extremity Stage experts: “The Void Gold Essence Tree is already in hand. After we break out of the encirclement, we can then divide it into pieces of Void Gold Essence Wood.”
“Good!”
The other Eight Extremity Stage experts also agreed.
After all, they were still surrounded by the Void Beasts right now, and they did not have that much time to continue cutting up the Void Essence Wood.
So, they had to break out of the encirclement first.
The Eight Extremity Stage experts were indeed no match for this group of Void Beasts, but breaking out of the encirclement was still possible.
After paying a certain price, the dozens of Eight Extremity Stage experts finally managed to break out.
Then, they concealed themselves on a small island and set up a concealment formation, temporarily making them safe.
“Ancestor Gu He, divide the Void Gold Essence Tree into pieces of Void Gold Essence Wood.”
An Eight Extremity Stage expert hurriedly urged.
They were also afraid that Ancestor Gu He would go back on his word; what if he ran off?
“Alright!”
Ancestor Gu He did not have any intention of reneging. He took out the entire Void Gold Essence Tree, then began cutting it up. After some time, he finally cut it into many pieces.
“Let’s begin the distribution!”
According to the agreement, Ancestor Gu He directly took one-tenth, while the rest was divided equally. After all, everyone had contributed, and at this time there was no room to argue about who was stronger or weaker; otherwise, there would be no way to divide it.
Very soon, Ye Tian also obtained a piece of Void Gold Essence Wood, and its size was quite large.
With so much Void Gold Essence Wood, it was enough to refine quite a bit of Void Gold Essence Liquid. Although it could help with fusing innate Eternal Laws, it would at most increase the chance by 5%.
But if enough similar treasures were collected, then the usefulness would be huge.
For example, Ancestor Gu He had lived for nearly 10 million Eternal Years after all. Ye Tian did not believe he had no other treasures or resources that could help him break through.
After the distribution was completed, Ancestor Gu He said, “Everyone, I only know that the Land of the Abyss has this one resource, the Void Gold Essence Wood. Now that we’ve obtained it, continuing to seek more Void Gold Essence Wood won’t be of much use. So I suggest we split up and search for treasures separately, lest we only obtain one type of treasure yet be unable to divide it, causing conflicts between us. What do you think?”
“Agreed!”
True Yang Holy Ancestor was the first to agree.
“I agree too!”
Ye Tian said.
How many good things could he get by following the main group? Even if he encountered some extremely good treasure, he would not be able to monopolize it alone.
Moreover,
he could also copy a clone of himself, allowing his two bodies to act separately. If he followed the other Eight Extremity Stage experts, it would be inconvenient for him to copy his own body.
So he was the person who most wanted to act separately.
“Agree!”
“Agree!”
Most of the Eight Extremity Stage experts agreed.
And some Eight Extremity Stage experts were not confident in their own strength, and they were also injured, so they planned to act in teams.
Just like that, this team split up here.
------------------------
Ye Tian traveled far away, and his copying talent still had not detected any other Eight Extremity Stage experts or Eternal Realm beings, so he began copying his own body.
Very quickly, another body was copied out.
Immediately, the two bodies moved off in two different directions.
In this way, his chances of finding treasures became much greater.........
Along the way, regardless of what resource it was, as long as it was of some use, he directly collected it.
No matter what, after resources accumulated to a certain extent, they would still have some value.
Occasionally, he encountered Void Beasts, but he did not fight them to the death; instead, he chose to shake them off.
Just like that, time slowly passed.
Deep within the Land of the Abyss.
True Yang Holy Ancestor arrived here and found a mineral vein.
“It’s actually an Indestructible Earth Spirit Stone vein. Integrating this kind of mineral vein into the spacetime territory will help the territory grow!”
The Land of the Abyss said excitedly.
The value of this mineral vein was enough to equal half of his net worth.
Just as he was about to take away this mineral vein, a black, hair-covered hand reached out from the void and grabbed at him.
True Yang Holy Ancestor’s expression changed drastically, and he used an Eternal Art to protect himself.
However, the power of this large hand was far too terrifying. With just one strike, it tore through his Eternal Art defense, pierced through the Eternal Origin armor he wore, and shattered his Eternal Body.
True Yang Holy Ancestor was covered in countless cracks, as though he was about to fall apart completely in the next moment.
He kept shuttling through space while trying his best to recover his injuries.
However, all of it was useless.
With a thunderous boom!
He was directly shaken out of his spacetime shuttling, and then a humanoid Void Beast appeared, punching toward him.
“True Yang Extinguishing World Fist!”
True Yang Holy Ancestor gathered all his strength, mobilized all his innate Eternal Laws, and unleashed a fist at the pinnacle of mastery.
Fist clashed with fist!
The other side was unharmed, while True Yang Holy Ancestor was directly blasted apart by a single punch. Only a trace of his will remained, but very quickly even that will was directly erased by the other side.
Shaoyang Territory.
In a certain stretch of void, True Yang Holy Ancestor’s true body opened his eyes, and within them was nothing but regret.
“I should have left. This time I’ve suffered a huge loss. The Void Gold Essence Wood is gone, and this avatar of mine has also perished. If I want to condense this avatar again, it will require a very long time, and I’ll also have to pay a very precious amount of resources!”
True Yang Holy Ancestor sighed.
However, he was also thankful it had been an avatar. If it had been his true body, then he would have perished completely this time.
“The other Eight Extremity Stage experts are probably in a miserable state. There’s actually an Immortal Void Beast hidden in the Land of the Abyss, and it even has some intelligence!” True Yang Holy Ancestor muttered.
Then, he sent messages to those Eight Extremity Stage experts in the Eight Extremities Tower who possessed the ability to use avatars.
As for whether their avatars were willing to withdraw, that was none of his business.
In any case, he had done his duty.
Very quickly, the other Eight Extremity Stage experts in the Land of the Abyss learned that the Land of the Abyss had a Void Beast comparable to a Immortal Realm lord.

Chapter 1660 Can the Copy Talent Actually Be Upgraded?

Chapter 1660 Can the Copy Talent Actually Be Upgraded?

“A Void Beast at the Indestructible Realm!”
Ye Tian also received transmissions from the other eight extreme realm half-step Eternal Realm experts, and immediately felt how troublesome it was.
If he encountered a Void Beast at the Indestructible Realm, he would definitely die.
Although he had only brought a copied body this time, once it perished, all those gains would be lost as well.
“This copied body can’t move. Let the clone act instead. That way, even if the clone is destroyed, the loss won’t be too great!”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
Thus.
His copied body hid itself and stopped moving, while the clone began searching for resources. Once it found a certain amount of resources, it would return to the copied body, leave the resources there, and then continue acting.
As time passed, some eight extreme realm experts still chose to leave. After all, they did not dare face a Void Beast comparable to the Indestructible Realm. If they encountered one, there would be no escaping at all.
They were not certain they could gain any more benefits, and thus did not want to lose the treasures already in hand.
For example, the Void Gold Marrow Wood was far too valuable; they did not want to lose it.
Therefore, even if it was only a clone, they were unwilling to take the risk.
In this way, more and more eight extreme realm experts left the Abyssless Land, and even some Eternal Realm experts left as well.
Among Eternal Realm experts, those with clones were a minority. For ordinary half-step Eternal Realm experts, the Origin Tree heart could help them condense a clone, but it had no effect at all on Eternal Realm experts.
Even for some half-step Eternal Realm experts with Eternal clones, once they broke through to the Eternal Realm, the clone would be very difficult to maintain and would simply stop functioning.
Unless such a clone stayed within its own domain all the time, it could still be maintained. Otherwise, once it left its own domain and entered a Void Region or some other spacetime domain, the clone would collapse.
And within one’s own domain, maintaining a clone was no different from condensing an avatar or an consciousness clone.
Truly having a clone at the Eternal Realm was simply too rare among domain lords.
So in a situation where their lives were in danger, these Eternal Realm experts dared not take risks and thus chose to leave.
At the same time, news about the Abyssless Land began spreading through the major spacetime domains, and even some Immortal Realm domain lords learned of it.
However.
These Immortal Realm domain lords were not very interested. Clearly, they looked down on the treasures of the Abyssless Land, but they still sent some Indestructible Realm powerhouses under them to the Abyssless Land.
For Indestructible Realm experts, some things in the Abyssless Land still had value. Besides, it had been countless ages since anyone last entered the Abyssless Land; it was likely that many good things had accumulated there, enough to make a trip worthwhile.
……
There were almost no good things left in the outer perimeter of the Abyssless Land. It had been looted by many eight extreme realm and Eternal Realm experts.
Ye Tian went a long time without any gains, so he prepared to enter the depths of the Abyssless Land.
“The depths of the Abyssless Land have Void Beasts comparable to the Indestructible Realm. The other eight extreme realm experts, and even domain lords of the Eternal Life Realm, probably wouldn’t dare go in. But I dare. At worst, my clone will perish and I’ll condense another one.”
Ye Tian thought.
Unfortunately, the Void Beasts were at a level comparable to Eternal Realm experts, so he had no way to copy a Void Beast’s body. Otherwise, he could have copied one and mixed into the depths of the Abyssless Land.
Whoosh!
Ye Tian’s clone moved rapidly, heading toward the depths of the Abyssless Land.
At first, Ye Tian did not encounter any Void Beasts at the Indestructible Realm, so there was not much danger.
Moreover, in the depths of the Abyssless Land, there were surprisingly no ordinary Void Beasts. He flew for a long time without seeing even a shadow of one, which was very abnormal compared to the outer perimeter of the Abyssless Land.
“I suppose the depths of the Abyssless Land are the domain of Void Beasts comparable to the Indestructible Realm. Ordinary Void Beasts probably don’t dare approach such powerful beasts’ territory,” Ye Tian guessed.
Suddenly.
Ye Tian felt a pull, an extremely long-lost attraction, as if his entire soul were rejoicing.
“This is…”
Ye Tian became excited.
This was the copy talent warning him that a treasure capable of helping the copy talent evolve had appeared.
All along, he had thought that the copy talent had already evolved to the extreme, but now he discovered that the copy talent could still evolve.
“From the perspective of rank, my copied body now is comparable to an immortal ancestral talent. If it continues to evolve, wouldn’t it be able to surpass an immortal ancestral talent?”
Ye Tian murmured.
Although he still did not know what kind of treasure could attract the copy talent’s evolution, he had to obtain that treasure no matter the cost.
Not to mention that there was a Void Beast comparable to the Indestructible Realm here; even if there were Void Beasts comparable to the Immortal Realm, he would still have to charge in. Otherwise, he would not be willing to accept it.
Immediately, Ye Tian followed the pull toward the treasure and rapidly moved forward.
However, before he reached the treasure’s location, a humanoid Void Beast appeared.
Boom!
The other side threw a punch, shattering endless void.
Ye Tian unleashed one Eternal technique after another, trying to withstand the punch.
However, the power of that punch was too terrifying. The Eternal techniques he used shattered one after another, and the innate Eternal rules were directly Annihilated.
Next, he was blasted away by a single punch, his body covered in cracks.
But in an instant, he recovered.
In terms of life-preserving ability, he was far stronger than True Yang Saint Ancestor, and even stronger than some Immortal Realm domain lords.
Although he was far from a match for an Indestructible Realm expert, he would not be killed in just a few moves.
Seeing that Ye Tian had not suffered much injury, this Void Beast comparable to the Indestructible Realm instantly grew enraged.
Its body became incomparably huge, and it hammered at Ye Tian with one punch after another.
Ye Tian wanted to shake off this Void Beast, but his speed was not as fast as the other side’s, and his attack power was also far inferior.
He had almost no ability to resist.
Time passed bit by bit, and Ye Tian’s injuries grew more and more severe.
In the end, Ye Tian’s body was completely Annihilated by the other side, and even his will was shattered.
Somewhere in the Abyssless Land.
Ye Tian’s copied body let out a sigh: “The clone was killed. As expected, it still can’t escape from the hands of an Indestructible Realm Void Beast.”
Next, he copied another clone and tried sending it there again.
As a result, he once again encountered that Void Beast and perished there again.
After two consecutive deaths, Ye Tian pondered for a while.
“The Abyssless Land should soon be completely exposed. There may even already be domain lords of the Indestructible Realm, or even the Immortal Realm, arriving. I must follow behind them and slip into the depths of the Abyssless Land, otherwise there’s no way to get past that Void Beast and obtain the treasure I need.”
So, Ye Tian waited silently.
Finally, on this day.
One domain lord after another of the Indestructible Realm descended upon the Abyssless Land.

Chapter 1661 Black Giant Island, Using the Immortal Realm Lords!

Chapter 1661 Black Giant Island, Using the Immortal Realm Lords!

These Immortal Realm lords all rushed toward the depths of the Abyssless Land, wanting to search for resources inside.
Very quickly, they encountered Immortal Realm Void Beasts.
Boom!!!
The slaughter began.
They had thought there would not be many Immortal Realm Void Beasts, but they had underestimated the Void Beasts of the Abyssless Land.
More than ten Void Beasts comparable to the Immortal Realm appeared, and this place was suited for Void Beasts to fight. Although the Immortal Realm lords could suppress these Void Beasts, it was somewhat difficult to kill them.
At this moment.
One Immortal Realm lord appeared, grabbed a Void Beast comparable to the Immortal Realm with one hand, and directly crushed it, but that Void Beast turned into formlessness and reassembled in the distance, though it was still injured.
“Greetings, Lord Chenhai!”
“Greetings, Lord Chenhai!”
“Greetings, Lord Chenhai!”
Many Immortal Realm lords spoke respectfully one after another.
Lord Chenhai was not an ordinary Immortal Realm lord. Moreover, he was very close to the Immortal Realm. Although he had not yet become a half-step Immortal Realm lord, his true strength was not weaker than a half-step Immortal Realm lord, and even an Immortal Realm expert would find it very difficult to kill him.
Thus, in the countless temporal lands, Lord Chenhai was a very special Eternal Realm lord.
But the real reason no one dared to deal with Lord Chenhai was not his strength, but that he had three incarnations—incarnations that truly had the same strength as his main body and could freely enter other places without restriction.
Including his three incarnations and his main body, he had a total of four bodies, each located in different places across the countless temporal lands, making it very difficult to find all four of them.
Once, an Immortal Realm expert joined forces with eight Immortal Realm lords to carry out an encirclement and kill against Lord Chenhai.
The eight Immortal Realm lords temporarily trapped two of Lord Chenhai’s bodies, while that Immortal Realm expert personally dealt with another body.
At first, they only thought Lord Chenhai had three bodies, and they had paid a great price to investigate the locations of those three bodies before launching this encirclement.
But the final result was that all three of Lord Chenhai’s bodies were killed, while he also desperately took down two Immortal Realm lords.
Countless years later, Lord Chenhai returned and assassinated the six surviving Immortal Realm lords one by one. By sacrificing the fall of his three incarnations and luring that Immortal Realm expert into a perilous death trap, he finally severely injured that Immortal Realm expert.
Even today, that Immortal Realm expert had not fully recovered from his injuries.
Precisely because of this, Lord Chenhai’s reputation in the countless temporal lands soared.
So when these Immortal Realm lords saw Lord Chenhai, they were extremely respectful and did not dare offend him in the slightest.
Lord Chenhai nodded slightly, then began dealing with these Void Beasts.
The reason he came here was simple: he also came to seek opportunities in order to break through to the Immortal Realm.
He still had an Immortal Realm enemy, and if he could break through to the Immortal Realm, then he would have sufficient confidence to kill that enemy.
Otherwise, he was afraid he would simply be unable to kill the other party.
With Lord Chenhai’s joining, these Void Beasts simply could not hold them back and were quickly heavily injured.
These Void Beasts had some intelligence, and thus feared perishing; one by one, they fled.
“These Void Beasts are really hard to kill!”
Lord Chenhai shook his head and said.
Unfortunately, he was already at the Immortal Realm, and such Void Beasts were of no help to him. Otherwise, he would really have gone to any lengths to kill some Void Beasts.
Whoosh, whoosh, whoosh!!!
One Immortal Realm lord after another went deeper into the Abyssless Land in search of the so-called opportunities.
And not long after they left, a figure appeared, none other than Ye Tian.
“Those Immortal Realm lords heavily injured the Immortal Realm Void Beasts. Those Immortal Realm Void Beasts probably won’t come to stop me for now!”
Ye Tian muttered to himself.
He followed the pull of his replication talent and ventured deeper into the Abyssless Land.
Very soon, the attraction of that mysterious treasure to Ye Tian grew stronger and stronger. He should not be far from the treasure’s location.
“We’re here!”
Ye Tian arrived at a huge black island.
The treasure attracting him was on this black island, but just as he stepped onto it, a streak of black light attacked him.
The black light was too fast, leaving Ye Tian no time to react; this clone of his was instantly killed.
--------------------
“That was just now...”
Ye Tian’s expression turned grave.
That black light shot out from deep within the black island. He had not been able to dodge it; it was as if even his will had been frozen, leaving him no time to react at all.
And because the distance was too far, his replicated body could not cover that place either.
But he could roughly guess that the one who attacked him should be a Void Beast, and not an ordinary one. If it was not comparable to a half-step Immortal Realm expert, then it was comparable to a true Immortal Realm expert.
His strength was too far from the Immortal Realm, so he could not estimate the other party’s strength.
If he did not deal with that mysterious Void Beast, he would have no way to go onto that black island and search for the treasure he needed.
“I have to make use of those Immortal Realm lords!”
Ye Tian thought.
So, he spread the word about the black island and the astonishing treasure on it, informing the other Eight Extremes Realm experts in the Eight Extremes Tower.
This news definitely could not be concealed, and would even spread into the ears of those Immortal Realm lords.
By then, those Immortal Realm lords would likely head to that black island, which meant they would clash with that mysterious Void Beast.
Once they fought, Ye Tian would have his chance.
Very quickly, the news spread.
“A black island, with many precious resources on it, and also a powerful Void Beast?”
Lord Chenhai also learned of this news. After pondering for a moment, he then prepared to go take a look.
The news recorded the location of that black island. He was only going to have a look, so there was no loss; if it was true, then he would profit.
Whoosh!
Lord Chenhai traversed the void and quickly arrived at that black island.
At the same time, other Immortal Realm lords also arrived here one after another, but faintly sensed danger.
After all, these Immortal Realm lords were much stronger than Ye Tian, so naturally they could detect that something was off, but not to the point of leaving immediately.
Once Lord Chenhai arrived too, they all felt at ease.
At the very least, with Lord Chenhai here, even if that mysterious Void Beast was very powerful, they would not be unable to handle it.
Lord Chenhai showed no concern and stepped directly onto the black island. The other Immortal Realm lords followed as well, and even several Peak Eternal Realm lords came, seemingly wanting to join the excitement and look for some opportunities.
The moment they entered the black island, streaks of black light attacked them.
Those several Peak Eternal Realm lords could not dodge and were killed in one strike. Their Eternal bodies were smashed to pieces, and the Eternal origin weapons on them also turned into countless fragments.
As for those Immortal Realm lords, they also reacted and tried to block the black light, but were all blasted backward, each with ugly expressions, clearly having suffered serious injuries.
Only Lord Chenhai easily blocked the black light attack.
However, this was merely the other party’s ordinary Void Beast.
Boom!!!!!!
A nearly transparent Void Beast appeared, but when it attacked, its arm would turn black, and the black light came shooting out from its fingers.
“Not good, it’s a Tier 3 Void Beast!”
An Immortal Realm lord’s expression changed drastically.

Chapter 1662: The Purple Stone Is in Hand!

Chapter 1662: The Purple Stone Is in Hand!

For those half-step Eternal Realm experts, Void Beasts did not have any clear equivalent classification; they were merely compared to Eternal Realm experts according to their strength.
This was because they had hardly ever come into contact with Void Beasts, whereas those ancient Eternal Realm experts had, and thus had assigned the Void Beasts one rank after another.
A first-tier Void Beast was comparable to the Immortal Life Realm, a second-tier Void Beast was comparable to the Undying Realm, while a third-tier Void Beast had not yet reached the Immortal Realm. It was stronger than a half-step Immortal Realm expert, yet not as strong as an Immortal Realm expert, but its difficulty to deal with was comparable to that of an Immortal Realm expert.
According to the comparison and analysis based on past clashes between Immortal Realm experts and third-tier Void Beasts, a newly advanced Immortal Realm expert could roughly handle six third-tier Void Beasts, while a fourth-tier Void Beast was somewhat stronger than a newly advanced Immortal Realm expert, comparable to an established Immortal Realm lord.
“Retreat!”
Those Undying Realm lords all withdrew, not daring to fight this third-tier Void Beast, because they truly could not beat it.
The third-tier Void Beast was extremely fast, and it immediately locked onto the Chenhai Lord.
The Chenhai Lord’s expression was also grave. Although he had once severely injured an Immortal Realm existence, he had done so by using a forbidden land and paying the price of three avatars to heavily wound that Immortal Realm expert, and there had also been an element of carelessness on the other side’s part.
And here was the Void Beast’s home ground. Even if all three of his avatars attacked together, he would be unable to do anything to this third-tier Void Beast, and might even be killed by it.
Only to see a blade appear in the Chenhai Lord’s hand as he continuously slashed at the third-tier Void Beast.
However, when those attacks landed on the third-tier Void Beast, most of the attack power was offset by the beast, and the remaining force was unable to deal much damage to it.
On the other hand, when faced with the Void Beast’s attacks, the Chenhai Lord had to deal with them with full force; a moment’s carelessness would leave him injured.
And the third-tier Void Beast had no intention of letting the other Undying Realm lords go either. Countless black tentacles emerged from its body and attacked the many Undying Realm lords, intending to leave them all here.
“Join forces together, or we won’t get out!”
the Undying Realm lords said.
Boom, boom, boom!!!!!
The Undying Realm lords all joined forces to contend against the third-tier Void Beast.
However, their attacks could not injure the third-tier Void Beast even in the slightest; they were completely nullified by the Void Beast. One Eternal technique after another blasted onto the third-tier Void Beast’s body, as though merely tickling it.
Soon after.
Some Undying Realm experts began to deploy formations, trying to trap this third-tier Void Beast.
However, even after the formations were set up and a large number of Eternal Source Weapon-grade items were used as the foundation, they still could not trap the third-tier Void Beast.
With a ripping sound!
One great formation after another was shattered and torn apart, and large numbers of Eternal Source Weapons were destroyed.
In no time at all, many Undying Realm lords were badly injured.
Suddenly.
The Chenhai Lord’s second avatar appeared, but he did not have the two avatars join forces to block the third-tier Void Beast. Instead, he had another avatar search for opportunities on this black island.
Whenever he encountered some top-grade resources, the Chenhai Lord would collect them all.
Perhaps because the Chenhai Lord’s two bodies put pressure on the third-tier Void Beast, it did not vigorously pursue and intercept the other Undying Realm lords, and thus some of them still managed to escape successfully.
Ye Tian also arrived here, waiting for an opportunity all along.
He did not dare to waste too much time. If he kept waiting silently like this and the item he needed that could upgrade the Copying Talent was taken away by some Undying Realm lord, then it would be very hard for him to get it back.
Therefore, he had to act as soon as possible.
But before acting, he planned to first fuse one Void-Forming Immortal Ancestor Talent.
He had not previously fused this Immortal Ancestor Talent called Void-Forming. If he fused it, then by using the ability of void-forming, he could also offset part of the attacks, and perhaps he could withstand one strike from a third-tier Void Beast without dying.
Immediately afterward, he began the fusion, and had his avatar accelerate time nearby.
Very soon.
The Void-Forming Immortal Ancestor Talent was successfully fused into Ye Tian’s copied body.
Next, Ye Tian’s copied body began entering this black island.
Upon entering the black island, Ye Tian followed his sense of the mysterious treasure and rapidly traversed through.
Perhaps because there were quite a number of Undying Realm experts on the black island, the third-tier Void Beast did not attack Ye Tian immediately, allowing Ye Tian to truly pass through.
How fast was the speed of the Eight Extremes Realm, not to mention that he had a clear target? Thus, he swiftly traversed to the location of that treasure.
“Purple stone!”
On a mountain peak, Ye Tian saw a purple stone. Without another word, he directly took away the purple stone, then began traversing out of this black island.
At the very moment he disappeared through traversal, a streak of black light pierced over.
Ye Tian activated many layers of defense, and even the Void-Forming Immortal Ancestor Talent was used as well.
With a puff!
The black light pierced through Ye Tian’s body, and Ye Tian desperately concealed his aura. Combined with the fact that his own strength was very weak, the low-IQ Void Beast thought that Ye Tian would definitely die from this strike, so it did not immediately follow up with another blow.
And that gave Ye Tian the chance and hope to escape.
He continued traversing, fleeing toward the outside of the black island.
And just as he left the black island, one finger of the third-tier Void Beast struck to kill, and a strike from afar crushed Ye Tian’s body.
Instantly, the flesh body of Ye Tian’s copied body was Annihilated, and even the will within that copied body was shattered as well, leaving only some matter behind.
At this time, however, Ye Tian’s avatar did not waste any time. It quickly arrived here, took the things Ye Tian had left behind, and fled again.
This was the benefit of having two bodies: after being killed, there was still a way to take the things away.
The third-tier Void Beast did not notice this, and thus did not immediately move against Ye Tian’s avatar, allowing Ye Tian’s avatar to successfully escape.
In fact, if it had pursued, it naturally could have killed Ye Tian.
However, there were still other Undying Realm experts and the Chenhai Lord’s two avatars here, so it would not abandon this place to chase Ye Tian.
Very soon.
Ye Tian’s avatar escaped from deep within the Abyssless Land and arrived in the outer region.
He found an island, hid himself, and then began to accelerate time. When he could once again condense a copied body, he condensed one.
After that.
Ye Tian’s copied body remained here, while his avatar carried the purple stone back outside, returning to the vicinity of his true body and handing it over to it.
Only in this way could he truly rest assured.

Chapter 1663 Heavenly Extreme Origin Pearl, Transformation of the Copy Talent

Chapter 1663 Heavenly Extreme Origin Pearl, Transformation of the Copy Talent

After the avatar left the Land of the Abyss, it shuttled through the Void Region at extremely high speed.
He still had not relaxed until the avatar returned to his true body’s side; only then did he truly feel at ease.
As time passed, the situation in the Land of the Abyss changed greatly.
Lord Chen Hai and the others could not do anything to that third-tier Void Beast, but Lord Chen Hai still snatched quite a few good things.
The information Ye Tian had sent out was not wrong. Indeed, many top-tier resources had been born on that black island, enough to tempt even Lords of the Undying Realm, and they were even useful to Lord Chen Hai.
However, there were not many Eternal Realm cultivators who truly managed to snatch good things, and even several Lords of the Undying Realm were nearly killed.
Now, they no longer dared step onto that black island.
After a long while.
Ye Tian’s avatar finally returned to the Time-Space Territory, then passed through one Time-Space Territory after another, and arrived at the Eight Extremes Tower.
The Eight Extremes Tower had great influence in the Time-Space Territory, and naturally had channels to enter the Source Sea.
For example, the Eight Extremes Tower cooperated with many Lords of the Eternal Life Realm, and could ask them to take members of the Eight Extremes Tower to the Source Sea, as long as some Time-Space Coins were paid.
Thus, through the Eight Extremes Tower’s connections, Ye Tian contacted a Lord of the Eternal Life Realm—Lord Wolf Fang.
This lord had a fairly good relationship with the Eight Extremes Tower mainly because an Eternal Realm member who had risen from the Eight Extremes Tower had taken good care of Lord Wolf Fang, which was why Lord Wolf Fang had grown close to the Eight Extremes Tower.
Ye Tian immediately contacted this Lord Wolf Fang, and then arrived at Lord Wolf Fang’s Wolf Fang Territory.
Swish!
Ye Tian walked out from the time-space passage and entered the Wolf Fang Territory, soon meeting Lord Wolf Fang.
Lord Wolf Fang did not look like a human, but rather like a giant humanoid wolf.
“Greetings, Lord Wolf Fang!”
Ye Tian greeted him very politely.
“The Endless Ancestor of the Eight Extremes Tower, you want to go to the Source Sea?” Lord Wolf Fang asked with some puzzlement.
Because in his view, Ye Tian should not have yet touched the second boundary barrier, so he did not need to break through to the level of Nine Extremities half-step Eternal Realm, right? Why go to the Source Sea at this time?
Ye Tian saw Lord Wolf Fang’s confusion, and explained, “Lord Wolf Fang, I am originally a being from the Source Sea, so I want to go back and take a look.”
“A being from the Source Sea!”
Lord Wolf Fang’s attitude immediately changed, and he said with a smile, “I didn’t expect that the Endless Ancestor would actually be a being from the Source Sea. Many Eight Extremities Realm cultivators are extremely envious of Source Sea beings. As Source Sea beings, their lifespan is endless, while the Eight Extremities Realm cultivators in the Time-Space Territory can only live like half-step Eternal Realm cultivators—they can all only live for 10 million Eternal Years. Yet the Eight Extremities Realm cultivators from the Source Sea have enough time to break through to the Nine Extremities Realm or the Eternal Realm.”
Ye Tian shook his head and said with a bitter smile, “Although Source Sea beings have unlimited lifespans, it is extremely difficult to grow to the Extreme realm. In this era of the Source Sea, there are fewer than a hundred Extreme realm beings, while any single territory in the Time-Space Territory has more than that number.”
“That is indeed the case. The Source Sea’s rules are too complete, so cultivation is difficult. The Time-Space Territory’s rules are incomplete, which is equivalent to having loopholes, and thus treasures and resources that break free from the shackles of the rules are born, along with various blessed lands, and even powerful constitutions and races. These are all situations that cannot appear in the Source Sea.” Lord Wolf Fang said.
The two chatted for a while before getting down to business.
Lord Wolf Fang handed Ye Tian a token and said, “This is a special communication token. It can penetrate the Source Sea barrier and send messages into the Time-Space Territory. Although the speed of receiving information is slow, once I receive your message, I can enter the Source Sea and bring you out, without needing to go through the Time-Space Island again.”
“Thank you, Lord Wolf Fang. These are one million Time-Space Coins!”
Ye Tian casually handed one million Time-Space Coins to Lord Wolf Fang.
This was the fee for entering the Source Sea, but if he were to come out, it would only require 100,000 Time-Space Coins.
“The Endless Ancestor is too courteous. Take these one million Time-Space Coins back; let’s just consider it making a friend!” Lord Wolf Fang did not accept the Time-Space Coins.
Ye Tian roughly guessed Lord Wolf Fang’s thoughts. He probably valued him highly and wanted to make friends with him.
If it were an Eight Extremities Realm cultivator from the Time-Space Territory, there was a high chance that, like Gu He Domain Ancestor, they would reach the end of their lifespan without breaking through to the Nine Extremities Realm or the Eternal Realm, and could only take a risk by entering some forbidden grounds or death grounds to gamble on a chance.
And many Eight Extremities Realm cultivators perished completely in some forbidden ground during that gamble.
Ye Tian was different. He had a long lifespan and could slowly endure until the end, eventually shedding his cocoon and becoming a butterfly, breaking through into the Eternal Realm.
Once an Eight Extremities half-step Eternal Realm cultivator breaks through to the Eternal Realm, at the very least they are a Lord of the Undying Realm, and not a weak one at that; among the Undying Realm, they would be considered powerful.
· ·········Request for flowers··· ·····
Therefore, a mere 1 million Time-Space Coins compared with making friends with a future Lord of the Undying Realm was nothing at all.
Ye Tian did not insist that Lord Wolf Fang accept the Time-Space Coins, and instead took them back.
Then, Lord Wolf Fang began to take Ye Tian to the Source Sea.
With a tearing sound!
Lord Wolf Fang tore open the space-time barrier, quickly forming a time-space passage that reached the Source Sea barrier.
With a thunderous boom!
The Source Sea barrier was shattered. Lord Wolf Fang’s power wrapped around Ye Tian, taking Ye Tian into the Source Sea.
-------------------
.... ......... 0
Source Sea.
Ye Tian appeared in an unfamiliar region, with Lord Wolf Fang right beside him.
At this moment, Lord Wolf Fang said, “Endless Ancestor, I have already brought you here, so it would be inconvenient for me to linger here.”
Afterward, Lord Wolf Fang left.
And Ye Tian soon returned to the Dark Forbidden Domain, back to his true body’s side, and took out that purple stone.
Ye Tian touched the purple stone and felt that the treasure, which even the Copy Talent longed for, was located at the core of the purple stone.
But the purple stone was extremely hard, so he slowly melted it little by little. After spending a long time, he finally caused the purple stone to crack open.
Crack!
The purple stone split open, and a tiny purple pearl appeared in the void.
At this moment, the Copy Talent’s desire became incomparably intense.
The Copy Talent wanted him to devour this purple pearl; this was an instinct.
“Heavenly Extreme Origin Pearl!”
This name appeared in Ye Tian’s mind.
He picked up the Heavenly Extreme Origin Pearl and swallowed it in one gulp, beginning to refine it.
Immediately, a surge of energy poured into the world of talent imprints transformed by the Copy Talent, prompting the Copy Talent to begin its transformation.
This transformation far surpassed any previous one, as if it were a transformation that crossed the rules. Even the Source Sea origin began to tremble, as though declaring the birth of a heaven-defying existence.
No one knew how much time passed before Ye Tian’s transformation truly finished.
After the transformation was complete, Ye Tian immediately checked his Copy Talent and.

Chapter 1664 Six Bodies! Powerful Copying Talent!

Chapter 1664 Six Bodies! Powerful Copying Talent!

“The copying talent really underwent such a huge change!”
Ye Tian was quite excited and thrilled.
For him, the greatest change was undoubtedly the transformation of the copied bodies. Before, although he could condense two copied bodies, they were actually all considered a type of clone. But now, after the copying talent had been upgraded and advanced, there was no longer any distinction between a copied body and a clone.
Even if the main body were to fall, a copied body would become the main body.
In other words, it would be very hard to kill him. As long as any copied body survived, he could not be killed.
Moreover, he now did not just copy two bodies, but five.
That meant that, including his main body, he could now form six bodies in total. His enemies would have to kill all six of his bodies at the same time in order to truly kill him, and accomplishing such a feat was extremely difficult—one could even say impossible.
In addition.
After the copying talent was upgraded, it had already condensed onto the Immortal Ancestor Talent. He could now easily copy other people’s Immortal Ancestor Talent, succeeding instantly, and he could also fuse similar Immortal Ancestor Talents together. As long as he had a large number of Immortal Ancestor Talents, he could fuse them into an even more powerful talent.
And the range covered by the copying talent had also increased dramatically, expanding by roughly ten times.
It had to be said that the current copying talent was indeed far stronger than before.
At the first moment.
Ye Tian condensed a new copied body, which was also equivalent to a true main body.
One main body remained in the Dark Forbidden Domain, namely the original main body, while one copied body entered the other side of the Source Sea and went into seclusion in a blessed land.
On the side of the Abyssless Land, he also condensed copied bodies, and all at once condensed two of them.
In this way, the Abyssless Land side effectively had three copied bodies. The three copied bodies entered various parts of the Abyssless Land to search for Void Beasts.
He had not looked for Void Beasts before because they were not very useful to him.
But now he could fuse Immortal Ancestor Talents, so naturally he had to look for Void Beasts and copy the Immortal Ancestor Talents on them.
As time passed, Ye Tian’s three copied bodies found quite a few Void Beasts in the Abyssless Land. Once they copied the Immortal Ancestor Talents on them, they would immediately leave and not fight them.
Ye Tian could not kill Void Beasts anyway, so there was no need to tangle with them; it was purely a waste of time.
Unfortunately, the number of Void Beasts in the Abyssless Land was not very large, so it was almost impossible for Ye Tian to use the talents on these Void Beasts to fuse into a higher-level talent.
However, at least this was a good beginning. In the future, if he found some more Void Beasts, wouldn’t he be able to fuse a higher-grade talent?
This day.
A being of the Immortal Realm arrived in the Abyssless Land. He came here for a very simple purpose: to deal with the Tier Three Void Beast on the black island. Without an Immortal Realm lord making a move, no one could shake that Tier Three Void Beast.
Therefore, he came.
In the void not far from the black island, one after another Lord of the Undying Realm arrived here. The reason they dared to come here again was naturally because they relied on that Immortal Realm lord.
“Lord Xu Jian, this is the place!”
A Lord of the Undying Realm said respectfully.
Lord Xu Jian was one of the Immortal Realm lords, and also the Immortal Realm being who had once gone to the Source Sea and taken the Eternal Knowledge Golden Sea Tree.
In the Endless Time Domain, many Immortal Realm lords no longer appeared very often, or rather, they were simply not in the same circle as other Eternal Realm and Half-Step Eternal Realm beings, and were hard to see in ordinary times.
But Lord Xu Jian was very active, and was considered one of the more easily seen Immortal Realm lords.
Logically speaking, Immortal Realm lords would not care about the resources in the Abyssless Land, but Lord Xu Jian did. He wanted everything, because he wanted to cultivate many concubines, so even resources that were of no use to the Immortal Realm, he would collect them.
Besides, the Abyssless Land posed little danger to him, which was why he came here to harvest a wave of resources.
Whoosh!
Lord Xu Jian took one step and arrived on the black island.
Immediately, that Tier Three Void Beast made a move.
Boom!!!!
The Tier Three Void Beast charged toward Lord Xu Jian, with Void Rules protecting its entire body and making its body become illusory. Its hands turned into one black wheel after another, suppressing toward Lord Xu Jian.
This was the true move of the Tier Three Void Beast, going all out against Lord Xu Jian alone.
If it were another Lord of the Undying Realm who came here, facing a Tier Three Void Beast alone, they would probably be blasted to death very quickly.
“Slash!”
Lord Xu Jian condensed his own eternal will together with the innate Xu Jian Eternal Rule, merging it into his sword, and with one strike he pierced through the Tier Three Void Beast’s body.........
But that sword seemed to stab into nothingness, yet it still caused some injuries to the Tier Three Void Beast.
However, the Tier Three Void Beast healed very quickly.
Rumble rumble rumble!!!!
Lord Xu Jian and the Tier Three Void Beast fought continuously. Though it seemed that Lord Xu Jian held the advantage, in reality it was very difficult to kill the Tier Three Void Beast.
Suddenly.
Lord Xu Jian created an eternal domain rule world, trapping the Tier Three Void Beast and fighting it continuously.
At this time, the Undying Realm beings under Lord Xu Jian immediately poured onto the black island and began collecting the many resources there.
That was Lord Xu Jian’s real plan.
He never intended to kill this Tier Three Void Beast, because he had no confidence in doing so. What he valued was only the resources here.
Very soon, all the resources on this black island were collected clean, and even some mineral veins were dug up from the roots.
“Leave!”
Lord Xu Jian urged his subordinates of the Eternal Realm to depart.
Swish, swish, swish!!!
One by one, the Lord of the Eternal Realm left in succession, so as not to be affected by the pursuit of the Tier Three Void Beast.
The Tier Three Void Beast had a very strong sense of belonging to its territory. Seeing its territory destroyed so completely, it went completely mad and lost even its last bit of rationality.
Even so, it still was no match for Lord Xu Jian. It was completely suppressed by Lord Xu Jian. If not for its virtualization talent being too terrifying, it would already have been heavily injured.
But after fighting for a while, Lord Xu Jian also did not want to continue fighting.
Thus, Lord Xu Jian turned into a streak of sword light, tore through time and space, and fled. In an instant, he broke free of the Tier Three Void Beast’s sensing range.
Boom!!!!
The Tier Three Void Beast left this island and began its revenge. Whenever it encountered an Eternal Realm or Half-Step Eternal Realm being, it would begin killing them.
After Ye Tian got the news, he prepared to leave.
Not only Ye Tian, but other Half-Step Eternal Realm or Eternal Realm beings were also preparing to leave.
But when Ye Tian left the Abyssless Land and had only just come out not long ago, the void area in the distance began to ripple.
Next, he saw an astonishing scene.

Chapter 1665: The Legendary Lord and the Fifth-Stage Void Beast!

Chapter 1665: The Legendary Lord and the Fifth-Stage Void Beast!

One Void Beast after another emerged from the depths of the Void Region, and there were many of them, causing all the Eternal Realm and Half-Step Eternal Realm experts to be terrified.
“Not good, run!”
One Eternal Realm expert after another fled at the fastest speed possible.
Ye Tian also did not dare linger here. After all, he had not yet fused those Immortal Ancestral Talents; if these three replicated bodies were to fall, then this replication would be wasted.
At this time, the Void Sword Lord, who was in the Abyssless Land, also sensed trouble. He immediately tore through the Abyssless Land and came out from it.
But just as he came out, he was immediately locked onto by the Void Beasts.
Boom!!!!!!
A humanoid Void Beast, far larger than the others, shattered the void and appeared beside the Void Sword Lord, throwing a punch at him.
The Void Sword Lord was sent flying with one punch, his body cracked, and the Eternal Origin Weapon armor on him was shattered as well.
“Fourth-Stage Void Beast!”
The Void Sword Lord’s expression changed drastically.
A Fourth-Stage Void Beast was far more powerful than a Third-Stage Void Beast, comparable to an old-fashioned Immortal Realm lord.
Although the Void Sword Lord was powerful, among the Immortal Realm he was not very strong; he was only an ordinary Immortal Realm lord, and he really was no match for a Fourth-Stage Void Beast.
More importantly, he could not injure a Fourth-Stage Void Beast, whereas a Fourth-Stage Void Beast could injure him.
He did not know whether there was only one Fourth-Stage Void Beast. Even if there was only one, if it cooperated with many Third-Stage Void Beasts, it would still have a chance of killing him.
As an Eternal Realm existence of the Immortal Realm, he did not want to fall here.
“Damn it, how can so many Void Beasts appear here? This place is not too far from the Source Sea, and it has not gone too deep into the Void Region. Normally, Void Beasts would not come here in large numbers!”
The Void Sword Lord thought inwardly.
He did not have time to consider why the Void Beasts had appeared; he had to shake off this Fourth-Stage Void Beast, or he would truly be in danger.
Suddenly.
The Void Sword Lord split into countless sword lights, piercing through space-time as he fled. Each sword light was a portion of his power; as long as even one sword light escaped, he could recover in a short time. This was also one of his life-saving methods.
The Fourth-Stage Void Beast tried to intercept the Void Sword Lord, but only managed to intercept a small portion of the sword lights.
Just then, three more Fourth-Stage Void Beasts appeared, all striking across space at the Void Sword Lord.
Instantly, part of the Void Sword Lord’s sword lights were shattered.
In the distance, the Void Sword Lord’s many sword lights gathered again.
But at this moment, his face was extremely pale, clearly seriously injured.
“Four Fourth-Stage Void Beasts, what are the Void Beasts trying to do?”
The Void Sword Lord did not dare delay and fled at the fastest speed.
And those four Fourth-Stage Void Beasts already possessed a very high level of intelligence. They simply did not pursue the other Eternal Realm and Half-Step Eternal Realm experts. To them, those were merely ants, not worth the effort of chasing. Killing the Void Sword Lord, however, was worthwhile.
Suddenly.
Another terrifying aura swept over, making even the Void Sword Lord shiver all over.
“Fif... Fifth-Stage Void Beast!!!!”
The Void Sword Lord sensed the aura of death.
He was also an Immortal Realm lord without a clone. His Void Sword Eternal Path was incomparably overbearing, which was why he had not been able to condense a clone until now. Thus, he was currently in his true body; if the true body fell, then he would truly be dead.
“I only came to gather some resources for my newly promoted concubine, so how did I end up in a life-and-death crisis!”
The Void Sword Lord regretted it immensely.
He had absolutely no intention of fighting a Fifth-Stage Void Beast. Even several million Eternal Years ago, only one Fifth-Stage Void Beast had appeared, and after being heavily injured, it fled the Spacetime Territory and entered the depths of the Void Region.
How rare Fifth-Stage Void Beasts were, and yet one had actually appeared here.
An Immortal Realm lord simply could not contend against a Fifth-Stage Void Beast. In the Endless Spacetime Territory, only a Legendary Lord above the Immortal Realm lord could truly contend with a Fifth-Stage Void Beast.
And within the Endless Spacetime Territory, there were a total of six Legendary Lords; they were also the six chairmen of the Lord Alliance, and almost never dealt with matters.
This time, a Fifth-Stage Void Beast had appeared. The Void Sword Lord knew he could not withstand it, and could only hope that one of the six chairmen would come. Otherwise, he feared he would not be able to escape.
“I sent out a distress signal long ago. I hope the Lord Alliance can come to provide support in time!”
The Void Sword Lord thought inwardly.
The speed of the Fifth-Stage Void Beast was too fast; in an instant, it caught up to the Void Sword Lord.
Its palm, covered in black fur, came down in a slap. The Void Sword Lord did everything he could to block this strike, and also activated some life-saving items. Only then did he barely withstand the blow, but he was still badly injured.
Just then, the Void Sword Lord used one of his trump cards.
He took out a small black sword. After activating this black sword, his aura weakened, but the small sword released boundless sword light, and each strand of sword light was comparable to the full-force strike of a peak Undying Realm expert.
The endless sword light was so terrifying that it erased this stretch of the Void Region.
However, the Fifth-Stage Void Beast turned into void. It seemed to be there, yet it did not exist on the levels of void, law, or will, as if it truly did not exist at all, leaving no trace in heaven and earth.
Thus, the Void Sword Lord’s trump card failed to injure the Fifth-Stage Void Beast at all.
“It didn’t even injure it!”
The Void Sword Lord was shocked.
He had never fought a Fifth-Stage Void Beast, so he simply did not understand its strength.
He had thought his trump card would be enough to injure a top-tier Immortal Realm lord, perhaps even injure a Fifth-Stage Void Beast, or at least buy him some time. He had not expected it to be completely futile.
Buzz!!!!
Space-time solidified, the Void Region fell still, and all particles began to shatter.
The Void Sword Lord felt his entire body’s particles annihilating bit by bit, while all his power was being sealed, unable to move even slightly. Even his Third-Stage Eternal Will began to collapse, cave in, and annihilate.
“The void law domain of a Fifth-Stage Void Beast, a force that can turn everything into void!”
The Void Sword Lord was in despair.
He could not escape at all and could only wait for death.
Just as nearly ninety percent of his body had been annihilated, the void law domain of the Fifth-Stage Void Beast was shattered, and a hand reached in, directly grabbed the Void Sword Lord, and took him away.
In the distance.
The Void Sword Lord reappeared, standing beside a young man.
“Many thanks, Lord Six Yang!”
The Void Sword Lord said respectfully.
Lord Six Yang was one of the six Legendary Lords of the Endless Spacetime Territory, and also one of the six great chairmen of the Lord Alliance.
Only after seeing Lord Six Yang did the Void Sword Lord finally breathe a sigh of relief.
His life was saved!

Chapter 1666: Legendary Ancestor Gift!

Chapter 1666: Legendary Ancestor Gift!

“Void Beasts, do you want to start a war?”
The Six Yang Lord stared coldly at the five-tier Void Beast and questioned it.
The five-tier Void Beast spoke, its voice echoing throughout this void region.
“So what if we do? You Eternal Realm beings have invaded the Abyssless Land. The Abyssless Land is one of our Void Beasts’ lairs. Invading the Abyssless Land is equivalent to declaring war on us Void Beasts.”
The five-tier Void Beast was full of momentum, as if it did not fear the Eternal Realm beings of the Time-Space Territory in the least, and as if it had also forgotten how it had once been driven into the depths of the void region.
“Looks like your Void Beasts are very confident in your strength this time, but just one five-tier Void Beast like you is still not enough to contend with our Lord Alliance,” the Six Yang Lord sneered.
“Then add a few more!”
Boom!!!!
One after another, five-tier Void Beasts appeared, and all around them, large numbers of Void Beasts surged forth as well.
“So many!”
Even the Six Yang Lord’s expression turned grave.
Back then, the Lord Alliance had driven the Void Beasts out of this region, allowing countless time-space territories to connect with one another and communicate freely.
Otherwise, with Void Beasts roaming the void region outside the time-space territories, even time-space passages would not be able to open, and they could be destroyed by Void Beasts at any moment.
And in that battle, there had not been too many Void Beasts, only one five-tier Void Beast.
Yet now, how could so many five-tier Void Beasts have appeared?
“Could it be that these are Void Beasts from the depths of the void region, and they have formed an alliance?”
the Six Yang Lord guessed.
If that was truly the case, then it would not be strange.
After all, no one knew exactly how many Void Beasts existed in the depths of the void region.
If the Void Beasts were divided into factions, then the Void Beasts outside the time-space territories before had belonged to one faction, while now it was multiple Void Beast factions joining forces to invade.
They had probably wanted to invade for a long time, but had never fixed on the timing. This Abyssless Land incident had directly prompted them to act.
“Since you want war, then come on!”
the Six Yang Lord said fearlessly.
This time, the Void Beasts had mobilized a total of seven five-tier Void Beasts, attempting to break through the Lord Alliance’s many time-space territories in one fell swoop.
Immediately, they made their move.
The Six Yang Lord fought while retreating, and the other Immortality Realm lords also withdrew rapidly.
Very soon, the Six Yang Lord was injured.
After all, facing seven by himself, he was naturally no match for them.
Just then, one of the six chairmen of the Lord Alliance, another legendary lord, the Aurora Lord, appeared.
Buzz!
A golden ray of light tore through the space-time of the void region and directly struck a five-tier Void Beast. Even though a five-tier Void Beast could make its body completely void and exist nowhere between heaven and earth.
But the Aurora Lord’s attack could distort the void to that extent, and thus it struck the five-tier Void Beast, sending it flying directly.
Even so, it still could not severely injure the five-tier Void Beast.
Back then, when the six legendary lords had joined forces to surround and attack one five-tier Void Beast, they still could not kill it, only heavily injure it, and even then it had escaped.
Time passed slowly. The battlefield line was drawn back to a stretch of void region closer to the time-space territories. Large numbers of Eternal Realm beings participated in the war under the Lord Alliance’s orders, and some Eight Extremes Realm beings were also forced to join in.
As for the weaker existences, there was no need for them to participate. Otherwise, once they entered the void region, they would not even be able to stay for long, and would not even be qualified to serve as cannon fodder.
As for this war, Ye Tian was the happiest, because he could replicate many Void Beasts’ Immortal Ancestor Gifts.
Thus, he frequently participated in the war. With his ability to preserve his life, his clone body had perished only once; all the other times, he returned safely and brought back a large number of Immortal Ancestor Gifts.
Ye Tian did not know when this war would end, so he had to replicate enough Immortal Ancestor Gifts before it would be easier to fuse them into a talent beyond Immortal Ancestor Gifts.
This day.
One of Ye Tian’s clone bodies began to fuse those replicated Immortal Ancestor Gifts. The first one to be fused was the voidification ancestor gift. This Immortal Ancestor Gift was extremely terrifying, absolutely Ye Tian’s strongest life-preserving talent at the moment.
Therefore, he naturally attached great importance to it.
As one voidification gift after another fused together, the power of this Immortal Ancestor Gift also became stronger and stronger.
But fusing Immortal Ancestor Gifts still took quite a long time. Even though he accelerated time, he still could not fuse these Immortal Ancestor Gifts to a higher level in a short period.
After a long time, huge changes had already taken place in the war, and the voidification gift that Ye Tian had fused finally underwent a qualitative change.
Boom!!!!
The voidification gift transformed, becoming a talent that surpassed Immortal Ancestor Gifts.
“Legendary Ancestor Gift!”
This was a talent beyond Immortal Ancestor Gifts, far stronger than Immortal Ancestor Gifts.
Ye Tian discovered that just by using the Legendary Ancestor Gift-level voidification gift, even the Immortal Lord realm lords found it very difficult to injure him.
If he created the corresponding Eternal Technique and developed the power of the voidification gift to the Extreme, then such an Eternal Technique would probably be enough to make him unafraid of the attacks of Immortal Realm lords even when facing Immortal Realm lords.
“Legendary Ancestor Gifts are too powerful!”
Ye Tian exclaimed.
Immediately after, he continued fusing other Immortal Ancestor Gifts.
For example, the strength Immortal Ancestor Gift, which every Void Beast possessed as well, and he had therefore replicated many of them too.
In the days that followed, Ye Tian fused out the Legendary Strength Ancestor Gift, the Legendary Defense Ancestor Gift, and the Legendary Speed Ancestor Gift in succession. The emergence of these Legendary Ancestor Gifts raised Ye Tian’s strength by quite a bit.
More importantly, his potential had risen dramatically.
Moreover, Legendary Ancestor Gifts gave him hope of creating a Legendary Eternal Technique.
Eternal Techniques were divided into ordinary Eternal Techniques, top-tier Eternal Techniques, and Legendary Eternal Techniques. It was said that only legendary lords had any hope of creating Legendary Eternal Techniques. If Ye Tian were to create a Legendary Eternal Technique, his strength would definitely increase greatly, and might even directly reach the second boundary barrier.
Of course, he would need a very long time to create it; it could not be created all at once.
This day.
A new change occurred in the war between the time-space territories and the Void Beasts. The upper echelon of the Lord Alliance held a meeting, preparing to heavily injure the Void Beasts in one stroke.
And the Eternal Realm beings participating in this meeting were at least Immortal Realm, with the highest being the six legendary lords.
Of course.
They did not attend in their true bodies, but participated in the meeting as mind projections, so it would not affect the battle.
Six Yang Lord.
Aurora Lord Army!
Holy Peak Lord!
Great Desolation Lord!
Dark Mist Lord!
Ice Veil Lord!
The six legendary lords and nearly a hundred Immortal Realm lords gathered here.
The meeting began!.
