Chapter 1667: The True Value of Void Beasts!

Chapter 1667: The True Value of Void Beasts!

The Holy Peak Lord spoke as the representative.
“This time, the Void Beast side has sent a large number of Void Beasts, but they are still within our control. With the strength of the Lord Alliance, it is still possible to defeat them. Moreover, by killing these Void Beasts, we can also obtain more Void Beast materials, enough to make up for the losses. Right now, we should discuss the encirclement plan and strive to kill a few fifth-stage Void Beasts.”
After the Holy Peak Lord finished, the Void Sword Lord asked, “Lord Holy Peak, fifth-stage Void Beasts have strength comparable to Legendary Lords, and their ability to preserve their lives is extremely strong. Do the six chairmen have a way to kill them?”
“Naturally, we do!”
The Holy Peak Lord was extremely confident.
Then, the Holy Peak Lord said again: “I know many of you Lords have been secretly studying Void Beasts, but your strength has not yet reached the level of Legendary Lords after all, so your research on Void Beasts is not very thorough. However, the six of us chairmen have discovered a tremendous use for Void Beasts, and we can announce it, even spread it throughout the entire Space-Time Territory. Once it is spread, I’m afraid many Eternal Realm experts who do not wish to join the battle will take action.”
Although the Lord Alliance had gathered most of the Eternal Realm experts in the Space-Time Territory, there were still some Eternal Realm experts who had not joined the Lord Alliance. Although they could not enjoy some of the powers and benefits of the Lord Alliance, those people did not care.
Therefore, this time the six chairmen had no way to force them.
But once the benefits of Void Beasts were made public, that would be enough to attract them.
In that way, the encirclement plan could be carried out much better, and many Void Beasts would have nowhere to escape.
At this moment, the Phoenix Lord urgently asked, “Lord Holy Peak, we only know that the core of a Void Beast helps us temper our will, and that the bones and fur of Void Beasts can be used to refine Void Sacred Soldiers. Void Sacred Soldiers can injure Void Beasts more effectively. What other uses are there?”
The other Lords were also curious, waiting for the Holy Peak Lord’s announcement.
The Holy Peak Lord no longer hid it and said, “Void Beasts are a very special species. They seem to be unable to use any Eternal Rule, but their attack power can easily shatter and melt innate Eternal Rules. Moreover, they also possess a kind of etherealization ability, and this ability is the highest level of application of the Void Eternal Rule. In addition, we discovered that Void Beasts definitely possess will, yet we cannot sense their will. Therefore, it is very likely that their innate will and bodies are perfectly fused, with every particle of their bodies being will. Because of this, our will-based attacks also have a very hard time hurting them. As for breaking through from the Immortal Realm to the Undying Realm, one needs the body and will to become compatible, and that means a perfect fusion. A slight fusion is only Half-Step Undying Realm; once the fusion exceeds ten percent, one can break through the boundary and enter the Undying Realm. If the fusion reaches one hundred percent, one can attempt to break through to the Legendary Lord realm. And we have found a way to improve the fusion of will and body. This is also the achievement you have all longed to study. And the medium for this research is the Void Beast. If we announce this achievement, do you think there will still be any Lord who would not go kill Void Beasts?”
The Phoenix Lord, Void Sword Lord, and the other Immortal Realm Lords were all shocked.
They had indeed studied it in secret, but there had been little success. The Phoenix Lord was the Immortal Realm Lord who had studied it the deepest, yet he still had not found a result. But the six chairmen had actually done so.
“Six chairmen, are you really willing to make it public?”
The Phoenix Lord was somewhat incredulous.
If he had discovered it himself, he would absolutely not tell anyone.
The Six Sun Lord said firmly, “Of course we are willing to make it public. Mainly because this secret is of little use to us, and once it is made public, it may even give birth to a seventh Legendary Lord. The more Legendary Lords there are, the safer our Space-Time Territory and Source Sea will be. From this Void Beast invasion, we can infer that deep within the Void Beast ranks there are probably more than seven fifth-stage Void Beasts. If a large number of fifth-stage Void Beasts invade, we won’t be able to stop them. That is why we are willing to make it public and enhance the strength of the Space-Time Territory. Otherwise, we would not be so selfless.”
“Many thanks to the six chairmen!”
Many Immortal Realm Lords thanked them.
In truth, for the six chairmen, whether there were one more chairman or several more chairmen did not have much of an impact on them. What they wanted was eternal stability, to control the Space-Time Territory for countless Eternal years without being threatened. That was what they hoped for.
But this time, the Void Beasts had somewhat threatened their stability, which was why they chose to reveal the true value of Void Beasts.
Of course.
They also needed a large number of Eternal Realm experts to tie down the other Void Beasts, so that they themselves could focus on dealing with the seven fifth-stage Void Beasts.
Very quickly.
The meeting ended, and nearly a hundred Immortal Realm Lords prepared to fully assist the six chairmen, helping them split the battlefield and, at critical moments, stop those Void Beasts from rescuing the seven fifth-stage Void Beasts.
Not long after, the value of Void Beasts for exploitation was also publicized by the six chairmen. A large number of Eternal Realm experts learned of this secret, and even the Eight Extremes Tower learned of it.
Since the Eight Extremes Tower knew, Ye Tian naturally learned of it immediately as well.
---------------------
“Void Beasts can actually enhance will, and they can also promote the fusion of will and body, allowing one to step into the Undying Realm!”
Ye Tian was shocked.
No wonder the Phoenix Lord wanted to study Void Beasts; their value was simply too high.
Moreover, this secret was announced by the six chairmen, who held the highest status in the Lord Alliance, so its credibility was naturally very high.
“I was just worrying about how hard it would be to improve my will in the future, yet Void Beasts can help me improve it. However, with my current strength, I still can’t kill a Void Beast!” Ye Tian thought.
Void Beasts have strength comparable to Eternal Realm Lords, and they are very hard to injure.
Suddenly.
Ye Tian thought of something: although the etherealization Unparalleled Ancestor Talent is very powerful, Void Beasts have not deeply studied the etherealization Unparalleled Ancestor Talent. They only use the etherealization ability by instinct and their own racial characteristics.
However, he possessed a legendary Ancestor Talent-level etherealization talent. Although it would be very difficult to create a Legendary Eternal Skill related to the etherealization talent, it was not difficult to create a normal Eternal Skill focused on attacking the Void talent.
Once he created such an Eternal Skill, he would be able to inflict some damage on Void Beasts. Then, combined with the many Eight Extremes experts from the Eight Extremes Tower, there would be some hope of besieging and killing a first-stage Void Beast.
“Create such an Eternal Skill as quickly as possible!”
Ye Tian began to accelerate time to comprehend and create it, and the Lord Alliance would not launch a true full-scale assault on the Void Beasts so soon, so there was still plenty of time left for Ye Tian.
Ye Tian’s etherealization talent level was too high, so creating a normal Eternal Skill was very fast.
Not long after, an Eternal Skill was created.
Ye Tian named this Eternal Skill Void-Piercing Secret Sword, meaning to pierce through the power of etherealization.
Once this Eternal Skill is used, it can form a nearly illusory small sword that can injure Void Beasts in their etherealized state.

Chapter 1668: The Eight Extremes Tower Joins Forces to Slay the Void Beast!

Chapter 1668: The Eight Extremes Tower Joins Forces to Slay the Void Beast!

Not long after, the Lord Alliance prepared to launch a general assault on the Void Beast.
Although the Lord Alliance did not force other strong cultivators to join the battle this time, many Eight Extremes Stage experts were prepared to take part.
Ye Tian immediately invited the other Eight Extremes Stage experts at the Eight Extremes Tower, and very soon many of them arrived.
“Infinite Ancestor, why have you invited us here?”
one Eight Extremes Stage expert asked.
Ye Tian went straight to the point: “Let’s join forces to kill the Void Beast!”
At this, another Eight Extremes Stage expert said, “The Void Beast is very hard to kill, and if we run into a Second-Tier Void Beast, we may be in danger of losing our lives. The other Eight Extremes Stage experts have all attached themselves to some Undying Realm lord, following behind those Undying Realm lords to hold back the Void Beasts, while the Undying Realm lords personally move in to kill the First-Tier Void Beasts. But even if we Eight Extremes Stage experts join forces, we still can’t kill a Void Beast!”
“I’m confident I can kill Void Beasts!”
Ye Tian said confidently.
“You?”
Many of the Eight Extremes Stage experts present did not believe it.
One of them said, “Infinite Ancestor, you haven’t even touched the barrier of the Second Boundary yet. You’ve only just become an Eight Extremes Stage expert. On what basis should we believe you have the strength to kill Void Beasts?”
“What if I have an Eternal art that can injure a Void Beast in its ethereal state, and the damage it causes isn’t low? Moreover, I can dispatch three clones. With your cooperation, if we find a lone Void Beast, then we’ll have a certain chance of killing a First-Tier Void Beast!”
Ye Tian said earnestly.
“Really?”
Some of the Eight Extremes Stage experts were tempted and asked urgently.
So Ye Tian displayed his Eternal art—Void Piercing Secret Sword.
When the illusory small sword was unleashed, it pierced through the void-time territory and entered the void region, even drilling through the void region itself.
Although Ye Tian did not attack a Void Beast directly, the Eight Extremes Stage experts present were all very experienced, and after a little deduction, they confirmed that this kind of attack was precisely an Eternal art developed specifically to target Void Beasts.
“Infinite Ancestor, you actually managed to create such an Eternal art!”
The other Eight Extremes Stage and half-step Eternal Realm experts were all shocked beyond words.
If they were the ones to create it, even after countless Eternal years they still wouldn’t be able to do so!
However, some Eight Extremes Stage experts did not have clones, and were therefore extremely cautious with their lives.
Even so, quite a few Eight Extremes Stage experts were willing to follow Ye Tian to kill Void Beasts, among them one Eight Extremes Stage expert who had touched the barrier of the Second Boundary—Ancestor Gu He.
Ancestor Gu He had quite good luck; he had not died in the Abyssless Land before, but he had suffered heavy injuries, and so after recuperating until now, he had recovered.
Originally, he had planned to try breaking through to the Eternal Realm, but this time he had heard about the situation with the Void Beasts.
Void Beasts could enhance one’s will, and could even help the will and the body merge. Although they were of greater help to the Undying Realm and Immortal Realm, if one’s will improved, the hope of breaking through would increase a little more.
Therefore, he also wanted to hunt Void Beasts.
But he alone could not kill any Void Beast, so he could only rely on Ye Tian.
In the end, about five hundred Eight Extremes Stage experts were willing to follow Ye Tian to hunt Void Beasts. After everyone was ready, they came to the battlefield in the void region.
……
The battlefield in the void region was very large, and Ye Tian and the others naturally would not go to the central battlefield; otherwise, if they encountered a Second-Tier Void Beast, it would be troublesome. If they encountered Third- or Fourth-Tier Void Beasts, even escaping would likely be a luxury.
Therefore, it was enough to linger at the edge.
Ye Tian’s three cloned bodies scattered out to search for traces of Void Beasts. Once one was found, he would notify the other Eight Extremes Stage experts.
Time slowly passed, and everyone was extremely cautious.
Suddenly.
Ye Tian discovered traces of a First-Tier Void Beast, and immediately notified the other Eight Extremes Stage and half-step Eternal Realm experts to come here. Meanwhile, he fought with this First-Tier Void Beast to prevent it from escaping, because tracking it down later would be troublesome.
Therefore, it had to be held back.
Ye Tian only restrained it and did not immediately use the Eternal art Void Piercing Secret Sword, in case the other side became wary and fled.
Very soon, the other Eight Extremes Stage experts from the Eight Extremes Tower arrived.
Boom!!!!!
One Eight Extremes Stage expert after another sealed off this stretch of void, and one great formation after another was set up, all to trap this Void Beast so that there would be hope of killing it.
This Void Beast sensed the crisis and instinctively released a distress signal. If there were other Void Beasts nearby, they would also instinctively come to support it.
This was one of the reasons Void Beasts were so hard to kill.
Whoosh!!!
Three Ye Tians appeared and began using Void Piercing Secret Sword to attack this Void Beast.
At the same time, the other idle Eight Extremes Stage experts also attacked with all their strength. Even if they could only inflict a little damage, the damage would be decent when stacked together.
· ·········求鮮花··· ·····
Pfft! Pfft! Pfft!!!!
Three Void Piercing Secret Swords struck the Void Beast, causing it some damage and making it scream miserably. Then the other Eight Extremes Stage attacks also landed on it, but the vast majority of the damage was offset by its void state.
Even so, the Void Beast’s injuries still deepened somewhat.
Thud! Thud! Thud!!!
This Void Beast kept slamming against the formations and the sealed void, trying to break free from here.
However, the many Eight Extremes Stage experts would not give it a chance to escape.
Not long after, three more Void Beasts came over.
“Three hundred Eight Extremes Stage experts, go intercept those Void Beasts!”
.... ......... 0
Ye Tian ordered.
Whoosh whoosh whoosh!!!!
Three hundred Eight Extremes Stage experts went to block them. They absolutely could not allow those three Void Beasts to reinforce this one.
Very soon, those three Void Beasts were also trapped and could not break Ye Tian’s formations here or interfere with Ye Tian.
After a little more time, this Void Beast, which had been attacked by Ye Tian, finally could not withstand the repeated assaults of the many Eight Extremes Stage experts. Its vitality dissipated, and it was completely blasted to death.
Immediately.
Ye Tian collected this Void Beast’s corpse and sent word to the other Eight Extremes Stage experts to withdraw at once. Otherwise, many more Void Beasts would soon arrive here, and if a Second-Tier Void Beast came, it would be a disaster.
Whoosh whoosh whoosh!!!!
The many Eight Extremes Stage experts withdrew quickly and soon disappeared.
Returning to an ownerless void-time territory, the many Eight Extremes Stage experts began to rest and recover, while also dividing up the Void Beast.
Ye Tian had contributed the most, so naturally he received the largest share of the Void Beast materials.
In no time at all, this Void Beast had been divided up completely.
“Everyone, let’s continue hunting Void Beasts!”
Ye Tian said.
In the days that followed, the Eight Extremes Stage experts of the Eight Extremes Tower, under Ye Tian’s leadership, hunted one Void Beast after another. However, there were also setbacks; they encountered a Second-Tier Void Beast and lost one Eight Extremes Stage expert, but that was nothing, and no one chose to withdraw.
On this day.
The six chairmen of the Lord Alliance had trapped seven Fifth-Tier Void Beasts, and the encirclement had reached the most critical moment.

Chapter 1669: The Fall of a Fifth-Tier Void Beast!

Chapter 1669: The Fall of a Fifth-Tier Void Beast!

The Void Region at the center of the battlefield.
Great arrays surrounded the seven fifth-tier Void Beasts. These arrays almost split this stretch of the Void Region from the Void Region outside, turning it into a battlefield between the six legendary lords and the seven fifth-tier Void Beasts.
At this moment, the seven fifth-tier Void Beasts were not the least bit panicked.
One of the fifth-tier Void Beasts sneered, “What use is it for the six of you legendary lords to set up these arrays? Could it be that you still want to surround and kill us? In terms of numbers, we outnumber you!”
“Are you sure your numbers are greater?”
Lord Six-Sun laughed.
The next moment.
A second Lord Six-Sun appeared.
It was a clone!
Then, the other five legendary lords also revealed their clones one after another. Among them, Lord Dark Mist actually had two clones, and Lord Iceflame actually had three clones.
In this way, there were suddenly fifteen legendary lords here.
Fifteen against seven, naturally the lord alliance held the advantage.
“Clones!”
The fifth-tier Void Beasts naturally knew about clones, but these six legendary lords had never displayed theirs, causing them to forget about them.
Lord Six-Sun sneered, “Back then, the six of us merely used clones to surround and attack a single fifth-tier Void Beast. We just didn’t expect that your fifth-tier Void Beasts would actually possess the ability to turn into Void Light. With billions upon billions of strands of Void Light escaping into the depths of the Void Region, we failed to intercept you in time, so we didn’t send out our true bodies. But now, these arrays were specifically created to restrain your escape method of turning into Void Light. You have no way to get away.”
The fifth-tier Void Beasts still did not panic.
“Hmph, so what? We don’t need to escape at all. It’s extremely difficult for your legendary lords to injure us, while we can injure you. Even if you have the numerical advantage, the final victory will still be ours.” The fifth-tier Void Beast said confidently.
“Is that so?”
Lord Sacred Peak took out an object, causing the fifth-tier Void Beasts’ expressions to change.
It was a blood-colored spear!
Yet the fifth-tier Void Beasts sensed the aura of a fifth-tier Void Beast from that blood-colored spear, and one of them was especially furious.
“Damn legendary lords, you actually refined the remnants I left behind back then into a Void Saint Weapon!!!!”
The fifth-tier Void Beast roared in fury.
Whoosh whoosh whoosh!!!
The other legendary lords also took out their own Void Saint Weapons, all of which had been refined using the remnants of fifth-tier Void Beasts.
Such Void Saint Weapons could be called legendary Void Saint Weapons, and they could inflict a certain degree of damage on fifth-tier Void Beasts.
However, these were not the trump cards they relied on to kill the fifth-tier Void Beasts. Merely relying on these, at most they could gain the upper hand and heavily injure these seven Void Beasts. As for killing them, it would probably require an incomparably long period of time.
Suddenly.
Lord Sacred Peak threw out a seed.
This seed was their true trump card.
As the seed fell, it transformed into a tree, and this tree kept growing larger, affecting the surrounding Void Region.
The Void Region was covered by vast amounts of land, flowers, grass, trees, and mountain ranges, and it spread at a terrifying speed.
Almost in the blink of an eye, this stretch of the Void Region actually gave birth to a temporal-spatial land. It was not some fake temporal-spatial land, but a real one, containing all kinds of innate eternal laws.
“Void Beasts have a clear weakness: they are suited to the environment of the Void Region. The Void Region doesn’t have many laws. If we must name one, it would be the Void law. The Void law is difficult to sense, and we do not include it among the eternal laws; it belongs to your Void Beasts’ laws. Once your Void Beasts enter a world with a large number of eternal laws, your strength will be suppressed, and even your ethereal state will be weakened somewhat.”
“Now, we have created this temporal-spatial land, which is equivalent to weakening your strength, even weakening it several times over.”
After Lord Sacred Peak finished speaking, all seven fifth-tier Void Beasts panicked.
The environment of the Void Region was suitable for them to fight in, but now the world had changed, and their strength was greatly weakened.
Although they could destroy this temporal-spatial land, it would take some time, and these legendary lords would not give them that time.
“Kill!”
The six legendary lords controlled their clones and true bodies, each holding a legendary Void Saint Weapon, and charged toward the seven fifth-tier Void Beasts.
The seven fifth-tier Void Beasts sensed a fatal crisis and, regardless of the cost, tried to tear a path out of here and escape.
An astonishing battle began!!!
……
Outside the arrays.
A large number of Immortal Realm lords formed layers of protective circles here, blocking other Void Beasts from rescuing the seven fifth-tier Void Beasts and buying time for the six great chairmen.
And all of this had little to do with Ye Tian. He was currently still unable to participate in such a battle.
He could only lead the Eight Extremes Building’s Eight Extremes Realm experts in killing more first-tier Void Beasts, nothing more.
Year after year passed, and the battle between the temporal-spatial land and the Void Beasts gradually drew to a close.
This day.
On the battlefield where the lord alliance’s legendary lords were suppressing the seven fifth-tier Void Beasts, those arrays and the temporal-spatial land that had been created were still torn apart by the seven fifth-tier Void Beasts, but the fifth-tier Void Beasts were in a miserable state.
Two fifth-tier Void Beasts were killed, and the other fifth-tier Void Beasts were all heavily injured.
The moment they escaped, the five surviving fifth-tier Void Beasts immediately used the Void Light ability. Their bodies transformed into billions upon billions of strands of Void Light, ignoring the obstacles of the Void Region, merging into the Void law, and fleeing into the depths of the Void Region at a speed that surpassed everything.
Even the legendary lords had no way to stop them, but they could still try their best to intercept them and leave behind more remnants of the fifth-tier Void Beasts.
After the fifth-tier Void Beasts fled, the legendary lords began to target the third- and fourth-tier Void Beasts.
Lord Six-Sun reached into the Void Region, grabbed a fourth-tier Void Beast, and killed it in a very short time.
As the six legendary lords took action, the third- and fourth-tier Void Beasts fell one after another, with escape being nothing more than a luxury.
Meanwhile, the other Undying Realm lords and Immortal Realm lords began hunting the first-tier Void Beasts, which would end the battle more quickly and also yield greater gains.
More time passed, and the Void Beasts were almost completely wiped out, with only a small number escaping back into the depths of the Void Region.
The legendary lords also did not dare pursue into the depths of the Void Region, so this war ended just like that. The surviving Eternal Realm experts all gained a great deal, and the Eight Extremes Building’s harvest was also considerable.
At the very least, for them, obtaining some Void Beast materials was already a huge gain.
Since they could no longer find first-tier Void Beasts, Ye Tian’s temporary team disbanded.
Afterwards, Ye Tian began sorting through his gains.
The accumulated Void Beast materials were roughly equivalent to the materials from three complete Void Beasts. If he had acted alone, he wouldn’t even have been able to kill one Void Beast, let alone three.
It could be said that this harvest was enormous.
“It’s time to use the Void Beast materials to improve my strength!”
Ye Tian murmured.

Chapter 1670: Breaking Through the Second Boundary Barrier!

Chapter 1670: Breaking Through the Second Boundary Barrier!

The materials of the Void Beast could enhance willpower, could also be used to refine Void Saint Weapons, and could even merge willpower and the body. However, he was still only at the half-step Eternal Realm, so the fusion of willpower and body was still very far away from him.
Refining Void Saint Weapons was not very helpful to him either, so he only wanted to use the Void Beast materials to enhance his willpower.
Among the secrets revealed by the six great chairmen, there was naturally a specific method for tempering and increasing willpower. First, one needed to extract Void Essence from the Void Beast materials, then merge willpower into the Void Essence. The power within the Void Essence would then merge into the willpower, effectively tempering and enhancing it.
Then.
Ye Tian began refining the Void Beast materials, extracting drop after drop of Void Essence.
Then his true body used the Void Essence to temper and enhance his own willpower. As time passed, his willpower grew stronger and stronger, and the world of will was perfected time and again by him, so the number of condensed worlds of will naturally kept increasing.
Unknowingly, he had already condensed 9,000 worlds of will, and there was still plenty of Void Essence left.
At this rate, he had hope of condensing 10,000 worlds of will, thereby allowing his Eternal Will to undergo a transformation to the third stage.
9,191 worlds of will!
9,200 worlds of will!
9,300 worlds of will!
……
In the blink of an eye, several Eternal Years passed. After countless attempts, after his countless cloned bodies shattered, and after step by step perfecting the secret art of the world of will, Ye Tian finally succeeded in condensing 9,999 worlds of will.
At this moment, he only needed one more world of will to condense, and his Eternal Will would transform, reaching the third stage.
After more attempts, the 10,000th world of will was finally opened up by Ye Tian.
Boom!!!!!
The ten thousand worlds of will within his body interconnected, triggering a tremendous qualitative change.
His will was transforming, rising, allowing Ye Tian’s will to undergo a huge leap and transformation.
A long while later, the transformation was complete.
By now, Ye Tian’s will was more than ten times stronger than before, and his control over his body far surpassed what it had been before, enough to unleash strength far beyond his previous level.
In the dark, Ye Tian had already touched the second boundary barrier.
But if he truly fought, he would definitely be able to defeat Lord Gu He, because his will had reached the third stage, and his will attacks were enough to make a ninth extreme realm being like Lord Gu He unable to fully display his strength at all.
After touching the second boundary barrier, Ye Tian’s goal was to break through to the Nine Extreme Realm.
At present, his half-step Eternal power could still continue to be compressed, and if he created a Legendary Eternal Technique, his strength would surge again, so there was a great possibility of breaking through the second boundary barrier.
By now, he had already traded for many Eternal compression secret techniques from other eighth extreme realm beings. With his innate comprehension and repeated experiments, he had already perfected the stacking secret technique to the limit of being able to compress up to eighty times.
Of course, this was the theoretical limit, not something that could truly be achieved.
But Ye Tian still had a great chance of compressing his half-step Eternal power to forty times. With the Legendary Eternal Technique as support, he did not believe he would be unable to break the second boundary barrier.
In the years that followed, Ye Tian compressed his half-step Eternal power while also creating a Legendary Eternal Technique.
The first Legendary Eternal Technique he wanted to create was naturally related to the Voidification legendary ancestral gift, so that it would greatly enhance his ability to preserve his life.
Since only in the Source Sea was there hope of breaking through to the Nine Extreme Realm, Ye Tian left only one cloned body in the Eight Extreme Tower of the Time-Space Territory, while all the other cloned bodies were in the Dark Forbidden Zone of the Source Sea, helping his true body raise its strength together.
One Eternal Year after another passed, and Ye Tian’s half-step Eternal power grew more and more condensed through compression.
Moreover, on this day, Ye Tian’s Legendary Eternal Technique was finally created.
This time, the Legendary Eternal Technique Ye Tian created was called Void True Body. Once activated, the body would enter a state of voidification, and it would be even more thoroughly voidified than an ordinary Void Beast, as if it did not exist within the rules and had completely turned into void.
It could be said that once Void True Body was used, even a Immortal Realm lord would not be able to harm him in the slightest.
However, an Undying Realm lord could still injure him, though killing him would be somewhat difficult, unless one of the most top-tier Undying Realm lords made a move.
After creating Void True Body, Ye Tian clearly felt the second boundary barrier tremble a little, but in the end, it still did not break.
Clearly, he needed to continue increasing his strength.
Thus, Ye Tian began creating a Legendary Eternal Technique related to the power legendary ancestral gift.
After ten Eternal Years, Ye Tian finally created his second Legendary Eternal Technique—Eternal Supreme Fist!
This was an Eternal Technique that brought the power to its extreme, ranked among the Legendary Eternal Techniques, and could fully unleash Ye Tian’s strength.
Compared with Void True Body, Eternal Supreme Fist was the one that could greatly increase his strength.
After he created Eternal Supreme Fist, cracks appeared in the second boundary barrier, as if increasing his strength a bit more would allow him to completely break this boundary barrier.
“Breaking the second boundary barrier is indeed too difficult. I’ve already raised my Eternal Will to the third stage and created two Legendary Eternal Techniques, yet I still haven’t broken the second boundary barrier. No wonder so many eighth extreme realm beings have no way to break it.”
Ye Tian muttered to himself.
There was no choice; he could only continue creating Legendary Eternal Techniques.
This time, he planned to create a defensive Legendary Eternal Technique. Combined with Void True Body, his ability to preserve his life would become even stronger, and naturally his combat power would also become stronger.
About ten more Eternal Years later, a defensive Legendary Eternal Technique was finally created by Ye Tian, and he named it Eternal Wall!
Eternal Wall was equivalent to forming an invisible defensive barrier all around. It could not be seen by the naked eye, but its defensive power was unbelievably terrifying. It could not only defend against ordinary attacks, but even will attacks could be blocked.
After this Legendary Eternal Technique, Eternal Wall, was created, the cracks in the second boundary barrier became more and more numerous.
“I won’t create any more Legendary Eternal Techniques for now. First, I’ll compress my half-step Eternal power to 40 times, then create a speed-type Legendary Eternal Technique. There’s definitely hope of breaking the shackle in one go and advancing to the Nine Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realm!”
Ye Tian planned.
Just like that, in the Eternal Years that followed, he continuously worked to compress his half-step Eternal power, making it increasingly close to true Eternal power.
Ten Eternal Years!
Twenty Eternal Years!
Thirty Eternal Years!
Unknowingly, a hundred Eternal Years passed.
At this point, Ye Tian’s half-step Eternal power had finally been compressed to 40 times, and the second boundary barrier had nearly been completely shattered.

Chapter 1671 Breakthrough, Becoming a Nine Apex Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm..

Chapter 1671 Breakthrough, becoming a Nine Apex Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm!

“Next, I’ll create a speed-type legendary Eternal technique!”
Ye Tian was extremely excited in his heart.
He was very clear that once he created a speed-type legendary Eternal technique, he would definitely be able to shatter the Second Boundary Barrier and completely step into the level of Nine Apex Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm.
Before he knew it, another ten Eternal years had passed.
On this day.
The speed-type legendary Eternal technique was finally created by Ye Tian.
Ye Tian named this speed-type legendary Eternal technique Wujian, meaning that for him, distance had already lost all meaning, representing extreme speed.
With the Wujian Eternal technique created, Ye Tian’s strength increased quite a bit, and the Second Boundary Barrier that existed in the dark finally began to completely shatter.
Boom!!!!
With the Second Boundary Barrier shattered, a source void entirely composed of the origin of innate Eternal rules appeared in Ye Tian’s perception.
At this moment.
Ye Tian’s will transformed into a giant sitting in this source void, comprehending this endless origin of innate Eternal rules at all times, and in this place of comprehension, it seemed that everything was very easy to understand thoroughly.
The origin of all dao was crystal clear, and any doubts Ye Tian had could be answered here.
Yet in the Time-Space Territory, he had not sensed the source void formed by the origin of innate Eternal rules.
At this moment, Ye Tian understood why one could not break through to the Nine Apex Realm in the Time-Space Territory; thus, one could not comprehend the source void of the origin of innate Eternal rules in the Time-Space Territory, and only in the Source Sea could one comprehend it.
This place seemed to have no time limit, and Ye Tian did not know how long he had comprehended it.
Only at some point did he emerge from the source void.
At this moment.
He had already comprehended the innate Eternal rules to the true Extreme, far beyond comparison with the Eight Apex Realm, and he could fuse the innate origin rules at any time, thereby advancing to the Eternal Realm.
But like the Nine Apex Realm expert in the Eight Apex Tower, he did not go on to assault the Eternal Realm.
“So the Nine Apex Realm can already allow the body and will to merge, similar to how the Immortal Realm assaults the Immortal Realm.”
Ye Tian was somewhat surprised by this.
Once the fusion of will and body exceeds ten percent, an Immortal Realm expert can break through to become an Immortal Realm expert, and the Nine Apex Realm is the same. If, at the Nine Apex Realm, one merges will and body to more than ten percent, then after breaking through to the Eternal Realm, one becomes an Immortal Realm directly.
Moreover, the physical body of the Nine Apex Realm is far weaker than that of the Immortal Realm, and the body has not yet fully merged with the innate Eternal rules, making it easier to fuse with will.
Therefore, fusing will at the Nine Apex Realm is relatively easy.
This is also why the Nine Apex Realm is not in a hurry to break through. If one breaks through prematurely, even if one becomes a Half-Step Immortal Realm expert, it would still take a very long time to become a true Immortal Realm expert. That would be a foolish thing to do.
And after becoming a Nine Apex Realm expert, the strength does not undergo a qualitative change, but once one becomes a Nine Apex Realm expert, there will be a huge period of improvement in strength.
However, after that improvement period passes, it becomes very difficult for strength to improve, and one can only walk the path of fusing will; will fusion also increases strength.
Thus, a truly grown Nine Apex Realm expert will be many times stronger than an Eight Apex Realm expert, but a freshly broken-through Nine Apex Realm expert will not be that powerful.
After breaking through to the Nine Apex Realm, Ye Tian’s will improved considerably, and he could continue cultivating the will world, opening up one will world after another.
Moreover, his body could continue to grow, and his Half-Step Eternal power could also continue to be compressed, and it was still very easy to compress.
As time slowly passed, Ye Tian’s Half-Step Eternal power had already been easily compressed to 80 times, and it could still be compressed further. The layered secret technique was already of little use to Ye Tian, but relying on his grasp of the innate Eternal rules, compressing Half-Step Eternal power was too simple for him.
Not only that, Ye Tian’s body had also become much stronger than when he had just broken through, but this had also consumed nearly all of his resources.
Afterward, Ye Tian created one legendary Eternal technique after another, making his strength even more powerful.
In the blink of an eye, a thousand Eternal years passed.
Such a long period of time had completely carried Ye Tian through the improvement period.
And at this moment, Ye Tian had already opened up thirty thousand will worlds, and his third-tier Eternal will was probably even a bit stronger than that of many Immortal Realm lords.
In addition.
Ye Tian also began merging his will, but fusing will was indeed very difficult; at present, only one ten-thousandth of his body had fused with his will, and there was still a long way to go before reaching more than ten percent fusion.
Of course, there was also a shortcut to will fusion, and that was the Void Beast.
Materials from Void Beasts could fuse with will, but he had previously used Void Beast materials to enhance his will, which was also in order to raise his Eternal will to third tier, so it did not count as waste.
At present, he still had a little of those Void Beast materials left, but their effect was not very great.
To fuse the body and will to more than ten percent, a large amount of Void Beast material was required.
However, everyone in the Time-Space Territory knew how precious Void Beast materials were, and no one was willing to trade them, unless it was the six legendary lords. They did not have much need for Void Beast materials, but they also would not take them out to sell; giving them to their own family or loyal subordinates was also a good choice!
“．‖Perhaps I can ask that Nine Apex Realm expert from the Eight Apex Tower for guidance—Star-Observing Sword Ancestor!”
Star-Observing Sword Ancestor was in the depths of the Eight Apex Tower, but normally no one would disturb him.
Last time, Star-Observing Sword Ancestor also took part in the hunt for Void Beasts, but not together with Ye Tian and the others. After all, as a Nine Apex Realm existence, Star-Observing Sword Ancestor had the qualification to join forces with some Immortal Realm lords to encircle and kill Void Beasts.
It could be said that Star-Observing Sword Ancestor’s circle had already reached the Immortal Realm and even the Immortal Realm, and he would not have too much interaction with those Eight Apex Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm experts in the Eight Apex Tower.
On this day.
Ye Tian’s clone entered the Eight Apex Tower and immediately announced that he had stepped into the Nine Apex Realm.
This news quickly exploded throughout the entire Eight Apex Tower, shocking the other Eight Apex Realm experts one after another.
True Yang Saint Ancestor arrived first and exclaimed in shock: “Boundless Ancestor, you... you actually broke through to the Nine Apex Realm!!!!”
The other Eight Apex Realm experts arrived one after another, sensing the Nine Apex Realm aura on Ye Tian’s body and knowing that Ye Tian had not lied.
It had only been a little over a thousand Eternal years since they last met, and Ye Tian had actually broken through the Second Boundary Barrier. Wasn’t this breakthrough speed too fast?
“Lord Gu He luckily broke through to the Immortal Realm, and Boundless Ancestor broke through to become a Nine Apex Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm expert. In these more than a thousand Eternal years, two major events have happened in our Eight Apex Tower!”
An Eight Apex Realm expert said with emotion, his tone full of envy.
Whether it was becoming an Eternal Realm expert or becoming a Nine Apex Realm expert, these were the goals they had pursued all their lives!
Just then, a figure filled with endless sword dao rules walked out from the depths of the Eight Apex Tower.
“Greetings, Star-Observing Sword Ancestor!”
The other Eight Apex Realm experts greeted him one after another.
“Congratulations, Boundless Ancestor!”
Star-Observing Sword Ancestor congratulated him.
Afterward.
Ye Tian and Star-Observing Sword Ancestor entered a void deep within the Eight Apex Tower, and the two sat down and chatted.

Chapter 1672: The True Void Legend Tower!

Chapter 1672: The True Void Legend Tower!【Please subscribe in full】

After Ye Tian and Star-Observing Sword Ancestor sat down, Ye Tian began exchanging dao insights with Star-Observing Sword Ancestor, which was beneficial to both sides.
Very soon.
Both sides gained something from the exchange. For example, in Ye Tian’s research on will, Star-Observing Sword Ancestor was not as strong. After all, Ye Tian had carried out countless experiments using his replicated bodies, thereby cultivating the secret art known as the Will World, so he naturally had unimaginable comprehension of will.
In addition, Ye Tian’s comprehension of Eternal Skills was also far beyond what Star-Observing Sword Ancestor could compare with.
However, Star-Observing Sword Ancestor surpassed Ye Tian in compressing half-step eternal power and in the development of the Eternal Body, which benefited Ye Tian greatly.
“Star-Observing Sword Ancestor, I have now passed the enhancement period of the Nine Extremes Stage. At present, I want to improve the fusion of will and body, but it is very difficult to improve. Apart from using Void Beast materials, are there any other ways to increase the degree of fusion?” Ye Tian asked sincerely.
“Of course there are!” Star-Observing Sword Ancestor said. “In fact, I also didn’t know before that Void Beast materials could help the body and will fuse. In the past, there were roughly two ways to speed up the fusion of body and will. The first was to use some rare resources to accelerate the fusion of will and body, but such resources were too rare, and once they appeared, those Immortal Realm lords would take action to seize them. The second way was to challenge the True Void Legend Tower!”
“True Void Legend Tower?”
This was the first time Ye Tian had heard of such a place, so he was somewhat puzzled.
Then Star-Observing Sword Ancestor said, “The True Void Legend Tower is one of the most mysterious places in the Time-Space Territory. It is located within a relic and is only open to Eternal Realm cultivators above the Immortal Realm. However, Nine Extremes Stage cultivators are also qualified to enter, because Nine Extremes Stage cultivators can step into the Eternal Realm at any time, and their combat power is not weaker than that of ordinary Immortal Realm cultivators, so they are also allowed to enter the True Void Legend Tower. There are a total of ninety-nine floors in the True Void Legend Tower. Every time you clear one floor, you can obtain the chance to enter the True Void Legend Land to cultivate, and the True Void Legend Land has a mysterious sacred tree—the True Void Dao Mark Tree. The True Void Dao Mark Tree can rapidly fuse our will and body. If one were to cultivate beside the True Void Dao Mark Tree all the time, there would even be hope of stepping into the Legendary Lord realm. Unfortunately, the time we can cultivate there is too short. Right now, I have only cleared the ninth floor and obtained dozens of Tribulation Eras of comprehension time.”
“The True Void Legend Tower is actually this mysterious!”
Ye Tian was quite surprised, and at the same time a little eager, wanting to go in and take a look.
Without Void Beast materials, the True Void Legend Tower was now the treasure land where he could rapidly promote the fusion of body and will.
The relic housing the True Void Legend Tower was sealed off layer by layer by the Lord Alliance. It was said that the true bodies of the six legendary chairmen usually cultivated in that relic.
Therefore, no lord dared to forcibly break into the relic privately; otherwise, it would be courting death.
Ye Tian also did not need any credential. With his Nine Extremes Stage cultivation, he could just go over directly and would not be stopped.
And the location of that relic had also been shared with Ye Tian by Star-Observing Sword Ancestor.
Not long after, Ye Tian left the Eight Extremes Tower and went directly to the relic where the True Void Legend Tower was located.
-
“Formation!”
Ye Tian sensed an incomparably huge formation in the Void Region; this formation directly enveloped this area.
Clearly, this was a great formation set up by the Lord Alliance, meant to conceal this relic.
Ye Tian passed through this formation and sensed strands of will crossing the Void Region to probe this place, but these wills did not linger on him. If it had been an Eight Extremes Stage cultivator, it would probably have triggered the suppression of these wills.
Very soon, Ye Tian arrived at the relic’s location.
“So this is the relic!”
Ye Tian saw a shattered Void Region. The key point was that this area was so badly shattered, yet the Void Region’s restoration ability was unable to restore it?
One must know that even when a Legendary Lord fought a fifth-tier Void Beast and shattered the Void Region to an extreme degree, the Void Region could still be restored to its original state in a short time.
But this could not be restored. Just from this alone, one could tell that this relic was too mysterious.
Within the shattered Void Region, countless building fragments drifted about, but there were still quite a few intact buildings.
And in the most central area, an ancient tower stood there.
If Ye Tian had not guessed wrong, that tower was the True Void Legend Tower.
He walked into the relic, and a terrifying force acted on him, as if it wanted to crush his body.
Ye Tian resisted with all his might before he finally held it back.
“I finally understand why only Nine Extremes Stage and Eternal Realm cultivators above the Immortal Realm are allowed to enter here!”
Ye Tian suddenly understood.
If an Eight Extremes Stage or Immortal Stage cultivator dared to come here, they simply would not be able to withstand the suppression here. And the opportunities in this relic were indeed too precious; if there were no restrictions, many Immortal Stage lords or Eight Extremes Stage cultivators would probably risk entering here.
Therefore, the Lord Alliance had made such restrictions.
Moreover, Eight Extremes Stage and Immortal Stage cultivators entering the True Void Legend Tower would not be of much use, as they were not yet at the level where body and will could be fused, and with their strength, it would also be very difficult for them to clear many floors of the tower.
Ye Tian walked within this relic, as if the surrounding void were countless shattered mirrors, and his body traversed this shattered void, from time to time enduring impacts from the void fragments.
After a long while, he finally reached the True Void Legend Tower.
After entering here, the suppression on his body disappeared.
At the very least, the void inside the True Void Legend Tower was normal; otherwise, there would be no way to challenge the tower.
Whoosh!
Ye Tian entered the True Void Legend Tower and soon arrived at its first floor.
Buzz！！！！
Five Eternal Realm figures wearing black battle armor appeared in the True Void Legend Tower, and their cultivation was all at the level of ordinary Immortal Realm cultivators, yet they gave off a very unusual feeling.
Their coordination was perfect, but their strength was still far too far below Ye Tian’s.
Very quickly, Ye Tian defeated them.
After all, these Eternal Realm figures were not true Eternal Realm cultivators. Once their physical bodies were shattered, they could not recover. Otherwise, it would have taken Ye Tian a bit more effort to deal with them.
Second floor!
Third floor!
Fourth floor!
Ye Tian advanced all the way through, and only when he reached the seventh floor did he feel pressure.
The seventh floor still had only three Immortal Realm lords, but they had reached the peak of the Immortal Realm lord level, and they had also mastered will-attack methods. These were not ordinary will-attack methods, but will Eternal Skills!
This was an Eternal Skill Ye Tian had never seen before!.

Chapter 1673: Break Through the Ninth Layer!

Chapter 1673: Break Through the Ninth Layer!

Pfft!
A spear pierced toward Ye Tian, directly punching through the void. It even failed to withstand one of Ye Tian’s defensive Eternal arts; the spear stabbed straight into Ye Tian’s body. But at the critical moment, Ye Tian activated the legendary defensive Eternal art—Eternal Wall.
The spear’s attack struck the Eternal Wall, and only then was most of its force neutralized. Ye Tian then activated the legendary Eternal art in a phasing state—Void True Body, and only then did he remain unharmed.
“An Intent Eternal art, huh? This Eternal art contains a massive amount of willpower, along with some Eternal power and the power of the innate Eternal rules. After being combined, it gives birth to an Intent Eternal art focused mainly on willpower attacks!”
Ye Tian had heard of Intent Eternal arts before, but they belonged to the legends among Eternal arts. He had never heard of anyone creating one.
Although many Eternal realm cultivators had studied willpower deeply and developed quite a few willpower secret techniques, they were still only secret techniques, not Eternal arts, and their power could not compare with Eternal arts.
The threat posed by ordinary Intent Eternal arts had already surpassed that of ordinary top-notch Eternal arts, and were even second only to legendary Eternal arts. After all, the Eternal realm cultivators in the Space-Time Territory really had no especially good way to deal with Intent Eternal arts.
Pfft, pfft, pfft!!!!
Spears formed from Intent Eternal arts shot through toward Ye Tian one after another. Ye Tian kept blocking these Intent Eternal arts, while also using legendary Eternal arts such as Eternal Extreme Fist to counterattack.
Rumble!!!!
Ye Tian and the three Immortal realm lords fought fiercely. After spending quite some time, he finally defeated them one by one.
Afterwards.
Ye Tian arrived at the eighth layer.
The three Eternal realm lords on the eighth layer were not Immortal realm cultivators, but Undying realm cultivators, and they too had mastered means such as Intent Eternal arts.
This battle lasted for many years before Ye Tian finally defeated the three Undying realm lords, and he himself had also suffered considerable injuries.
At last, Ye Tian reached the ninth layer as well.
“Star Gazing Sword Ancestor only cleared the ninth layer. I’m afraid I won’t be able to get through the ninth layer!”
Ye Tian guessed.
As expected.
After fighting for only a short while, Ye Tian was completely suppressed by the three Eternal realm cultivators on the ninth layer. Even though his survival ability was formidable, his Endless Eternal Body had little effect in resisting willpower attacks.
When his injuries became quite severe, True Void Legend Tower judged him to have failed and teleported him out.
Thus, Ye Tian’s current record was the eighth layer of True Void Legend Tower.
For the first five layers of True Void Legend Tower, clearing each layer granted one calamity era of cultivation and comprehension time in True Void Legend Land. From the sixth layer to the tenth layer, clearing each layer granted five calamity eras of cultivation and comprehension time in Void Legend Land.
Now, having cleared the eighth layer, Ye Tian obtained 20 calamity eras of cultivation time.
Right after finishing the tower challenge, Ye Tian became very interested in this True Void Legend Land, so he asked True Void Legend Tower to teleport him there.
Buzz!!!!
Ye Tian’s body disappeared and instantly arrived in a mysterious void—True Void Legend Land.
……
“I’m in!”
Ye Tian entered True Void Legend Land, and the very first moment he did so, he felt how extraordinary it was.
This place was filled with a special kind of willpower energy, constantly urging his body and will to merge.
In the distance, a towering sacred tree stood there.
Ye Tian wanted to fly toward this sacred tree, but after flying for a long time, he still could not reach its location, and in fact he had not flown very far at all, as if there was something wrong with the distance in this void.
Suddenly.
A voice entered his ears.
“No need to try. No one can reach this True Void Dao Mark Tree. Back then, even six legendary lords tried. No matter how they flew, they could not get there. We even suspected whether this True Void Dao Mark Tree truly existed. But in any case, cultivating here really can accelerate the fusion of will and body.”
The one transmitting the message to Ye Tian was an Undying realm cultivator.
“Thank you for the reminder, sir!”
Ye Tian said gratefully.
The other party said nothing more and continued cultivating.
Thus, Ye Tian found a random spot and began secluded cultivation.
Compared with the other Eternal realm cultivators who had entered here, Ye Tian’s only advantage was that he could continuously use his clones to verify the fusion of will and body, so the fusion effect and speed were certainly much faster than those of the other Eternal realm cultivators.
In the days that followed, Ye Tian diligently studied the fusion of will and body, so that this opportunity would not be wasted.
Time slowly passed, and one calamity era after another went by.
In True Void Legend Land, there were not many Eternal realm cultivators. After all, many Eternal realm cultivators above the Undying realm had almost used up all their comprehension and cultivation time, and if they wanted to increase their strength and then clear another layer, the difficulty was far too great.
· ·········求鲜花··· ·····
Therefore, there were not many Eternal realm cultivators here normally. Unknowingly, several more Eternal realm cultivators left, leaving only three Eternal realm cultivators and Ye Tian, this Nine Extremes realm half-step Eternal realm cultivator, still here comprehending and cultivating.
Finally, the other Eternal realm cultivators all left, leaving only Ye Tian. It was not until several more calamity eras had passed that two more Eternal realm cultivators arrived.
“Time’s up!”
Ye Tian opened his eyes, and in the blink of an eye, True Void Legend Land teleported him out.
However, Ye Tian did not leave True Void Legend Tower. Instead, he prepared to continue challenging the tower.
Whoosh!
Ye Tian entered the ninth layer of True Void Legend Tower. This time, he was highly confident that he could clear the ninth layer of True Void Legend Tower.
.... ......... 0
Rumble!!!
Ye Tian fought with the three Eternal realm cultivators on the ninth layer of True Void Legend Tower, displaying far greater strength than before.
During these twenty calamity eras of cultivation in True Void Legend Land, the degree of fusion between his will and body had increased tremendously. Previously, his fusion degree had only reached one ten-thousandth, but now it was already close to one-tenth.
In terms of the degree of fusion between will and body, he was probably even stronger than Star Gazing Sword Ancestor.
If he comprehended for another five calamity eras, he would have hope of raising the fusion of body and will to above one-tenth.
If that happened, and he chose to break through to the Eternal realm, his cultivation would immediately break through to the Undying realm.
“Kill!”
Ye Tian displayed one powerful legendary Eternal art after another. No matter how strong the opponent’s Intent Eternal arts were, they could not defeat him.
The increase in the fusion of will and body made his own physical strength reach an inconceivable level, and even his half-step Eternal power surged by a great margin.
Thus, he was completely crushing the three Eternal realm cultivators.
“Eternal Extreme Fist!”
Ye Tian shattered one Eternal realm cultivator’s body with a single punch, and the other party immediately collapsed.
After that, he quickly dealt with the remaining two Eternal realm cultivators and cleared the ninth layer.
Next, Ye Tian wanted to clear the tenth layer, but his strength was still a little lacking, causing him to fail the challenge.
Ye Tian felt that if he wanted to clear the tenth layer, he would probably need to raise the fusion of will and body to above one-tenth and undergo a small transformation before there would be hope of clearing the tenth layer.
After coming out from clearing the tenth layer, Ye Tian immediately entered True Void Legend Land again and.

Chapter 1674 A Sword That Cannot Be Reached!

Chapter 1674 A Sword That Cannot Be Reached!

After entering the True No Legendary Land, Ye Tian continued cultivating.
As time passed, the degree of fusion between his will and body grew higher and higher, getting closer and closer to ten percent.
Finally, after the fourth kalpa era, Ye Tian’s will-body fusion reached ten percent.
It was at this moment that his body began to undergo a qualitative transformation.
Boom!!!!!
Every particle in Ye Tian’s body began to transform, becoming increasingly powerful. Endless source energy from the outside poured into his body, driving his physical strength to grow stronger and stronger.
Moreover, Ye Tian’s will also improved quite a bit.
After a long time, Ye Tian’s transformation was complete.
At this point, he was much stronger than before.
Now, if he went to break through to the Eternal Realm, then after the breakthrough he would become an Immortal Realm lord.
But Ye Tian was not in a hurry to break through yet. After all, once he broke through to the Immortal Realm, continuing to fuse his will and body would become much more difficult than it was now. So there was no need for him to rush. It would be better to stay a while longer in the Half-Step Eternal Realm of the Ninth Extreme Realm.
In any case, his lifespan was infinite, unlike those Half-Step Eternal Realm cultivators in the Space-Time Territory, whose lifespan limit was ten million eternal years. Thus, they would not keep lingering at the Half-Step Eternal Realm forever; they would definitely advance to the Eternal Realm earlier.
Another kalpa era passed, and Ye Tian came out of the True No Legendary Land.
This time, he began challenging the tenth level of the True No Legendary Tower.
Once he cleared this level, he would be able to obtain ten kalpa eras of cultivation time, which was an enormous temptation to him!
Tenth level.
Ye Tian fought against three Eternal Realm opponents, and their battle caused the void on the tenth level to shake violently.
The three Eternal Realm opponents on the tenth level were indeed very powerful, and each of them knew more than one will Eternal technique. However, Ye Tian’s strength was also incomparably powerful, and he forcibly held off the three Eternal Realm opponents.
Suddenly.
The three Eternal Realm opponents jointly unleashed a will Eternal technique. If they were true Eternal Realm cultivators, they naturally would not have been able to do this, but these Eternal Realm opponents were merely condensed by the True No Legendary Tower, so anything was possible.
Buzz!!!
A will void sphere appeared in the void, enveloping Ye Tian within it.
Immediately afterward, the will void sphere began to compress; the void inside kept collapsing, and even Eternal laws were breaking apart, unable to withstand the power of this will void sphere at all.
Such a will Eternal technique sealed off all of Ye Tian’s escape routes, leaving him nowhere to dodge.
“Void True Body!”
“Eternal Extreme Fist!”
Ignoring his injuries, Ye Tian set out to shatter this will void sphere.
Boom!!!!
The will void sphere kept cracking, but Ye Tian also suffered many will injuries all over his body.
Suddenly.
The will void sphere exploded, and the entire region was directly shattered into nothingness along with it.
Within the distorted and shattered nothingness, Ye Tian walked out, covered in blood. If not for the Void True Body, he truly would not have been able to withstand it.
It had to be said that this will Eternal technique jointly unleashed by the three Eternal Realm cultivators was indeed terrifying.
However, Ye Tian had already figured out their move, and with a countermeasure in hand, he would not give them another chance to join forces and unleash it again.
Next.
Ye Tian fought the three Eternal Realm cultivators at extreme speed, bringing out the full power of the legendary Eternal technique, Interruption.
Immediately, the three Eternal Realm cultivators had no way to jointly unleash the will void sphere. Whenever they tried, Ye Tian would use the legendary Eternal technique Interruption to cut them off.
The battle continued like this until, after a long time, Ye Tian finally wore down and killed the three Eternal Realm cultivators one by one, clearing the tenth level, though he also paid a heavy price in injuries.
“If I encountered three such Eternal Realm cultivators outside, I would surely die!”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
After all, the Eternal Realm cultivators condensed by the True No Legendary Tower did not possess the recovery abilities of true Eternal Realm cultivators. Otherwise, he would not have been able to wear down and kill the three of them.
But that was the challenge of the True No Legendary Tower. If the Eternal Realm cultivators here could also recover, then clearing the tenth level would be far too difficult; at the very least, he would be nowhere near capable of doing it.
Having obtained ten kalpa eras of cultivation time this time, Ye Tian did not keep it for later. He entered the True No Legendary Land again and continued improving the fusion between his will and body.
In the blink of an eye, another ten kalpa eras passed.
By now, his will-body fusion had improved somewhat again, but it was still far from the point of qualitative transformation, and the increase in strength was not too large.
He went to challenge the eleventh level, but unfortunately failed.
Therefore, in the short term, he would not be able to clear the eleventh level.
This ruin was not without other opportunities besides the True No Legendary Tower.
Through chatting with Star Ancestor, he also learned that there was one place here that counted as an opportunity, but not every Eternal Realm cultivator could gain any harvest or benefit from it, so not many Eternal Realm cultivators took it seriously.
Whoosh!
Ye Tian walked through the shattered void of the ruin and soon arrived at a broken palace in the ruin.
After entering this palace, he came to a special place. .........
Here, there were many Immortal Realm beings, and even a legendary lord—namely, Lord Binghan.
Ye Tian cupped his hands in greeting, but did not speak, so as not to disturb them.
In fact, these Immortal Realm beings and the legendary lord, Lord Binghan, did not pay him any mind either. They were still silently comprehending and cultivating.
Ye Tian’s gaze was soon drawn to a sword as well.
In the void, there was a silver long sword. It seemed illusory, yet was incomparably real. Looking at it carefully, it was as if one were seeing a sword Dao world stretching across endless heaven and earth, where every wisp of sword qi seemed capable of shattering an Immortal Realm being.
Compared with the sword Dao of this long sword itself, the sword Dao among the many Great Dao Ye Tian had comprehended was simply not worth mentioning. He had also comprehended the innate Eternal sword Dao laws, but compared with the sword Dao aura here, they were simply far too crude.
It existed at the source of endless spacetime, existing in every heaven and earth. It seemed very near, yet also as if it were not in this stretch of spacetime, not in the Space-Time Territory.
Ye Tian’s will wanted to touch this sword, but even as his will crossed spacetime, he still felt it to be out of reach, as if his will would never reach the place where this sword was located.
“It really is like the True No Dao Mark Tree, impossible to touch!”
Ye Tian was quite surprised.
He had heard from Star Ancestor before that there was such a sword here, and that Star Ancestor had been comprehending it here all along, but he had not known that this sword could not be touched.
“That makes sense. If it could be touched, the six legendary lords would have taken it away already!”
Ye Tian thought.
Although sword Dao was not Ye Tian’s main path of cultivation, it was still a part of the boundless Dao, so comprehending it here would also bring him some benefits.
However, the reason Ye Tian had come here was not to comprehend sword Dao, but to create an even more powerful Eternal compression secret art.
Star Ancestor had said that this sword could affect Eternal power, and even more so Half-Step Eternal power.
Its sword Dao aura was far too condensed, far surpassing Eternal power, which was why many Eternal Realm cultivators tried to comprehend the sword Dao aura and use this sword to create a secret art that could compress the Eternal power or Half-Step Eternal power within their bodies.
In fact, quite a few people had succeeded.
For example, the six legendary lords had created very powerful Eternal compression secret arts, but ordinary people could not obtain them.
Although Ye Tian had also created an Eternal compression secret art capable of eightyfold compression, it was of no use to him now.
So, he wanted to借 help from this sword to create a more powerful Eternal compression secret art.

Chapter 1675: Eternal Will Technique, Another Path?

Chapter 1675: Eternal Will Technique, Another Path?

Ye Tian found an empty spot here and sat down cross-legged, silently comprehending the sword dao aura in this place.
The sword dao aura here seemed to be within reach, yet impossible to truly capture. Only Eternal Will could faintly perceive a bit of it, and therefore, for many Eternal Realm experts, without a long period of comprehension, they simply could not gain much benefit.
Thus, many Eternal Realm experts would send a clone or their true body here to comprehend it, so as not to delay their own cultivation.
Those without clones were the ones who had no time to waste here.
Compared with other Eternal Realm experts, Ye Tian’s greatest advantage was his talent. His talent far surpassed that of other Eternal Realm experts, and he even possessed a legendary ancestor aptitude, while the six legendary lords did not have a legendary ancestor aptitude.
Therefore, Ye Tian could obtain more benefits from this sword, and his comprehension speed was much faster, far beyond what other Eternal Realm lords could compare to.
In the years that followed, this clone body of Ye Tian cultivated here.
For him, the clone body and the true body were unquestionably the same; as long as one body improved, the others improved as well.
Time slowly passed, and Ye Tian continued to comprehend the sword dao aura here. Gradually, he gained results. Combined with the layered secret technique and other Eternal compression secret techniques, and based on his own situation, he slowly attempted to create a higher-level Eternal compression secret technique.
Although compressing half-step Eternal power had its limit, Ye Tian had not yet reached that limit, far from it.
“The sword dao aura here is too terrifying. Just comprehending a tiny bit of it feels like seeing a world on another level. If I could comprehend even one ten-thousandth of this sword dao aura, I would already benefit greatly!”
Ye Tian could not help but exclaim.
One Eternal year after another passed, and Ye Tian gradually created a fairly good Eternal compression secret technique.
This Eternal compression secret technique imitated the sword dao aura here, using a sword dao aura-like force to compress the half-step Eternal power within the body, and thus its compression effect far surpassed the layered secret technique.
At first, this secret technique was only a rough prototype, but it was gradually perfected by Ye Tian.
During the process of perfecting it, Ye Tian shattered many clone bodies, but in the end, he still succeeded in perfecting it.
He named this Eternal compression secret technique the Sword Pressure Secret Technique.
According to Ye Tian’s estimate, the Sword Pressure Secret Technique could compress half-step Eternal power by about 200 times, and he judged that 200 times was still not the limit, but with his current attainments, he could only create it to this extent.
Unless he spent endless ages, he might be able to create an even better Eternal compression secret technique, but there was no real need.
After the Sword Pressure Secret Technique was created, Ye Tian’s true body began cultivating it, compressing the half-step Eternal power within his body.
Boom!!!!
An illusory sword shadow appeared above Ye Tian’s head, then projected into countless particles within his body. Those half-step Eternal powers seemed to be under the endless suppression of the sword shadow, like a mass of water being compressed into a single drop.
Crack, crack, crack!!!
The half-step Eternal power in his body was suppressed and compressed by the sword shadow, constantly undergoing qualitative change in a special manner, becoming even more condensed half-step Eternal power.
During this process, Ye Tian’s body also endured unimaginable pressure.
However, Ye Tian had long since perfected this secret technique, so most of this pressure was directed at the half-step Eternal power. The burden on the body was not very great, was bearable, and even had some effect of tempering the body.
As time went on, the condensation level of the half-step Eternal power within Ye Tian’s body reached a very strong degree.
90 times!
95 times!
100 times!
105 times!
……
Once the half-step Eternal power was compressed beyond 120 times, the speed slowed considerably. But after nearly 100 Eternal years, Ye Tian’s half-step Eternal power was still compressed to 150 times, and by then the Sword Pressure Secret Technique had also been perfected by him to the point where it could ultimately compress 220 times.
Compressing the half-step Eternal power to this degree also improved Ye Tian’s strength considerably.
Yet Ye Tian was very clear that even so, his strength had not undergone a qualitative change. It was still somewhat difficult for him to pass the eleventh level of the True Nothing Legend Tower.
Not long after, he went to test it.
The result was still a narrow defeat; he remained somewhat short of clearing the eleventh level. These gaps were not something that could be crossed simply by compressing the half-step Eternal power within his body.
At this point, Ye Tian thought of Eternal Will techniques.
His will was actually very powerful. By now, he had already opened up more than thirty thousand will worlds, making him quite strong even among third-tier Eternal Will users.
But with powerful will and no Eternal Will technique, it was difficult to fully bring out the advantage of that will.
“If I can create an Eternal Will technique, my strength will surely undergo a transformation!”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
On this day.
Ye Tian chatted with Star-Gazing Sword Ancestor about knowledge related to Eternal Will techniques.
“Star-Gazing Sword Ancestor, what is your view on Eternal Will techniques?”
Ye Tian asked.
“Very powerful, with limitless potential!” Star-Gazing Sword Ancestor evaluated.
“Do you think we have a chance to create an Eternal Will technique?” Ye Tian asked again.
“Too difficult!” Star-Gazing Sword Ancestor shook his head. “I know that you, Unending Ancestor, very much want to create an Eternal Will technique. So do I. So do other Eternal Realm experts above the Undying Realm. Even the six legendary lords are the same. But for countless Eternal years, everyone has failed.”
“Not a single one succeeded?”
Ye Tian was surprised.
Star-Gazing Sword Ancestor shook his head and said, “As far as I know, no. The Eternal Realm experts in the True Nothing Legend Tower do possess Eternal Will techniques, but they have left behind no inheritance regarding Eternal Will techniques. We can only fight those Eternal Realm experts; there is no way to create an Eternal Will technique on our own. It can even be said that Eternal Will techniques belong to a system that is incompatible with our cultivation system. We don’t even have an entry-level inheritance. How could we create it?”
Then he added: “Perhaps some Eternal Realm expert has created one, but simply won’t say so. Still, an Eternal Realm expert did put forward such a conjecture: the fusion of will and innate Eternal rules is the basic condition for creating an Eternal Will technique. But for us half-step Eternal experts, we need to fuse innate Eternal rules with the body in order to break through and become Eternal Realm experts. As for Undying Realm lords, they need to fuse the body with will in order to become Immortal Realm experts, or even legendary lords. There has never been any need to fuse will with innate Eternal rules. Moreover, fusing innate Eternal rules with will is far too dangerous; one misstep can cause the will to shatter. I think that will and innate Eternal rules simply cannot be fused. This is a path that cannot be walked, and no one dares to try.”
“Will and innate Eternal rules fused together?”
Hearing this, Ye Tian suddenly felt that this might be the correct path, but no one dared to walk it.
