Chapter 1676 Success, the Eternal Technique of Will, Another..

Chapter 1676 Success, the Eternal Technique of Will, Another Road!

After Ye Tian took his leave, he returned.
Then.
Ye Tian’s copied body began studying the path of fusing will with innate Eternal rules. He was very clear that in the time-space domain, other Eternal realm experts did not dare to walk this path, so he had almost no information to refer to and could only grope forward step by step on his own.
Buzz！！！！
A large amount of innate Eternal rules were mobilized by Ye Tian, and then the power of will was drawn forth to begin attempting fusion with the innate Eternal rules.
He did not know how to fuse them, so he could only force the fusion, constantly making will and the innate Eternal rules collide.
At a certain moment.
Will shattered, and this copied body turned into a corpse, disappearing in the blink of an eye.
“It failed!”
Ye Tian muttered.
He had long anticipated this failure, yet he still tried it.
If one wants to walk a road no one else has walked before, countless attempts are necessary; this is also an inevitable process.
In the days that followed.
Ye Tian attempted fusion again and again, failing time and time again. After countless failures, Ye Tian finally prepared to try another method of fusion, which was to let the innate Eternal rules attempt to fuse into the will world.
If the will world and the innate Eternal rules were allowed to fuse, it would be equivalent to allowing the will world to give birth to rules. This also counted as a kind of fusion, and the difficulty would be somewhat lower and easier.
Otherwise, to have his own will completely fuse with the innate Eternal rules all at once was almost impossible. This was also an experience Ye Tian had summed up after countless failed attempts.
Thus.
Ye Tian began drawing a wisp of innate Eternal rules into one of his will worlds, starting fusion with the will within the will world, thereby allowing rules to be born inside the will world.
Sizzle sizzle sizzle!!!!
The will world began to collapse during the fusion of rules, and very soon it shattered completely. But Ye Tian’s will was also injured, and his fleshly body suffered severe damage, though this time he did not die.
“Perhaps I’m on the right path!”
Ye Tian said in delight.
Afterwards, he tried to fuse several more times before this copied body finally collapsed completely.
In the years that followed, Ye Tian had the innate Eternal rules fuse with will worlds. After many failed attempts, he gradually accumulated some experience and even began to sketch out a rudimentary path.
Ye Tian was extremely firm in his belief that will and the innate Eternal rules could be fused.
While deducing, Ye Tian also kept trying, and after countless experiments, he finally gained something.
On this day.
As usual, Ye Tian’s innate Eternal rules were fusing with will inside the will world. This time, the innate Eternal rules transformed into strands of threads, forming a seal-character array formation.
This seal-character array formation had the effect of being compatible with all things, so Ye Tian fused with will in this way; the success rate would be higher. He had already modified the array formation and tried it many times.
Under his control, the innate Eternal rules and will began to fuse.
At a certain moment.
The two actually began to fuse slowly.
Success!!!
Though this was only a beginning, for Ye Tian it was the hope of an entirely new path.
Not long after, the innate Eternal rules and the will within this will world slowly fused together.
With this beginning, Ye Tian’s subsequent experiments went much more smoothly.
In the trials that followed, Ye Tian’s innate Eternal rules fused with one will world after another, but the path of fusion between will and the innate Eternal rules was endless; he had merely opened the beginning.
After Ye Tian’s will and the innate Eternal rules initially fused, he truly touched the threshold of the Eternal Technique of Will.
By now, he understood that the Eternal Technique of Will was to study the power formed after fusing will with the innate Eternal rules, then unleash that power through the creation of an Eternal technique. This was the Eternal Technique of Will.
And Ye Tian now possessed this power, and after this power was born, he also learned its name.
Will rule power!
Without the birth of will rule power, it would simply be impossible to create an Eternal technique. It was the power foundation of the Eternal Technique of Will; without this foundation, one could not even step through the threshold.
At this moment, Ye Tian thought of the sword in the ruins that he could not touch. Perhaps he could use that sword’s sword Dao aura, combined with will rule power and the power system of strength, to create a sword Dao Eternal Technique of Will containing overbearing power.
Having thought of it, he acted on it.
Ye Tian began trying to create such a sword Dao Eternal Technique of Will. Since this was only the beginning of creation, he did not set high requirements; as long as he could create an ordinary Eternal Technique of Will, that would be enough.
Because Ye Tian’s talent in power was a legendary ancestor talent, his creation speed was very fast when it came to matters involving strength.
In merely a hundred thousand tribulation yuan of time, he successfully created an Eternal Technique of Will, and it was only slightly inferior to a top-tier Eternal technique.
This Eternal Technique of Will was called Will Severing Void Sword. Although it was only an ordinary Eternal technique, other Eternal realm experts had no means to deal with Eternal Techniques of Will, so an ordinary Eternal Technique of Will could even possess deterrent power comparable to a legendary Eternal technique.
Then.
Ye Tian also created Eternal Techniques of Will in other areas, such as defense. If he created a defensive Eternal Technique of Will, then when challenging the True Void Legend Tower, he could easily withstand the Eternal realm will attacks of those Eternal realm experts, thereby reaching higher tiers.
Unknowingly, several Eternal years passed.
By now, Ye Tian had already created multiple Eternal Techniques of Will.
For example, the defensive Eternal Technique of Will——Will Wall Light!
The speed-type Eternal Technique of Will——Will Shadow Light!
In addition, Ye Tian also created another attack-type Eternal Technique of Will——Will Extreme Path Fist, an offensive Eternal Technique of Will he created based on the Eternal Extreme Path Fist.
Creating these Eternal Techniques of Will greatly increased Ye Tian’s strength.
In the dark, he felt that his body had undergone a special change. Although his power had not increased, his will had increased by a great deal and was full of vitality.
More importantly, Ye Tian’s control over will had increased severalfold.
This made Ye Tian even more convinced that this path was extremely correct.
On this day.
Ye Tian once again arrived at the True Void Legend Tower. He was preparing to challenge the True Void Legend Tower again and see how many tiers he could reach.
He firmly believed that he could easily pass the eleventh tier, and even the twelfth tier.
The eleventh tier of the True Void Legend Tower.
Ye Tian appeared here, and three Eternal realm experts emerged. They all displayed Eternal Techniques of Will to attack Ye Tian.
At this moment, a golden light appeared on Ye Tian’s body, easily blocking the attacks of the three Eternal realm experts.
This was Will Wall Light!
A legendary Eternal technique could not completely block will attacks, but an ordinary Eternal technique like Will Wall Light did block them. This was precisely the restraint of Eternal Techniques of Will against Eternal Techniques of Will.
“．‖ Will Eternal Fist々〃!”
Ye Tian threw out a punch that shattered everything, and behind him appeared the phantom shadows of billions of will worlds, crushing through the ages of space-time and pressing down.
The void shattered, Eternal rules broke, and everything before him turned into nothingness.
Meanwhile, the three Eternal realm experts were all sent flying, each suffering no light injuries.
“Will Severing Void Sword, fall!”
A Will Severing Void Sword slashed out from the void, piercing one Eternal realm expert with a single strike, and the other’s body immediately collapsed.
Very quickly, Ye Tian shattered the other two Eternal realm experts as well, successfully passing the eleventh tier with complete ease.
Whoosh!
Ye Tian arrived at the twelfth tier.

Chapter 1677 Hunting the Void Beasts, Strength Increased!

Chapter 1677 Hunting the Void Beasts, Strength Increased!

The three Eternal Realm beings on the twelfth layer were naturally somewhat stronger, but Ye Tian still fought through arduous slaughter and ultimately defeated the three Eternal Realm beings, passing the twelfth layer.
However, on the thirteenth layer, Ye Tian still failed, mainly because the gap in combat strength was somewhat large.
But Ye Tian felt that if he continued to increase the fusion between his will and body, he would be able to defeat the three Eternal Realm beings on the thirteenth layer.
“This time, after consecutively passing the eleventh layer and the twelfth layer, I obtained ten tribulation yuan of comprehension time. I should have a chance to go one step further. Then, if I create some top-tier will Eternal Skills, I should be able to easily pass the thirteenth layer of the True Void Legend Tower.”
Ye Tian muttered.
Then.
He entered the True Void Legend Land, where he began cultivating and continuously fusing his will with his body.
Just as he started cultivating, he unexpectedly wanted to try fusing his will with the innate eternal rules.
Once he tried, it was astonishing. He immediately discovered that in the True Void Legend Land, the speed at which his will fused with the innate eternal rules was many times faster.
“This...”
Ye Tian understood a little.
The True Void Dao Mark Tree in the True Void Legend Land was actually a sacred tree for fusing will with innate eternal rules, but it also had an effect on the fusion of will and body.
Next, Ye Tian used the True Void Legend Land to begin fusing his will with the innate eternal rules, but he did not give up on the process of fusing his will with his body. After all, if he wanted to become stronger and break through to the Eternal Realm or even the level of a legendary lord as soon as possible, then it would be better to fully fuse his will with his body.
Therefore, the fusion of his will with his body was more important to him at present.
Unknowingly, ten tribulation yuan of time passed.
At this point, the degree of fusion between Ye Tian’s will and body had reached 16%, but the progress of fusion between his will and the innate eternal rules was also quite good. All of the will worlds he had opened up had already completely fused with the innate eternal rules.
However, if he were to use a standard to describe the progress of fusion between his will and the innate eternal rules, he could not give one.
After all, even the will within those will worlds and the innate eternal rules were not fully and completely fused; only a little had fused, as if the will worlds themselves could not fully bear it either.
But compared with before, his strength had still increased quite a bit.
After that, Ye Tian continued to create will Eternal Skills. It took him a full several dozen Eternal Years to perfect the will Eternal Skills he had previously created one by one to the level of top-tier will Eternal Skills, and their threat level even surpassed ordinary legendary Eternal Skills.
Finally, this day came.
Ye Tian passed the thirteenth layer in the True Void Legend Tower and obtained another five tribulation yuan of cultivation comprehension time.
However, five tribulation yuan of cultivation time did not help much. In the True Void Legend Land, Ye Tian only increased the degree of fusion between his will and body from 16% to 17%.
“Unless I can have endless Eternal Years of comprehension time, it is nearly impossible to completely fuse my will and body through the True Void Legend Land!”
Ye Tian came to understand.
If he truly wanted to quickly fuse his will and body, he probably needed other opportunities.
“Maybe I can go hunt Void Beasts!”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
His current strength was already extremely powerful, comparable to a formidable Immortal Realm expert, and he also had legendary Eternal Skills and will Eternal Skills tailored to Void Beasts. Even against a half-step Immortal Realm expert, the damage he dealt to Void Beasts might not be lower.
Moreover, he possessed multiple copy bodies, so even if one fell, it could be quickly recondensed, and the cost paid was not great.
Therefore, hunting Void Beasts was profitable for him.
As for other Eternal Realm experts, even if they had clones, they would not dare take such a risk; losing a clone would be a huge loss.
“Then let’s go hunt Void Beasts. With three copy bodies attacking together to hunt First-Tier Void Beasts, given my current strength, I should be able to instantly kill a First-Tier Void Beast,” Ye Tian estimated.
On this day.
Ye Tian left the range of the spacetime territory, and the three copy bodies plunged deep into the void region, all the while keeping the copy talent activated at every moment.
In a place like the void region, the range covered by the copy talent was much broader than the range he could sense by himself. If he encountered an extremely powerful Void Beast or a large-scale Void Beast pack, he would temporarily retreat and avoid contact with them.
After traversing for a long time, Ye Tian still had not found a single Void Beast. Clearly, after their previous defeat and retreat, the Void Beasts had withdrawn very deep, making it impossible to find even one here.
Just like that, Ye Tian flew for a long time before finally sensing the existence of a Void Beast.
“Second-Tier Void Beast, no good. I can’t instantly kill it. This place is probably close to the Void Beasts’ territory; if I can’t instantly kill it, I won’t be able to escape in time.”
Ye Tian gave up on this target, then left the area and resumed searching for other Void Beasts.
Very soon.
Ye Tian found a First-Tier Void Beast. The other party was slowly roaming through the void region.
“It’s this one!”
Ye Tian immediately activated his Void True Body, entering a void state so that he would not be easily discovered.
After drawing close to this Void Beast, Ye Tian immediately made his move.
“Void-penetrating Secret Sword!”
With a hiss!
The illusory Void-penetrating Secret Sword directly pierced through this First-Tier Void Beast, striking it so heavily that it was left critically wounded and on the verge of death.
Next, Ye Tian’s second attack arrived immediately.
Will Severing Void Sword!
This sword directly split the Void Beast in two, and its vitality was completely severed.
This Void Beast had fallen!
Swish!
Ye Tian collected the Void Beast’s corpse and moved at extremely high speed, while the three copy bodies dispersed and left separately. In this way, even if they encountered a heavy encirclement, they would not be wiped out completely.
If they were wiped out completely, he would not be able to condense copy bodies here again and would have to send copy bodies over once more, which would undoubtedly waste time.
Fortunately, his speed was fast enough, and he did not encounter pursuit from Void Beasts.
In the days that followed, Ye Tian hunted Void Beasts continuously in this void region, and he also devoted one copy body to cultivating in a not-too-distant area, continuously refining Void Beast materials to increase the fusion between his will and body.
Just like that, Ye Tian hunted one Void Beast after another, and the degree of fusion between his will and body kept rising, which meant his own strength kept becoming stronger as well.
18% fusion!
19% fusion!
20% fusion!
...
Ye Tian had been very smooth at first, but as the number of vanished Void Beasts grew, it finally drew the attention of the Void Beast ruler in this area.
This Void Beast ruler was a fourth-tier Void Beast, comparable to the most top-tier Immortal Realm lords, an existence second only to a legendary lord.
It commanded many Void Beasts, and noticing that many of its subordinates had gone missing, it was not very concerned, but it still went to investigate.
Thus.
Groups of Void Beasts appeared in this area, and this brought trouble to Ye Tian’s hunting.

Chapter 1678 A Mysterious.. in the Domain of Void Beasts

Chapter 1678 A Mysterious Ruin in the Domain of Void Beasts!

“I’ve attracted the attention of the Void Beasts!”
Ye Tian encountered several Void Beast squads. Each squad was led by a second-tier Void Beast. Even though Void Beasts had very low intelligence and poor coordination, there must be a powerful Void Beast controlling them from behind the scenes.
Therefore, once he encountered them, he was quickly besieged.
“This area must be abandoned!”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
Immediately after, he left this Void region and went to other Void regions to continue searching for Void Beasts to hunt.
However, he did not know this Void region very well, so he soon broke into the inner perimeter of a Void Beast group. Even with his copying talent used to scout ahead, he was still surrounded.
So, Ye Tian simply abandoned this copy body and did not meet these Void Beasts in battle.
After that.
Ye Tian used one copy body after another to probe the way, and only then did he find the correct route and arrive at another Void region.
Here, Void Beasts did not appear in groups.
Then, Ye Tian began hunting Void Beasts in this region.
However, after killing some Void Beasts, Ye Tian drew the attention of the local ruler here, so he immediately left.
After changing several regions, Ye Tian had basically touched the bottom line of the Void Beasts.
A fifth-tier Void Beast descended here, and this Void Beast was going to personally kill the Eternal Realm being who had infiltrated this place.
Just how terrifying a fifth-tier Void Beast comparable to a legendary ruler was, Ye Tian quickly experienced it firsthand.
Just as Ye Tian was about to instantly kill a first-tier Void Beast, the surrounding Void region shook, and a figure crossed the Void from far away.
Zzzzt zzzzt zzzzt!!!!
The Void region shattered into pieces, and an incomparably gigantic Void Beast descended. It was clearly a fifth-tier Void Beast.
“Life from the Space-Time Domain, you are seeking death!”
The fifth-tier Void Beast swiped a claw at him.
No matter how Ye Tian resisted, it was useless. The three copy bodies were instantly frozen in place, then blasted apart by one strike.
Another place.
Ye Tian’s last copy body here immediately condensed three new copy bodies again, then dispersed them, to avoid this place also being tracked by the fifth-tier Void Beast.
After a long while, Ye Tian confirmed that the fifth-tier Void Beast could no longer track him, and only then did he let out a breath of relief.
“It looks like it’s very hard to continue hunting Void Beasts!”
Ye Tian thought.
However, he had also gained a lot. By now, he had raised the degree of fusion between his will and body to the realm of twenty-five percent. This was a realm that many Immortal Realm rulers could not even reach, and he had only cultivated for such a short time.
“I’ve already gone deep into the Void Beast’s domain, haven’t I?”
Ye Tian suddenly thought of this.
He estimated that the Void Beasts were already completely enraged. If he were to return along the same path, he might not necessarily be able to retreat safely.
Besides, even if all of these copy bodies were destroyed, it would not be much of a loss. After all, his strength had increased, and he did not have many resources on him. If they were lost, then so be it.
Thus, Ye Tian prepared to go even deeper into the depths of the Void Beasts’ domain. Perhaps there would be other gains.
In this way, Ye Tian’s four copy bodies split up and headed toward the depths of the Void Beasts’ domain.
Along the way, copy bodies kept being discovered by Void Beasts, and then killed by fifth-tier Void Beasts or fourth-tier Void Beasts.
As time passed, Ye Tian discovered that the resources on him had been exhausted, and he could no longer condense copy bodies.
Condensing copy bodies required energy, and there was no energy supply in this Void region. With his energy exhausted, no matter how powerful the copying talent was, it still could not condense new copy bodies.
Unless he found a blessed land and collected some resources, he would be able to continue condensing new copy bodies.
After some more time, even though Ye Tian was extremely careful, two of the four copy bodies still fell, leaving only two copy bodies remaining in the Void Beasts’ domain.
On this day.
Ye Tian was quite lucky. He actually found a shattered world in the Void region, which could also be called a ruin.
Around this ruin, there were still quite a few Void Beasts.
Ye Tian did not sense the existence of any third-tier Void Beasts. The strongest Void Beast here was only a second-tier Void Beast.
“Why would a ruin world appear in the Void Beasts’ domain?”
Ye Tian was very curious.
This was definitely not a Void Beast nest, because on this world ruin, he clearly felt the fluctuations of a formation, and Void Beasts did not know formations. Their meager intelligence simply could not create a cultivation civilization.
· ·········求鲜花··· ·····
So, this ruin world definitely did not belong to Void Beasts.
“Could it be a ruin from the Space-Time Domain?”
Ye Tian speculated in secret.
But this possibility was not very high, because this place was too far from the Space-Time Domain. If it really were a ruin from the Space-Time Domain, it could not have run all the way here, and even Void Beasts would not have been able to destroy it.
As far as he knew, the Space-Time Domain did not yet have such a powerful ruin.
“Or could it be a ruin similar to the one where the True Void Legendary Tower is located?”
As soon as Ye Tian thought of this, he became somewhat tempted.
If that were really the case, then this would be a great opportunity!
He observed carefully. This ruin world was fairly damaged, with many cracks. Through these cracks, one could enter this ruin world.
..... 0 .......
“First let a copy body go in and take a gamble.”
Ye Tian decided.
Whoosh!
Ye Tian activated the legendary Eternal technique Infinite Passage, crossing the Void region in an instant and arriving at a crack.
At this time, several second-tier Void Beasts sensed Ye Tian’s presence and immediately attacked him.
The other Void Beasts also launched attacks, reacting quite quickly.
“Void True Body!”
“Will Barrier Light!”
With these two methods, the Void Beast attacks were weakened by more than ninety percent, and could not cause Ye Tian any substantial harm at all.
Immediately after, Ye Tian passed through the crack and entered this ruin world.
Not long after.
A fifth-tier Void Beast descended, staring at this ruin with eyes full of fury.
“An ant actually broke in here. Who is he, and why does he have so many clones?”
This fifth-tier Void Beast was very curious.
Unfortunately, it could not enter this ruin world, and neither could the other Void Beasts. It seemed this ruin world forbade Void Beasts from entering, but allowed other life forms to enter.
Boom!!!!
The fifth-tier Void Beast struck the ruin world with both claws, attacking again and again, but it only caused ripples one after another, and could not damage the ruin world in the slightest.
Even a fifth-tier Void Beast could not damage this ruin world, yet this ruin world had been damaged into this state countless ages ago. One could imagine how terrifying the battles and

Chapter 1679 Two Cultivation Systems, the Legendary Realm!

Chapter 1679 Two Cultivation Systems, the Legendary Realm!

The ruin world.
This place was in complete disrepair, but it had not been utterly drained; there were still quite a few resources here.
Thus, Ye Tian began collecting resources here.
It had to be said that although the resources here were scarce, their quality was very high. In no time at all, Ye Tian had gathered enough resources to condense many clone bodies multiple times.
So, he immediately condensed the other two clone bodies.
As for the remaining clone body, he left it hidden in the outside world, so that if he could not get out, all the clone bodies would not be trapped here. After all, the clone body outside had no resources left on it and could no longer condense any other clone bodies.
This day.
Ye Tian discovered a corpse, and it was actually the corpse of a powerhouse from the Eternal Stage.
It was the corpse of a woman, wearing battle armor, but the armor was already extremely damaged. The area where she had been was directly turned into nothingness and still had not recovered to this day. Moreover, there was a three-inch sword wound on her body, piercing straight through her.
That was only the visible wound.
Ye Tian’s divine sense probed over and saw that every particle in her body had lost all power of will, and every particle retained traces of sword aura. Clearly, she had been killed by a powerful Eternal Stage sword cultivator using an Eternal sword technique, erasing both her power of will and her life.
“Huh!”
Ye Tian cried out in surprise.
He discovered that this corpse was somewhat special. Although the other party had already fallen, from the corpse one could still see some traces of her cultivation.
Perhaps other Eternal Stage experts would not be able to see the situation of this corpse, but he could.
This corpse had definitely once fused innate Eternal rules with will; he had done the same, so he could sense it.
From the aura emitted by the corpse, this was merely the corpse of a Lord at the Immortal Stage, yet it had achieved the fusion of will and innate Eternal rules. Clearly, the system she cultivated was not the system of Source Sea and the Time-Space Territory, but rather the cultivation system behind this relic, the True Void Legend Pagoda.
Perhaps within that system, a Half-Step Eternal Stage cultivator could attempt to fuse will with innate Eternal rules, and many Eternal Stage cultivators would possess will Eternal techniques.
“This corpse is highly valuable to me. I can study it carefully; it will be of immense help to my fusion of will and innate Eternal rules!”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
Thus, he took away this corpse.
Unfortunately, there were no treasure resources on her body. Clearly, after she was killed, the resources on her person had already been taken away.
In the days that followed, Ye Tian found quite a few corpses in this ruin world, all of them corpses of Eternal Stage cultivators, and all of them bore traces of the fusion of will and innate Eternal rules.
Therefore, Ye Tian took all of these corpses away.
Ye Tian searched this ruin world for a long time, but never saw a living Eternal Stage cultivator, and even living beings were very few. There were only some Half-Step Eternal Stage lives, but unfortunately they were trapped in this ruin world, with no path forward, and thus could never break through to become Eternal Stage.
At last, this day arrived.
Ye Tian came to the center of the ruin world, where he saw a field of ruins.
The battle here back then must have been incomparably tragic. Ye Tian even sensed many auras that made him tremble in fear; he did not even dare to approach them.
Moreover, there were also many fragments of Eternal Stage corpses here, such as a finger bone, an arm bone. Over the long years, these corpse fragments lost the support of power, and because they were not complete corpses, they turned into one treasure land after another.
For example, one of the mountain ranges was actually formed from a section of bone.
It had to be said that because so many Eternal Stage experts had fallen here, the resources born from it were extraordinarily abundant.
Thus, Ye Tian began collecting the resources here.
A long time later.
Ye Tian had collected all the resources that could be gathered here, which could be considered a great harvest.
After that.
He began to take the risk of venturing deep into this battlefield ruin. What he most wanted to collect was inheritances; even the most worthless inheritance could at least provide him with some guidance, and at the very least save him countless years of research.
However, there were far too many terrifying traces here. Some of them had existed for countless Eternal years, and could instantly kill Ye Tian outright.
According to Ye Tian’s speculation, the existence that left behind such terrifying traces must have surpassed the level of a legendary Lord. If one slowly comprehended and cultivated here, enormous benefits could be obtained.
Of course, Ye Tian had no mind to slowly comprehend things here right now.
He sent one clone body deep into the shattered void, into the depths of the battlefield, where he saw countless void fragments and palace fragments, and felt deeply moved.
Suddenly.
Ye Tian triggered a force, and a tiny thread rose up in the void, directly sweeping across Ye Tian’s body.
The next moment.
Ye Tian’s clone body directly disintegrated, collapsing without the slightest ability to resist.
Outside the battlefield ruins.
Ye Tian sensed that his clone body had fallen, and immediately condensed another clone body, sending it once again into the battlefield ruins.
Just like that, Ye Tian tried again and again. Even though he fell many times, he still penetrated deep into the battlefield ruins.
-
Somewhere in the battlefield ruins.
A finger bone floated there, and a ring was worn on the finger bone, with a void orb embedded in the ring.
However, this void orb was also severely damaged.
“There’s actually still a void orb left behind!”
Ye Tian was excited.
Even no matter how damaged such a void orb was, perhaps a small piece of void heaven and earth still remained intact within it, which meant there would be some good things inside.
Thus, he took this finger bone away and returned by the same route, fearing that some accident would occur and cause the finger bone and void orb to be lost.
Very soon.
The clone body returned, and Ye Tian began to stabilize the void before slowly opening the void orb.
Boom!!!
A small patch of broken void appeared in Ye Tian’s perception, but this broken void seemed as though it could shatter at any moment.
Ye Tian extracted all the treasures from this broken void at the fastest speed, and the void orb, influenced by Ye Tian’s power, completely shattered.
“There are quite a lot of treasures!”
Ye Tian said joyfully.
Clearly, these things were rather crude. Back then, the victor of the great battle must have overlooked this void orb, otherwise it would not have fallen to him.
This should be the treasure of an Immortal Stage Lord, and only a small portion of it at that. Therefore, for Ye Tian, these resources were not too many, but they were not few either, enough to greatly increase his net worth.........
But what Ye Tian truly cared about was that there were also quite a few inheritances and ancient texts here; these things were the most precious to him.
Ye Tian slowly accepted these inheritances and browsed through some of the ancient texts, gradually obtaining quite a lot of things.
“Jingxu!”
From the inheritances and reference texts, it could be understood that this Immortal Stage Lord came from a place called Jingxu, and it was very likely that this was this ruin world.
In addition.
Ye Tian also learned about the other party’s cultivation system, which indeed differed somewhat from Source Sea.
For example, after cultivating to the Half-Step Eternal Stage, they could attempt to fuse will with Eternal rules or innate Eternal rules. Once the fusion reached a certain degree, they could break through to the Eternal Stage.
And they divided the Eternal Stage into will stage, Immortal Stage, Immortal Stage, legendary stage, Legendary Realm, and other realms.
If they wanted to cultivate to the legendary stage, they had to turn all particles in their entire body into will-rules, with every body particle containing will-rules power formed by the fusion of will and innate Eternal rules.
On the other hand, here in the Time-Space Territory, only after will and the body were 100% fused could one charge toward the realm of legendary Lord.
However, in Jingxu’s side, an Eternal Stage cultivator who wanted to charge toward a Legendary Realm Lord had to completely fuse will-rules power with the body, and this step was extremely difficult.
“I never expected that in the end, their cultivation system would still walk our path, and our path, after reaching the legendary Lord stage, must then walk their path. In that case, once everyone reaches the Legendary Realm, it will be the same. The only difference is that they have the method of fusing will with the body, while we do not have the method of fusing will with innate Eternal rules!”
Ye Tian muttered.
He also obtained a secret technique inheritance that could be used to attempt the fusion of will and innate Eternal rules. This secret technique was called the Chenxu Technique!
However, after Ye Tian’s clone body cultivated it on the Time-Space Territory side, he found that this secret technique was useless.
Suddenly, Ye Tian understood something.
“Different heavens and earth!!!”
Ye Tian thought.
On the Source Sea side, the path of fusing will with innate Eternal rules was something that vastly surpassed the heaven and earth where Jingxu existed, and on Jingxu’s side, the path of fusing will with the body was probably also extremely difficult.
This was the result brought about by different heavens and earth.
“Looks like I must become an Eternal Stage expert by taking the path of fusing will and body first, and only after that, use will power and innate Eternal rules to completely fuse and reach the Legendary Realm.” Ye Tian thought.
Although he did not gain much this time, he did clarify the path ahead.
In the years that followed, Ye Tian continuously searched for treasures in this Jingxu battlefield ruin, while his clone bodies remained here, constantly comprehending and cultivating.
Gradually, the good things Ye Tian obtained grew more and more numerous, and some of them even helped improve the fusion of will and innate Eternal rules.
In the blink of an eye, one thousand Eternal years passed just like that.
This day.
Constellation Sword Ancestor came to inform Ye Tian that he was preparing to break through to the Eternal Stage and wanted Ye Tian to observe.

Chapter 1680 Breakthrough to the Eternal Realm, Immortal!

Chapter 1680 Breakthrough to the Eternal Realm, Immortal!

“Star Sword Ancestor is finally going to choose to break through!”
When Ye Tian first met Star Sword Ancestor, the degree of fusion between his will and body was already close to ten percent. Now, it was probably already at ten percent, so he would no longer remain in the Nine Extreme Realm and was going to charge into the Eternal Realm.
Only after Star Sword Ancestor advanced to the Eternal Realm could his strength reach the level of the Immortal Realm. And only after becoming an Immortal Realm existence would he be qualified to obtain more resources.
Although in the Nine Extreme Realm it was easier to merge will and body, without other opportunities, the speed would still be very slow.
Moreover, even beings in the time-space territory, even at the Nine Extreme Realm, still had a lifespan limit, so Star Sword Ancestor could not remain in the Nine Extreme Realm forever.
Star Sword Ancestor chose the Eight Extreme Tower as the place for his breakthrough, and invited many friends to come and observe, including quite a few lords of the Immortal Realm.
Eight Extreme Tower.
One Eternal Realm expert after another, along with members of the Eight Extreme Tower, came here to wait for Star Sword Ancestor’s breakthrough.
Not long after, a massive source energy vortex formed around the Eight Extreme Tower, and boundless innate eternal rules poured into Star Sword Ancestor’s body, merging with it. The fusion of innate eternal rules with the body was a necessary condition for becoming an Eternal Realm existence.
In the Nine Extreme Realm, it was very easy for the body to fuse with innate eternal rules, so Star Sword Ancestor would not need much time before breaking through to become an Eternal Realm existence, and an Immortal Realm existence at that, leaping directly over the two great realms of the Longevity Realm and the Immortal Extinction Realm.
Hum hum hum!!!!
A giant sword covering the entire time-space territory appeared, enveloping this time-space territory and the surrounding void region.
And a towering body projection transformed into a heaven-shaking giant, as if one hand could encompass an entire time-space territory.
That towering figure was Star Sword Ancestor, and all of this was merely the overflow of power from his breakthrough.
Within the time-space territory, many beings did not dare look directly at Star Sword Ancestor’s body projection. If anyone dared to look directly, their body and soul would be frozen, and time-space would also solidify. Only Eight Extreme Realm experts dared to directly witness Star Sword Ancestor’s breakthrough.
After a long time, Star Sword Ancestor’s breakthrough was finally complete.
At this moment.
Star Sword Ancestor’s voice spread out.
“Everyone, please come in!”
Very soon, everyone saw Star Sword Ancestor.
At this time, Star Sword Ancestor’s aura still could not be fully restrained, so a trace of the Immortal Realm aura leaked out, causing great suppression upon many Eight Extreme Realm experts. Even Ye Tian felt a faint suppression.
“An Immortal Realm lord!”
Many Eight Extreme Realm experts looked at Star Sword Ancestor with great envy.
There were too few Immortal Realm lords in the entire time-space territory, and now Star Sword Ancestor had also stepped into this level, standing among the very top ranks of the time-space territory.
“Greetings, Star Lord!”
The Eight Extremes all said respectfully.
No matter what, Star Sword Ancestor was no longer a half-step Eternal Realm existence, but an Eternal Realm lord, and moreover one at the Immortal Realm level. Aside from Ye Tian, no one else dared be disrespectful toward Star Lord.
“Today, I have proved the Immortal Path, so I shall give a lecture here. From today onward, I will no longer be a member of the Eight Extreme Tower.”
Star Lord said.
The other Eight Extreme Realm experts remained silent. The Eight Extreme Tower was originally a joint force of Eight Extreme Realm or Nine Extreme Realm experts, and once someone broke through to the Eternal Realm, they had to leave the Eight Extreme Tower. That was the rule.
So they did not try to stop Star Lord.
After that.
Star Lord expounded on his own path, and even spoke of many experiences such as how to charge into the Eternal Realm and how to charge into the Nine Extreme Realm. This lecture lasted a full one hundred thousand years before it finally ended.
Afterward, Star Lord and Ye Tian chatted privately.
“Endless Ancestor, your degree of fusion between will and body has probably long since surpassed ten percent. When do you plan to charge into the Eternal Realm?”
Star Lord asked curiously.
“I’ll wait a bit longer. I myself am a source sea being, so I have no lifespan limit, and there’s no rush!” Ye Tian said with a smile.
“That’s true!” Star Lord nodded slightly, but still reminded him: “However, Endless Ancestor, there’s no need for you to stay in the Nine Extreme Realm for too long. Only after becoming an Immortal Realm existence will your strength become greater, allowing you to obtain more opportunities. In the time-space territory, the Nine Extreme Realm actually isn’t that strong, and it’s hard to gain many benefits.”
“I understand!”
Ye Tian nodded.
……
“Star Sword Ancestor has broken through to the Eternal Realm. In this era of the time-space territory, I’m the only Nine Extreme Realm expert left!”
Ye Tian murmured.
At this time.
His strength had already approached a limit. He had gained many benefits in the ruins of the Silent Void Battlefield, and had also obtained many inheritances, even secret techniques that could improve his will—similar to the Will World, and even stronger than the Will World—which made it much easier for Ye Tian to perfect the secret technique of the Will World.
In addition, Ye Tian had also found some treasures that could strengthen and temper his will. By now, he had already opened up fifty thousand Will Worlds, and his will had fused further with the innate eternal rules.
As for the fusion between will and body, it had finally reached the level of thirty percent.
Not only that, Ye Tian had also created a legendary-level will Eternal Technique, greatly increasing his strength.
Moreover, Ye Tian’s half-step Eternal power had also been compressed almost to its current limit, compressed by nearly 300 times.
After some more years passed, Ye Tian’s strength improvement became slower and slower, to the point of almost stagnating.
Moreover, it had also become difficult for him to hunt Void Beasts now.
In the end, Ye Tian decided to first break through to the Eternal Realm. Then he would be able to copy the body of a Void Beast, making it much easier to hunt Void Beasts. Even after breaking through to the Immortal Realm, it would be somewhat harder to improve the fusion of will and body, but at least he would have a large amount of Void Beast materials, and his cultivation speed would definitely be faster than it was now.
Thus, he no longer hesitated and had his true body break through directly in the Source Sea, without notifying anyone.
Dark Forbidden Domain.
Ye Tian chose to break through here. Once he completed the breakthrough, the Dark Forbidden Domain would probably undergo another transformation and surpass the level of Eternal Heavens.
During the breakthrough process, Ye Tian spread the word and ordered the human race not to look directly at his breakthrough process.
After that, Ye Tian officially began his breakthrough.
Boom!!!!!
Boundless innate eternal rules, under Ye Tian’s control, began to merge with his body.
Gradually, every particle of his body completely fused with the innate eternal rules, transforming into innate eternal particles.
At the same time, boundless source energy poured into Ye Tian’s body, helping him complete the final qualitative transformation.
Ye Tian’s aura also became more and more terrifying, spreading throughout the entire Dark Forbidden Domain and even the boundless territories around it.
At this moment, Ye Tian seemed to have transformed into a giant, with one foot enough to crush many Eternal Heavens. Even all the endless living beings in the Source Sea seemed to sense a terrifying existence. They could not look directly at it, could not see it, yet still faintly sensed it in the dark.
After a long time.
Ye Tian’s body completed its final transformation. His body and the innate eternal rules had already completely fused, and from now on, every casual strike of his would be the most perfect utilization of the innate eternal rules, every blow being an attack like innate eternal rules themselves.
Not only that, because his will and body had fused, and the degree of fusion had reached more than thirty percent, his will surged dramatically, and his bodily strength also surged dramatically.
Now, Ye Tian had not only entered the Immortal Realm, but even among Immortal Realm experts, he was considered a relatively powerful one.
Based on the fusion of will and body, Eternal Realm experts regarded a ten percent fusion as just having advanced into the Immortal Realm, known as a One-Step Immortal Realm existence, while a ninety percent fusion was a Nine-Step Immortal Realm existence. Ye Tian had now taken the third step, becoming a Three-Step Immortal Realm existence.
But if one also counted the legendary will Eternal Technique and many other legendary Eternal Techniques, his strength was probably far greater than that of many Four-Step, Five-Step, or even Six-Step Immortal Realm experts.

Chapter 1681: An Untouchable Eternal Supreme Treasure!

Chapter 1681: An Untouchable Eternal Supreme Treasure!

The ruins of the Shixu battlefield.
Several of Ye Tian’s clone bodies had also one by one reached the Immortal Realm, and as the clone bodies grew stronger, they could naturally delve deeper into the battlefield ruins and gain more harvests.
For example, the deeper parts of the Shixu battlefield ruins—Ye Tian had never gone in before, because that place was densely covered with the power of Legendary Lords. With his cultivation at the Nine Extreme Realm before, there was simply no way to get close; once he did, he would immediately be killed across space and time by the power of a Legendary Lord.
But now, Ye Tian had broken through to the Eternal Realm and become an Immortal Realm Lord, and moreover a Three-Step Immortal Realm Lord. His strength was much greater than that of ordinary Immortal Realm experts, so he had some hope of reaching the core of the Shixu battlefield here.
“Let’s try it!”
Ye Tian crossed one area after another of the battlefield ruins in a single step, ignoring the densely scattered void fragments and the many traces of power.
Very soon, Ye Tian arrived at the core region of the Shixu battlefield ruins, a place he had never been able to reach before.
Boom!!!!
The power left behind by a Legendary Lord suppressed Ye Tian across time and space, but Ye Tian still relied on his formidable strength to forcibly withstand that suppression.
However, here, it was almost a void. Even if there had once been many treasures here, they simply could not withstand the attacks of a Legendary Lord; they had all been shattered into fragments, and so everything in sight was nothing but emptiness.
But Ye Tian still sensed one thing.
“That is...”
Ye Tian sensed a fragment. It seemed far away, yet somehow also very close.
“A treasure similar to the True Profound Dao Mark Tree and that mysterious sword?”
Ye Tian murmured.
Such a treasure could not even be touched by a Legendary Lord, and he also could not reach it at all.
But then he thought that the thing here was only a tiny fragment—perhaps he could touch it?
So he forcibly moved through it.
Hum!!!!
Layers upon layers of temporal-spatial barriers blocked Ye Tian, but relying on the power of the Immortal Realm and the powerful force of his will, he extended one hand, shattering layer after layer of temporal-spatial barriers, and finally touched that fragment.
Bang!
Ye Tian seized the fragment directly and pulled it over, then used all his strength to suppress and seal it.
After a long while, the fragment was sealed layer by layer by Ye Tian, and it no longer looked so special.
It was a cyan fragment, about the size of a palm, exuding an aura far beyond the Legendary level.
This fragment was enough to be counted as the most precious item in this ruin world, and it could even be said to be the most precious item on Ye Tian’s person besides the clone talent.
Whoosh!
Ye Tian left this place, then found a safe location and carefully comprehended this fragment.
Following the fragment’s aura, Ye Tian’s perception pierced through endless time and space and saw a great bell.
It was a cyan great bell, filled with endless profound patterns, and that aura was enough to destroy everything and suppress endless time and space.
Dong!
A bell toll rang out, crossing endless time and space and directly causing the clone body Ye Tian had here to crack. Fortunately, this power was relatively weak, so it did not kill this clone body of Ye Tian.
However, Ye Tian still gleaned some information from it.
This fragment was a fragment of that cyan great bell. In a great battle, the cyan great bell was shattered, leaving behind this fragment.
“An Eternal Supreme Treasure!”
Ye Tian slowly uttered these four words.
That cyan great bell was actually an Eternal Supreme Treasure, a weapon far, far more powerful than something like an Eternal Origin Weapon or a Void Saint Weapon.
The Source Sea Space-Time Territory had never given birth to an Eternal Supreme Treasure, so Ye Tian did not know much about them.
But this time, he had gained a great deal of inheritance from the ruins, and among it was an introduction to Eternal Supreme Treasures.
Eternal Supreme Treasures could form an endless temporal-spatial domain. Without sufficient strength, one simply could not touch an Eternal Supreme Treasure. Moreover, Eternal Supreme Treasures could also form projections, so sometimes the Eternal Supreme Treasure one saw was not truly here, but in some unknown place infinitely far away.
In addition, some special things, though not Eternal Supreme Treasures, were still similar treasures and could produce similar effects.
For example, the True Profound Dao Mark Tree was clearly not an Eternal Supreme Treasure, but it was a treasure of this level.
Whether the True Profound Dao Mark Tree and that mysterious sword were truly here in the Time-Space Territory, or merely projections, Ye Tian was not sure, because he had not yet reached that level of strength and could not touch the truth.
However, the fragment before him was indeed a genuine fragment of an Eternal Supreme Treasure, and it was truly in his hands.
An Eternal Supreme Treasure not only possessed tremendous power, but could also have special effects.
As for what special effect this fragment of an Eternal Supreme Treasure had, Ye Tian did not know yet; he would need to slowly comprehend it before he could find out.
Time slowly passed, and Ye Tian continued studying this fragment of the Eternal Supreme Treasure. He even made mistakes several times, causing the power of the fragment to erupt and shatter the clone body.
But through repeated study, he still came to understand the uses of this fragment of the Eternal Supreme Treasure.
It had three uses for Ye Tian.
The first use was that it could briefly form layer upon layer of temporal-spatial barriers, which could be used to block other people’s attacks, but it consumed a great deal of power and could only serve as a trump card.
The second use was that it could break any spatial barrier; for example, he could use it to leave this ruin world, or even enter many places without restriction.
The third use was the real opportunity: Ye Tian could comprehend all sorts of applications of the Eternal Space Dao from this fragment, thereby creating Space Legendary Eternal Techniques, and even stronger Eternal Techniques.
If it were forged into a blessed land, it could even allow the human race to comprehend Space Eternal Techniques in such a blessed land.
“What a pity it’s only a fragment. If it were a complete Eternal Supreme Treasure, how wonderful that would be!” Ye Tian sighed.
But on second thought, if it really were a complete Eternal Supreme Treasure, he would not be able to take it away either.
In the days that followed, Ye Tian began to familiarize himself with this fragment of the Eternal Supreme Treasure.
After a long time, Ye Tian prepared to leave this ruin world.
Thus, he activated this fragment of the Eternal Supreme Treasure, directly tearing apart the barrier of the ruin world and creating a fissure, allowing him to leave the ruin world with ease.
In fact, he could also have left through some other cracks, but there were bound to be layers upon layers of traps arranged by the void beasts there, and there might even be a Tier 5 void beast targeting him.
But now that he had suddenly opened a fissure and charged out of the ruin world, he would certainly be beyond those void beasts’ expectations, thereby giving him time to break out and leave.
Ye Tian only sent one clone body out, and it did not carry the fragment of the Eternal Supreme Treasure.
Once it left the ruin world, this clone body of Ye Tian immediately moved at extreme speed and even used Uninterrupted Space.
Boom!!!!
That Tier 5 void beast made its move and pursued Ye Tian.
Along the way.
Ye Tian kept attacking the void beasts that blocked his way, displaying formidable Immortal Realm battle strength.
When the Tier 5 void beast struck, Ye Tian resisted it with his will-defense Eternal Technique combined with Void True Body. Only then was he not killed instantly, though he still suffered heavy injuries.
“This ability seems a bit like the abilities of our race?”
The Tier 5 void beast was extremely puzzled.
But Ye Tian was clearly not a void beast, so it showed no mercy.
Ye Tian had no intention whatsoever of fighting the Tier 5 void beast; he only kept fleeing, at any cost, as far as he could.
In the end, however, this clone body was still killed.
But all of this had been within Ye Tian’s expectations.
After killing this clone body of Ye Tian, the Tier 5 void beast left, clearly believing that Ye Tian was no longer in that ruin world.
And this region also returned to tranquility. What the Tier 5 void beast did not know was that another clone body of Ye Tian, which had always remained in this area, appeared and arrived at a spot along Ye Tian’s escape route.
Hum!
A small void region cracked open, and a void sphere was pulled out.
Ye Tian directly took this void sphere away, and it disappeared without a trace.
The real purpose of having one clone body leave the ruin world this time was not to escape. A clone body was nothing; there was no need to run away. His true purpose was to send out resources.
The clone body outside lacked resources and could not continue condensing clone bodies. It was also completely impossible to replicate a void beast’s body to hunt other void beasts.
Therefore, he had to send out the massive resources collected in the ruin world.
Just now, the Tier 5 void beast had been focused only on chasing Ye Tian, and coupled with Ye Tian’s deliberate concealment, this void sphere had been hidden away.
Now that the resources were in hand, he only needed to leave one clone body in the ruin world to comprehend the fragment of the Eternal Supreme Treasure. The other clone bodies could be condensed outside, as part of the plan to hunt void beasts.
This was his true perfect plan!.

Chapter 1682: Combat Power Second Only to a Legendary Lord!

Chapter 1682: Combat Power Second Only to a Legendary Lord!

“Copy!”
Ye Tian spent some resources to copy a body of a third-tier Nihility Beast.
At that time, he could completely hide a copied body inside the third-tier Nihility Beast’s body, and then hunt other Nihility Beasts, while easily evading the pursuit of other Nihility Beasts.
Moreover, Ye Tian could switch to another Nihility Beast body again and again. Even a fifth-tier Nihility Beast would be unable to find his existence.
In this way, he could hunt a large number of Nihility Beasts in a short period of time.
……
Somewhere in the Nihility region.
A first-tier Nihility Beast was roaming aimlessly when a third-tier Nihility Beast suddenly appeared.
This third-tier Nihility Beast was none other than Ye Tian.
When the first-tier Nihility Beast saw the third-tier Nihility Beast, it conveyed a sense of reverence and then silently prepared to avoid it.
But at that moment, the third-tier Nihility Beast that Ye Tian had copied immediately attacked the first-tier Nihility Beast. At the same time, the copied body also shuttled out from within the third-tier Nihility Beast’s body and used an intent eternal technique to attack this third-tier Nihility Beast.
Almost in an instant, that first-tier Nihility Beast was instantly killed by Ye Tian.
Then, Ye Tian collected the corpse of that first-tier Nihility Beast and once again entered the third-tier Nihility Beast’s body.
In the days that followed, Ye Tian used this method to kill many first-tier Nihility Beasts, and even occasionally targeted second-tier Nihility Beasts, but he was never caught. After all, no one would have thought that a fierce beast would contain a third-tier Nihility Beast.
After hunting many Nihility Beasts, Ye Tian prepared to rest for a period of time and refine the materials from these Nihility Beasts to enhance the fusion of his intent and body. Once the materials were used up, he would continue hunting Nihility Beasts.
As time passed, the degree of fusion between Ye Tian’s intent and body grew higher and higher.
However, first-tier Nihility Beasts were no longer of much help to Ye Tian. If he were to step into the Lord level of the Four-Step Immortal Realm, first-tier Nihility Beasts would probably be of no use at all. By then, he would have to rely on second-tier or even third-tier Nihility Beasts.
After many long years, Ye Tian’s Nihility Beast materials were completely exhausted.
So on this day, he began hunting Nihility Beasts again.
At this time, although the fifth-tier Nihility Beasts knew that a powerful being was hunting Nihility Beasts, they had no way to deal with it.
At first, they could still more or less ignore such losses, but as a large number of second-tier Nihility Beasts fell, they became anxious.
And whenever Ye Tian’s third-tier Nihility Beast was exposed, he would immediately switch to another third-tier Nihility Beast.
As time went on, the fifth-tier Nihility Beasts even suspected that many third-tier Nihility Beasts were participating in such hunts, and in the end they had no choice but to restrain their subordinates and gather them all together, forbidding them from going out privately.
In this way, Ye Tian really had no way to continue hunting.
But.
He could not hunt here, but the Nihility region was not limited to these Nihility Beasts alone. There were also other Nihility Beasts.
Therefore, Ye Tian would never lack Nihility Beast materials.
One Eternal Year after another passed, and Ye Tian’s strength also grew stronger and stronger.
After 300 Eternal Years, the degree of fusion between Ye Tian’s intent and body had reached sixty percent, and at this point even second-tier Nihility Beasts were of no use to him.
His cultivation had reached the Lord level of the Six-Step Immortal Realm, but his true strength was probably even stronger than a Nine-Step Immortal Realm Lord.
Because, with the help of the Eternal Treasure fragment, Ye Tian had created two of the most top-tier legendary eternal techniques.
One was Nihility Step, which allowed him to instantly cross vast stretches of the Nihility region; in terms of speed, even a Legendary Lord was probably inferior to him.
This was a high-level application of the Eternal Spatial Dao. Without that Eternal Treasure fragment, Ye Tian would also have found it very difficult to create such a top-tier legendary eternal technique.
The second legendary eternal technique was Myriad Layers of Nihility, a spatial legendary eternal technique involving intent. It created endless layers of void to suppress enemies; if the enemy’s strength was relatively weak, they would be directly crushed into nothingness.
In order to create these two legendary eternal techniques, Ye Tian spent a full 300 Eternal Years. And this was with the help of the Eternal Treasure fragment; if he had relied on himself alone, he would simply not have been able to create such legendary eternal techniques.
It could be imagined how powerful these two legendary eternal techniques were, far surpassing ordinary legendary eternal techniques.
With these two top-tier legendary eternal techniques, plus other legendary eternal techniques and a large number of intent eternal techniques, even though his cultivation had only reached the Lord level of the Six-Step Immortal Realm, he had already far surpassed other Immortal Realm Lords.
Many Immortal Realm Lords probably did not even know a single legendary eternal technique, or at most only one or two.
“In the Source Sea Time-Space Territory, my strength is probably second only to the six Legendary Lords!”
Ye Tian murmured.
This day.
Ye Tian prepared to leave the depths of the Nihility region; there was no need to continue staying here.
First- and second-tier Nihility Beasts were of little use to him, and if he wanted to kill third-tier Nihility Beasts, he simply could not achieve instant annihilation. And once third-tier Nihility Beasts were given time, fifth-tier Nihility Beasts would descend.
So, he did not plan to continue hunting Nihility Beasts.
Relying on Nihility Beast materials could indeed improve the fusion of intent and body, but it was very difficult to use Nihility Beast materials to break through to the Legendary Lord realm.
The six Legendary Lords of the Time-Space Territory absolutely did not break through by relying on Nihility Beast materials.
The Time-Space Territory also had many unknown opportunities, some of which might not be inferior to opportunities like the Nihility Beasts.
This day.
Ye Tian’s copied body in the relic world rushed out of the relic world, and the other Nihility Beasts simply could not intercept it.
Afterward, this copied body hid within a third-tier Nihility Beast’s body and evaded the pursuit of the fifth-tier Nihility Beasts.
Then, this third-tier Nihility Beast took Ye Tian farther and farther away from this area, shuttling toward the Source Sea Time-Space Territory.
Ye Tian used Nihility Step, and his body crossed the vast Nihility region. Before long, he returned to the Time-Space Territory and also successfully brought back that Eternal Treasure fragment.
Dark Forbidden Domain.
Ye Tian placed the Eternal Treasure fragment here, and used the Eternal Treasure fragment to create a treasure space. Only the true core members of the human race had the chance to enter here to cultivate, while his true body had also been guarding this place all along, constantly cultivating with the Eternal Treasure fragment.
He did not want to carry such an Eternal Treasure fragment on a copied body. If it were to fall in the Time-Space Territory or some other treasure land, wouldn’t the Eternal Treasure fragment be lost?
Therefore, placing such an Eternal Treasure fragment in the Dark Forbidden Domain was undoubtedly the safest method.
This day.
Ye Tian prepared to select a Time-Space Territory in the Time-Space Territory as his own territory. After all, if in the future the human race gave birth to a Half-Step Eternal Realm or an Extreme Realm, they could also be brought into the Time-Space Territory to cultivate. Therefore, he must have a piece of Time-Space Territory that belonged to him.
After all, every Lord in the Time-Space Territory had their own Time-Space Territory, and he had already become an Immortal Realm Lord. If he did not have a Time-Space Territory of his own, that would be far too strange.

Chapter 1683: Territory Selection, Bloodbone Territory!

Chapter 1683: Territory Selection, Bloodbone Territory!

There are many territories in the Time-Space Domain that are ownerless, and any lord can occupy them, and they will be recognized by the Lord Alliance.
But if you are not a lord, you can only occupy a place here, but you cannot claim the title of lord. If another lord occupies it, you must give it up; this is the rule of the Lord Alliance.
Territories vary in quality. Some territories give birth to more resources, while others give birth to fewer resources.
What Ye Tian most wanted to occupy was naturally an Eternal Time-Space Territory. The value of an Eternal Time-Space Territory far exceeded that of ordinary Time-Space Territories.
For ordinary Eternal Realms, an Eternal Time-Space Territory was an enormous opportunity.
For example, when the Source Sea gave birth to the Eternal Knowledge Golden Sea Tree back then, so many Eternal Realms fought over it because the Eternal Knowledge Golden Sea Tree could allow an ordinary territory to evolve into an Eternal Time-Space Territory over a certain span of years.
In the end, that Eternal Knowledge Golden Sea Tree was taken away by the Void Sword Lord.
Unfortunately, the Time-Space Domain today did not have any extra Eternal Time-Space Territories. On top of that, Void Beast materials could enhance the fusion of will and body, causing some Eternal Realm lords who were at the half-step Immortal Realm to break through their shackles one after another and advance to the Immortal Realm.
Right now, there were still several Immortal Realm experts who did not have Eternal Time-Space Territories.
Ye Tian could of course seize someone else’s Eternal Time-Space Territory, but once he did that, he would become the target of public criticism.
“Then I’ll occupy a Time-Space Territory with abundant resources and slowly find a way to evolve it into an Eternal Time-Space Territory!”
Ye Tian murmured.
Afterward, he began examining the conditions of one Time-Space Territory after another, selecting a relatively good one.
However, the relatively good Time-Space Territories had already been chosen by those Eternal Realms, so the remaining ones were bound not to be very good.
On this day.
Ye Tian came to the Time-Space Territory of the Star-Observing Lord—Star-Observing Territory.
This was a territory occupied by the Star-Observing Lord long ago. It was fairly good, and no other Eternal Realm would come to choose the Star-Observing Territory, otherwise they would be offending him, because it had always been in an ownerless state.
Only after he had broken through to the Eternal Realm previously did he name the territory Star-Observing Territory.
“Lord of the Endless, welcome to my territory as a guest!”
The Star-Observing Lord personally came forward and welcomed Ye Tian into the Star-Observing Territory.
The two sat in the void within a huge palace and chatted casually.
Suddenly.
Ye Tian asked, “Star-Observing Lord, I came to ask for your guidance. There are too many territories in the Time-Space Domain—not exactly endless, but certainly numbering in the billions. I want to choose a decent Time-Space Territory, but I’ve been unable to make up my mind.”
The Star-Observing Lord smiled and said, “Lord of the Endless, there really are not many good territories left now. Unless a territory with enormous value suddenly appears, you can only choose one that looks passable. Moreover, every territory has its own characteristics. It may have little value to other Eternal Realms, but to some Eternal Realms it has great value. For example, my Star-Observing Territory contains more sword dao laws, making it suitable for cultivating sword dao, which is why I chose it.”
“Actually, I want to choose a Time-Space Territory with more resources, or one with enormous potential,” Ye Tian said frankly.
“Lord of the Endless, Time-Space Territories that can give birth to many resources have always been highly sought after. Last time, many Eternal Realms fell in our Time-Space Domain, but the Lord Alliance has a rule: once an Eternal Realm falls, its territory is inherited by its relatives. As long as a new Eternal Realm is born within ten million Eternal years, the territory can be fully inherited. If not for this rule, one could simply occupy a resource-rich territory whose lord had fallen.” The Star-Observing Lord said.
“Forget it, that would be a bit too much!” Ye Tian waved his hand, having no such intention.
The Star-Observing Lord pondered for a while and said, “Lord of the Endless, there is indeed one Time-Space Territory that is very mysterious, and it also gives birth to quite a few resources, but no one has ever dared to refine it into their own territory.”
“Oh? Which territory?”
Ye Tian was curious.
“Bloodbone Territory!” said the Star-Observing Lord.
“Bloodbone Territory?” Ye Tian had vaguely heard of this name, but there were too many territories in the Time-Space Domain, and he spent much of his time cultivating, so he was not very clear about it.
At this, the Star-Observing Lord introduced it: “Bloodbone Territory is famous in the Time-Space Domain for one sea and one mountain, but very few Eternal Realms enter Bloodbone Territory. The sea in Bloodbone Territory refers to the Black Sea, and the mountain refers to Purple Mountain. The Black Sea is formed from the blood of an unknown creature, and it is very likely to be comparable to the level of a legendary lord, or even stronger than a legendary lord. Purple Mountain, on the other hand, is formed from the bones of that unknown creature. The Black Sea gave birth to Black Scale Beasts, and these creatures are important resources for Supreme Beings or ordinary half-step Eternal Realms. As for the bone mountain, it produces all kinds of mineral veins, all of them worth a great deal.”
· ·········求鮮花··· ·····
“Then why hasn’t any lord refined it into a territory?”
Ye Tian asked in confusion.
“Because every so often, Bloodbone Territory produces a special blood-colored force. Even ordinary Eternal Realms have difficulty withstanding it. Although it is not enough to cause them to fall, it is extremely painful. Moreover, mining the resources of the Black Sea and Bloodbone Territory is also rather troublesome. Immortal Realms look down on such a territory, while ordinary Eternal Realms do not dare to refine it. Of course, the real reason is not this, after all, a territory with such abundant resources would certainly tempt someone.”
“The real trouble is that an ancient Black Scale Beast is slumbering in the Black Sea, and its strength is probably at the Immortal Realm. It is precisely because of this Immortal Realm unknown creature that many Eternal Realms do not dare to rashly mine the resources. Occasionally, some half-step Eternal Realms enter to mine resources, but they do not dare stay for too long, because the unknown blood-colored force follows almost no pattern. Some Eternal Realms have speculated that if that Black Scale Beast were killed, perhaps the blood-colored force would also be resolved, and this territory would return to normal. However, Eternal Realms below the lord level of Immortal Realms simply do not dare to trouble that Black Scale Beast, and Immortal Realm lords all have Eternal Time-Space Territories. Compared with Eternal Time-Space Territories, Bloodbone Territory is still far inferior. Thus, the problem of Bloodbone Territory has never been resolved.”
..... 0 .......
“Previously, I had indeed set my sights on Bloodbone Territory, but after thinking it over carefully, the resources in Bloodbone Territory could not improve my strength, and I still prefer Star-Observing Territory more. So I gave up on Bloodbone Territory. Lord of the Endless, your strength is now much greater than mine, so perhaps you can give it a try. If you can solve that Black Scale Beast and resolve the problem of the blood-colored force, the potential of this territory would probably be extraordinary.”
After the Star-Observing Lord finished speaking, Ye Tian fell into thought.
It had to be said that Bloodbone Territory indeed met his requirements, except that Bloodbone Territory still had some trouble and needed to be dealt with.
That Black Scale Beast clearly did not have much intelligence and could not be considered an Eternal Realm lord; otherwise, it would have refined Bloodbone Territory itself.
Slaying such a Black Scale Beast would not be stopped by the Lord Alliance.
“Then I’ll choose Bloodbone Territory!”
Ye Tian made his decision and.
