Chapter 1684: Refining the Territory and Becoming the Lord!

Chapter 1684: Refining the Territory and Becoming the Lord!

Blood Bone Territory.
After Ye Tian parted ways with the Watcher Lord, he headed straight here and arrived in the void region outside Blood Bone Territory.
At this moment, his gaze penetrated the spacetime barrier of Blood Bone Territory and saw the interior of Blood Bone Territory.
He saw some Half-Step Eternal Realm experts slowly gathering resources within Blood Bone Territory.
Blood Bone Territory had abundant resources. Even though it was very dangerous, there were still quite a few Half-Step Eternal Realm experts willing to come here and take the risk.
“This one is the Lord of Endless, and I am about to purge Blood Bone Territory. To prevent you from being affected, leave Blood Bone Territory immediately.”
Ye Tian’s voice entered Blood Bone Territory and was heard by many Half-Step Eternal Realm experts.
Immediately, some Half-Step Eternal Realm experts left Blood Bone Territory, but there were still a very small number of Half-Step Eternal Realm experts who did not leave.
As for these people unwilling to leave, Ye Tian no longer tried to persuade them. If any special changes were caused during the battle, or if they were affected and died, that would be their own choice.
Whoosh!
Ye Tian entered Blood Bone Territory and headed straight for the Black Sea.
Boom!!!
A large number of black-scaled beasts sensed Ye Tian’s arrival and all rushed to attack him.
These black-scaled beasts varied in strength. There were black-scaled beasts comparable to Supreme Beings, and there were also black-scaled beasts comparable to Half-Step Eternal Realm experts, but the black-scaled beast comparable to an Immortal Realm expert did not appear. It was still sleeping deep within the Black Sea.
“Die!”
Ye Tian uttered a single word, and the large number of black-scaled beasts turned into corpses, one by one falling into the Black Sea. The Black Sea within an area of billions of domains instantly fell into deathly silence.
At the same time.
Ye Tian unleashed the legendary eternal technique—Will-Slaying Void Sword, and with one sword strike he slashed at the black-scaled beast sleeping deep within the Black Sea.
With a splurt!
This legendary eternal technique of will directly struck the other party, even erasing part of its consciousness.
Roar!!!!
The Immortal Realm black-scaled beast let out a miserable scream and awoke from its slumber.
Immediately, the entire Black Sea boiled, and even Blood Bone Territory began to quake. A blood-colored force swept across Blood Bone Territory.
Those Half-Step Eternal Realm experts who were still staying in Blood Bone Territory were eroded by this blood-colored force and immediately turned into corpses, dying one after another. Only a few powerful Half-Step Eternal Realm experts barely saved their lives by relying on some secret treasures and escaped in time.
“Comparable to a Four-Step Immortal Realm lord!”
Ye Tian truly understood the strength of this black-scaled beast, and he was no longer worried at all.
Next, he used Void True Body and Will Barrier Light to place himself in an invincible position, then repeatedly unleashed various legendary eternal techniques to attack, beating this Immortal Realm black-scaled beast until it had no ability to resist at all.
When the Immortal Realm black-scaled beast was heavily injured, Ye Tian unleashed his most top-tier legendary eternal technique—Myriad Layers of Void!
Buzz!!!
Layer after layer of void began to stack and suppress the Immortal Realm black-scaled beast, as if endless void had been compressed into a single layer.
In the blink of an eye, the Immortal Realm black-scaled beast was completely suppressed into countless fragments, and countless body particles lost all vitality.
Such an Immortal Realm black-scaled beast was instantly killed by Ye Tian in one move.
After killing this black-scaled beast, the greatest threat in Blood Bone Territory was basically gone, but Ye Tian still needed to understand what that blood-colored force came from.
He could tell that although the black-scaled beast had some connection to that blood-colored force, the blood-colored force was not unleashed by the black-scaled beast.
Deep within the Black Sea.
Ye Tian came here, and his will kept probing the area.
Very soon, his will detected a red mountain range. This red mountain range was an underwater mountain range, but it was not very large.
In truth, this was not a real underwater mountain range, but something transformed from a bone.
More importantly, this bone still had a faint trace of vitality.
As Ye Tian approached this bone, he felt a terrifying pressure. This was definitely a bone from a legendary lord-level creature.
When Ye Tian touched this bone, a crimson force struck over, but it was blocked by Ye Tian’s Will Barrier Light.
Even so, Ye Tian still suffered an impact, but he was not injured.
“The blood-colored force in Blood Bone Territory should come from this!”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
After examining it, he discovered that this bone was almost connected to Blood Bone Territory itself. It would be somewhat difficult to separate it from Blood Bone Territory.
Or rather, the source of the blood bone power was this bone. If it were stripped away, then even if Blood Bone Territory could remain, it would become an extremely ordinary territory with almost no value.
During the years that followed, Ye Tian began studying this bone of a legendary lord-level creature that still emitted a trace of vitality.
He did not want that blood-colored force to erupt frequently; otherwise, Blood Bone Territory would not be suitable for cultivation, and he also would not dare to bring human Half-Step Eternal Realm experts here.
After a long period of study, Ye Tian discovered that the bone’s power was simply too strong, and Blood Bone Territory was unable to absorb this power in time, causing it to leak out........
At present.
Ye Tian had two methods to resolve this situation. The first was to set up a great formation to absorb the bone’s power, so that no blood-colored force shockwave would be formed; the second was to upgrade Blood Bone Territory into an Eternal Spacetime Territory. In that case, Blood Bone Territory’s need to upgrade would increase its absorption of the bone’s power, thereby completely solving this trouble.
Therefore, the second method was the most suitable.
“Then let’s use the second method!”
Ye Tian decided.
However, for a spacetime territory like Blood Bone Territory to advance into an Eternal Spacetime Territory, the difficulty was slightly greater, more arduous than other spacetime territories.
But he was an Immortal Realm lord. If he refined Blood Bone Territory, he could accelerate Blood Bone Territory’s evolution.
It was just like some Immortal Realm lords occupying a spacetime territory; even without treasures that could help the spacetime territory advance, after countless eternal years, the spacetime territory would still slowly evolve into an Eternal Spacetime Territory.
This was the feedback an Immortal Realm lord gave to a spacetime territory.
For example, when Ye Tian broke through in the Dark Forbidden Domain, the Dark Forbidden Domain had been expanding ever since. Although the expansion speed had now slowed by many times, it was still gradually growing larger, and the resources born there had increased as well.
On this day.
Ye Tian began refining Blood Bone Territory.
The way an Eternal Realm expert refined a spacetime territory was to use their own innate eternal rules to refine the innate eternal rules within the spacetime territory, thereby completely replacing the innate eternal rules here, and then refine the origin of the spacetime territory to become a lord.
Boom!!!!
The innate eternal rules of Blood Bone Territory simply could not contend with an Immortal Realm lord, and Ye Tian very easily refined the innate eternal rules here.
Very soon, Ye Tian’s innate eternal rule power eroded the origin of Blood Bone Territory and began refining its origin.
As time passed, Blood Bone Territory was gradually refined by Ye Tian.
Finally, on this day, Blood Bone Territory completely became Ye Tian’s territory.
He became the lord of Blood Bone Territory.
Afterwards, he reported to the Lord Alliance that Blood Bone Territory had become his territory, declaring the ownership of this place.
In other words, starting from today, no Half-Step Eternal Realm expert was allowed to enter Blood Bone Territory to privately mine resources; all the resources here would henceforth belong to Ye Tian alone.

Chapter 1685: A Transaction with Lord Binghan!

Chapter 1685: A Transaction with Lord Binghan!

Ye Tian had become the lord of the Blood Bone Domain, and naturally wanted to evolve it into an Eternal Space-Time Domain.
Only in this way would it match his strength and movement technique, and it could also give birth to a large amount of resources.
After all, compared with an Eternal Space-Time Domain, an ordinary space-time domain was far inferior in both area and cultivation environment, and only an Eternal Space-Time Domain was suitable for an Immortal Domain Lord to cultivate in. For an Immortal Domain Lord, staying in an ordinary space-time domain was completely slowing down cultivation speed.
At this moment.
Ye Tian was cultivating in the Blood Bone Domain, and his own body could even absorb the origin energy of the source sea, feeding it back into the Blood Bone Domain. This was one of the abilities of an Immortal Domain Lord.
If this continued for countless Eternal years, the Blood Bone Domain would truly evolve into an Eternal Space-Time Domain.
However, Ye Tian did not want to wait that long.
He planned to trade for a treasure with other Immortal Domain Lords to hasten the Blood Bone Domain’s evolution.
For ordinary Eternal Realm experts, such a treasure was bound to be incomparably precious, but for those top-tier Immortal Domain Lords, it was not too precious.
After all, an Eternal Realm lord could only refine one space-time domain, so having extra treasures of this kind was of little use, and they could not improve their strength either, so they could be traded away.
An Eternal Space-Time Domain, the Extreme Ice Domain.
This was the domain of Lord Binghan, one of the six chairmen. This domain was hundreds of thousands of times larger than the Blood Bone Domain, and Lord Binghan also used it as one of the trading places of the Lord Alliance. Many, many Eternal Realm experts could enter the Extreme Ice Giant City here to conduct trades.
With a legendary lord guarding it, no Eternal Realm expert would dare cause trouble here.
On this day.
Ye Tian arrived at the Extreme Ice Domain and entered the Extreme Ice Giant City.
Quite a few Eternal Realm lords had set up shops here, with a Half-Step Eternal Realm expert serving as the shopkeeper to manage the stores here. Some Immortal Domain Lords even had ordinary Eternal Life Realm lords manage their shops here, so it was quite lively.
However, in normal times, not many Immortal Domain Lords came here to buy things.
After entering Extreme Ice Giant City, Ye Tian did not enter those shops, because there was no way they would have what he needed. He went straight to the Extreme Ice Pavilion in Extreme Ice Giant City, which was Lord Binghan’s property. Only Immortal Domain Lords or Half-Step Immortal Domain Lords were qualified to enter here.
After every lord above Half-Step Immortal Domain Lord entered here, they could look at the purchasing information and purchase requests posted here. It was equivalent to providing a fair and just trading platform for powerhouses above Half-Step Immortal Domain Lord.
After entering the Extreme Ice Pavilion, Ye Tian browsed the various purchase missions and purchase requests here, and there were also several purchase requests for treasures that could evolve an ordinary space-time domain into an Eternal Space-Time Domain.
Clearly, in recent years, quite a few more people had advanced to Immortal Domain Lord, or perhaps some Half-Step Eternal Realm experts also hoped to obtain an Eternal Space-Time Domain.
“What a pity that the Eternal Insight Gold Sea Tree was snatched away by Lord Void Sword back then, and he had already used it up long ago. Otherwise, I could have traded for it from him,” Ye Tian thought to himself.
Then.
Ye Tian posted a purchase request and put forward his bargaining chip. If the chip were not enough, then even if other Immortal Domain Lords possessed such a treasure, they would not take it out for trade.
Ordinary treasures could not attract those Immortal Domain Lords, so Ye Tian planned to take out a treasure that would move many Immortal Domain Lords.
A secret art inheritance of the fusion of will and innate Eternal Rules!
In space-time domains, many Eternal Realm experts believed that will and innate Eternal Rules could not be fused. If such a secret art appeared, it would inevitably cause a sensation.
Of course.
Such a secret art could not be cultivated, because it was not suitable for space-time domains; it could only be used as a reference.
Even so, the value of such a secret art was still extremely high.
Thus.
Ye Tian immediately posted this purchase request, and once it was posted, it would be sent to all Extreme Ice Pavilion members.
Not long after, three Eternal Realm experts contacted Ye Tian.
Two Immortal Domain Lords, and one legendary lord.
“Lord Binghan actually contacted me!”
Ye Tian was somewhat surprised by Lord Binghan’s contact. After thinking it over carefully, he decided to first meet and talk with Lord Binghan. After all, the treasure that could help an ordinary space-time domain advance was not precious at all to Lord Binghan, so her asking price would not be too high. As for the other Immortal Domain Lords, they might offer a very high price, and then the secret art might not necessarily be fully exchanged for, and they might even put forward other conditions.
So the one he most wanted to trade with was Lord Binghan.
The top floor of the Extreme Ice Pavilion.
Ye Tian and Lord Binghan came here. This was not Ye Tian’s first time meeting Lord Binghan, but it was the first time they were exchanging items.
“Six-Step Immortal Domain Lord, Lord Endless’s cultivation speed is truly fast. I remember Lord Endless had only just broken through to Eternal Realm not long ago, yet unexpectedly he has crossed into the realm of Six-Step Immortal Domain Lord so quickly,” Lord Binghan said with some surprise.
“Just some chance encounters,”
Ye Tian said modestly.
Soon, the two of them got to the main point.
Lord Binghan said, “Lord Endless, you have a secret art inheritance of the fusion of will and innate Eternal Rules. That kind of secret art cannot be cultivated, right?”
Ye Tian answered truthfully, “That’s right. That kind of secret art cannot be cultivated, but it can be used for reference, so its value is still very great.”
He knew Lord Binghan must have obtained a similar inheritance before, otherwise she would not have asked this.
He himself could obtain such an inheritance, so it was not strange at all for Lord Binghan, as a legendary lord, to have obtained one as well.
“Indeed, it can be used for reference, but I need to browse it first to confirm whether it is genuine. If it is real, I can trade with you and give you a treasure that can evolve a space-time domain into an Eternal Space-Time Domain,” Lord Binghan said.
At this time, Ye Tian handed over to Lord Binghan one inheritance technique he had obtained from the Silent Void Battlefield ruins.
Of course, the inheritance he gave was not complete. After all, the formal transaction had not yet begun, so naturally he would not give out the complete inheritance.
Lord Binghan browsed through it and confirmed its authenticity.
“It is indeed a true inheritance, and one I do not have. However, such an inheritance cannot be cultivated. In fact, for ordinary Eternal Realm experts, it has no value at all. I need five such inheritances,” Lord Binghan requested.
“Five inheritances? No problem!”
Ye Tian immediately took out five inheritances, and this time they were all complete inheritances.
Seeing that Ye Tian had really taken out five inheritances, Lord Binghan took a stone stele from her void sphere. It looked very small, but that was because Lord Binghan had shrunk the void where it was located; its true size was actually very large.
“This is the Heaven-Made Stele. Merging it into the source of a space-time domain can promote the evolution of the space-time domain. In addition, it can also strengthen the defense of the space-time domain,” Lord Binghan said.
“Good, let’s trade!”
Ye Tian and Lord Binghan exchanged the items and officially completed the transaction.
After the trade was completed, Lord Binghan suddenly smiled and said, “Lord Endless, I want to carry out another kind of transaction with you.”.

Chapter 1686 Black Mountain Prison, Immortal Realm Prisoners, Legendary Realm Prisoners!

Chapter 1686 Black Mountain Prison, Immortal Realm Prisoners, Legendary Realm Prisoners!

“What deal?”
Ye Tian was somewhat curious, and a little expectant as well.
Lord Binghan said, “Lord Endless, you obtained these inheritances. They should have been obtained from some relic, right? I want to know the location of that relic.”
“The location of the relic.”
Ye Tian understood Lord Binghan’s intention. She wanted to go to that relic and obtain some benefits, but in fact there were not many treasures left there. At the very least, he had not found any treasures there.
Thus, Ye Tian said, “Lord Binghan, that relic has no resources. It is merely a battlefield world. Inside, it is almost entirely ruins, with only some fragments of Eternal Realm corpses and building fragments. I only found some useless inheritances there. A relic like that has no value. Even so, does Lord Binghan still want to trade for this piece of information?”
“Yes, even if it is only ruins, I still want to go and take a look.” Lord Binghan nodded.
“Then what can I get?” Ye Tian asked.
Lord Binghan pondered for a moment, then said, “Lord Endless, I obtained information from here, so naturally I will give you a piece of information as well. For example, the location of another relic, and that relic still has some opportunities. It has great value even for Immortal Realm lords. Immortal Realm lords entering it may even obtain quite a few opportunities.”
“Alright, I am willing to trade!”
Ye Tian agreed.
Immediately after, Ye Tian told Lord Binghan the location of the Quiet Void Relic world, and roughly explained some of the situation there.
“It is actually within the Void Beast territory!” Lord Binghan was dumbfounded. She had thought the relic was in some unfamiliar void region far away from the Source Sea and the Time-Space territory, but she never expected it to be within the Void Beast territory.
She stared at Ye Tian closely and examined him carefully.
It was hard for her to imagine how Ye Tian had gotten there, because there were fifth-tier Void Beasts there, and Immortal Realm lords had no chance of entering that relic at all. Unless they condensed one clone after another to probe it, but who would dare waste so many resources condensing clone after clone? The price to pay was far too great.
However, for her, she was not afraid of fifth-tier Void Beasts.
She could completely force her way into that relic world, and fifth-tier Void Beasts would be unable to stop her. Unless many fifth-tier Void Beasts were mobilized to besiege her, but the Void Beasts could not know the situation in advance, so such a scenario practically did not exist.
Lord Binghan also kept her word and told Ye Tian about another relic.
After the trade was completed, Ye Tian left the Extreme Ice Pavilion.
Afterward, he prepared to head to the relic Lord Binghan had told him about.
That relic was not in the Time-Space territory; otherwise, it would have long since been impossible to keep hidden, and almost all Immortal Realm beings would know about it.
However, that relic was not far from the Time-Space territory. Yet the void region was too vast, boundless and endless, and Immortal Realm beings were very unaccustomed to the environment of the void region. Moreover, there were no rules here, so the range they could probe would not be very wide. This caused a relic in the void region to be very difficult for Immortal Realm beings to discover.
If there were no specific location, Ye Tian would have no way to find that relic.
Afterward, Ye Tian went alone to that relic, without informing the other Immortal Realm beings.
As for what this relic contained, and what dangers there were, Ye Tian knew nothing at all. But at most he would lose a copied body, so he did not care in the slightest.
Very quickly, Ye Tian entered the void region and used Void Step, traversing the void region at extremely high speed. He soon arrived at the location of that relic.
……
Somewhere in the void region, a black continent floated here. But if one did not approach, then from afar, this place appeared completely void, with no trace of any continent at all.
When Ye Tian drew near to this continent, the surrounding void distorted, and threads of Innate Eternal Laws actually appeared. Then he stepped onto this black continent.
“Space-time reversal; this black continent is not simple!”
Ye Tian murmured.
He looked around, sensing the power in all directions, as if he were bound by layers upon layers of space-time. Every bit of his perception that extended outward had to shatter layer after layer of space-time.
He lightly punched the void, yet it only caused faint ripples.
Clearly, the suppression of space-time and all things here had reached a terrifying degree.
Whoosh whoosh whoosh!!!
Ye Tian traversed a distance in one step and quickly arrived at a black mountain range in the center of the black continent. Within this black mountain range were many black mountains, and each black mountain looked rather strange.
When Ye Tian approached the black mountains and saw the ancient Stele on each of them, he then realized that these were not black mountains at all, but rather prisons.
Each black mountain was a prison binding enemies. Precisely because of this, the restraint and suppression of foreign objects here were so severe, and the black mountains themselves were the most terrifying seal, suppressing enemies and preventing them from ever emerging.
Which power had arranged this, Ye Tian had no way to investigate, but he quickly understood the meaning behind Lord Binghan’s words. This place was also a place of opportunities for Immortal Realm lords, where one could obtain some opportunities, and those opportunities were the enemies imprisoned within these prisons.
【Lord Qishui, a three-step Immortal Realm lord, once assassinated an Immortal Realm being during a great battle, causing the battle situation to fail. He has been suppressed here for countless ages, and is used for the disciples of Black Mountain to temper Eternal techniques. Immortal Realm lord disciples may enter, and their strength will be suppressed to the same realm as Lord Qishui. They must not kill Lord Qishui, or contribution points will be deducted.】
【Lord Chiming, a six-step Immortal Realm lord, betrayed Black Mountain and became a traitor to Black Mountain. He has been suppressed here, and is used for the disciples of Black Mountain to temper Eternal techniques. Immortal Realm lord disciples may enter……】
【Lord Xueqiong, a one-step Legendary Realm lord, once ambushed and killed disciples of Black Mountain, and was captured and suppressed here for countless ages, used for the disciples of Black Mountain to temper Eternal techniques. Legendary Realm lord disciples may enter……】
……
Ye Tian was extremely shocked when he saw the information recorded on each Stele.
Those suppressed and imprisoned here were all lords above the Immortal Realm, and there were even Legendary Realm lords, not just one.
Even Legendary Realm lords could be imprisoned, which showed how powerful this so-called Black Mountain was. But now Black Mountain may have declined, or else this place would not have become a relic, and the so-called Black Mountain force would not have appeared to this day.
“Black Mountain does not allow disciples to kill these prisoners, but now that Black Mountain no longer exists, I can kill these prisoners. If I kill them, I can obtain the resources and treasures on them. This should be the opportunity Lord Binghan mentioned, but……”
Ye Tian was very clear that if these prisoners were still alive, they must have experienced endless years of battle, and had once fought against who knew how many heaven-defying Immortal Realm beings. Under the condition of equal cultivation and strength, it would probably be extremely difficult to kill them.
The Immortal Realm beings in the Time-Space territory probably could not win, and Lord Binghan and the other Legendary Realm lords probably could not defeat those Legendary Realm prisoners either.
Ye Tian did not know whether this black continent had any other opportunities, but he was extremely interested in these enemies imprisoned within the prisons, and even had the desire to fight them one or two times.
Then, Ye Tian chose an Immortal Realm lord prisoner.
Lord Qishui!.

Chapter 1687 Prisoners with Astonishing Strength!

Chapter 1687 Prisoners with Astonishing Strength!

The ancient Stele was both a warning and an introduction, and also the entrance into the prison.
Ye Tian’s will connected with the Stele, and his body was quickly swallowed by it.
Whoosh!
Ye Tian entered a void similar to a void area, but it was even more desolate than the void area. Yet there was still a trace of energy here, which allowed prisoners to keep their bodies in Peak condition. However, if they wanted to cultivate and increase their cultivation, that was absolutely impossible.
When Ye Tian entered here, he saw a tall Eternal Realm lord. He was bound by strands of invisible chains and seemed to have fallen into a state of self-dormancy.
But now that Ye Tian had entered, those chains vanished, and that change awakened the Eternal Realm lord.
This Eternal Realm lord should be the Qishui Lord mentioned on the Stele.
“After so many ages, another Immortal Realm lord has finally come in. I’m so bored!!!!”
Then, Qishui Lord revealed a ferocious cold smile, his voice echoing through the void, as if extremely chilling.
Of course, for an Immortal Realm lord, this was not frightening at all.
But the aura emitted by Qishui Lord was incomparably condensed, even close to frenzied. He was definitely not an ordinary three-step Immortal Realm lord.
Even though this place was not suitable for cultivation, it did not affect comprehension of Eternal Techniques. No one knew how many Eternal Techniques Qishui Lord had comprehended.
But soon, Ye Tian knew. The moment the other party made a move, it was with a legendary Eternal Technique.
Puff!
A black hand shattered the void and appeared at Ye Tian’s location; it was clearly Qishui Lord making his move.
But this hand did not hit Ye Tian. Ye Tian promptly used Void Step to dodge.
“Will Severing Void Sword!”
Ye Tian did not hesitate at all and immediately used this move.
This will Eternal Technique had an extremely fast activation speed, but Qishui Lord’s reaction was too quick; he even dodged the Will Severing Void Sword.
At this point, Ye Tian no longer underestimated Qishui Lord.
If it were any other Immortal Realm lord, they would already have been heavily injured by a single strike from him.
Although Qishui Lord was not as fast as Ye Tian, his battle experience was far too rich. Every move was a legendary Eternal Technique, and almost every legendary Eternal Technique had been created for battle, perfectly coordinated, without the slightest error.
However, with Ye Tian’s Void True Body and Void Step, Qishui Lord had no hope of injuring him.
At this point, Ye Tian could have used Myriad Layers of Void to heavily injure Qishui Lord, but Qishui Lord was indeed a very good sparring opponent, so he chose not to do that. Moreover, he could learn many things from Qishui Lord.
In such a prison, it was impossible to temper oneself indefinitely. After a certain amount of time, one would be transferred out of the prison, and then be unable to enter again for a short period. This was the rule of Mount Mo. Unless this heaven and earth were broken, there was no way to change such a rule.
Fortunately, there were many prisons here, and there were quite a few Immortal Realm lord-level prisoners, so Ye Tian was not short of opponents.
Among these opponents, some were slightly weaker, while some were extremely strong.
However, only Ye Tian, an Eternal Realm being, had come here; there were no other Immortal Realm lords from the Time-Space Territory.
Perhaps there were other Immortal Realm lords here, but if their strength was too weak, they would easily be heavily injured by the prisoners here, and thus would not serve any tempering purpose at all, so they would not remain in Mount Mo’s prison.
Afterwards.
Ye Tian sent out another clone body to explore the black continent and discovered six Immortal Realm lords.
Besides Mount Mo’s prison, this black continent also had several other opportunities. For example, there was a blessed land here that could improve willpower, which was also somewhat effective for Immortal Realm lords; there was also a place where legendary realm lords cultivated, where traces left by legendary realm lords remained and were worth comprehending.
Ye Tian went to take a look at all of those places, but for him, the most valuable place was still Mount Mo’s prison.
In the years that followed, one of Ye Tian’s clone bodies remained in Mount Mo’s prison, battling and sparring with these Immortal Realm prisoners, gradually perfecting his legendary Eternal Techniques, allowing these legendary Eternal Techniques to fit together more perfectly, thereby coordinating better and unleashing even more powerful effects from his own strength.
Moreover, from them, Ye Tian sensed the true application of will Eternal Techniques, an experience that many secret art inheritances simply could not teach.
Year after year of Eternal Years passed, and Ye Tian’s strength grew stronger and stronger. Even though his cultivation still remained at the Six-Step Immortal Realm lord level, his combat strength had increased several times over.
After several thousand Eternal Years, Ye Tian no longer knew how many battles he had experienced; they were practically innumerable.
By this point, continuing to fight these prisoners was no longer necessary. He was preparing to kill these prisoners and obtain the treasures on them.
Even though these Immortal Realm prisoners had been captured by Mount Mo, Mount Mo could not possibly have thoroughly stripped them of all treasures. Some treasures were hidden very deeply, and unless they were killed, there was simply no way to find them.
Therefore, killing these Immortal Realm prisoners was hugely profitable as long as one found even a single treasure, because it was certainly no ordinary treasure.
On this day.
Ye Tian entered the prison void of Qishui Lord, preparing to finish Qishui Lord off.
“You’ve come again!”
Qishui Lord looked at Ye Tian coldly.
The battle began again.
But this time, Ye Tian directly used Myriad Layers of Void and heavily injured Qishui Lord on the spot.
Immediately afterward, Ye Tian went all out. Even though his cultivation was suppressed to the same level as Qishui Lord’s, the three-step Immortal Realm lord level, Ye Tian’s combat power was far, far stronger than Qishui Lord’s.
Throughout the entire process, Qishui Lord was completely crushed by Ye Tian and had almost no ability to resist.
Very quickly, Qishui Lord was heavily injured.
The key point was that Mount Mo no longer existed, so there would be no powerful experts from Mount Mo stepping in to stop him.
Until the moment of death, Qishui Lord never begged for mercy. In the end, he fell at Ye Tian’s hands and became a corpse.
After killing Qishui Lord, Ye Tian began searching for treasures within his body.
“There really is a treasure!”
Ye Tian found it.
Whoosh!
A drop of water flew out from Qishui Lord’s body and landed in Ye Tian’s hand.
Although this drop of water was not an Eternal treasure, it was far more precious than weapons like the Void Holy Weapon. It could be called an Eternal wonder treasure.
Such an Eternal wonder treasure was not considered a weapon; it could only be counted as one of the strange objects, an object at the Eternal Realm level.
After Ye Tian refined this drop of water, he finally understood its use.
[Kui Tian Pearl: Can nourish willpower and restore willpower strength]
Such a treasure was quite good. For example, if the will of an Eternal Realm expert were heavily injured and one wanted to recover, it would be somewhat troublesome. But the Kui Tian Pearl could restore such injuries.
“Not bad. I really don’t have such a treasure. Getting this Eternal wonder treasure this time is a huge gain!”
Ye Tian said excitedly.
Afterwards, he began targeting the second Immortal Realm prison.

Chapter 1688: The Boundless Sea far more powerful than the Source Sea!

Chapter 1688: The Boundless Sea far more powerful than the Source Sea!

The second prisoner Ye Tian chose was Lord Chiming.
Afterwards, Ye Tian entered Lord Chiming’s prison cell and fought with Lord Chiming. Very soon, he heavily injured Lord Chiming, and not long after that, he killed Lord Chiming.
On Lord Chiming, Ye Tian found no treasures at all.
Not all prisoners had treasures on them, and Lord Chiming happened to be one who did not have such treasures.
In the days that followed, Ye Tian killed prisoner after prisoner, and one Stele after another collapsed, meaning the prisoners inside had fallen.
Roughly one out of every three or four of these prisoners had rather good treasures on them, which made Ye Tian’s wealth grow more and more. However, there were only about a thousand or so Immortal Realm lord-level prisoners, and the Eternal treasures Ye Tian could truly obtain were probably only about three or four hundred.
Even so, his wealth was probably already enough to surpass the six guild leaders.
Unfortunately, he could not beat those legend realm lord prisoners; otherwise, his gains would have been even greater.
After a long time, the number of Immortal Realm lord falls had already reached two hundred.
If other Immortal Realm lords knew that Ye Tian had killed two hundred Immortal Realm lord prisoners, they would absolutely find it unbelievable.
The Source Sea Time-Space Territory only had about a hundred Immortal Realm lords, yet Ye Tian had killed two hundred Immortal Realm prisoners here. What an astonishing number that was.
But from this, it could also be seen that Mo Shan was far too powerful a force, having imprisoned so many Immortal Realm lords and legend realm lords, far beyond what the Time-Space Territory could compare to.
Mo Shan, Jingxu, True Void Legend Land—these places definitely did not belong to the Time-Space Territory, but as for where they actually belonged, Ye Tian really did not know.
Of course, he was not looking into that for now. He only wanted to obtain more resources and opportunities.
In another prison cell.
Ye Tian, as usual, prepared to kill the Immortal Realm prisoner here. This prisoner was called Lord Yuyi, a female lord whose appearance was not much different from that of the human race.
Very soon, Ye Tian fought fiercely with her and displayed all of his strength, easily heavily injuring her.
Just as Ye Tian was about to kill her, Lord Yuyi actually begged for mercy.
“Don’t kill me!”
Lord Yuyi pleaded.
This was the first time Ye Tian had seen a prisoner beg for mercy. The prisoners before had all been mentally unhinged and simply impossible to communicate with, while Yuyi had never spoken much during their previous fights, yet now she was begging for mercy.
Instantly, Ye Tian became interested and stopped fighting.
“Among so many prisoners in the Mo Shan prison, you are the only one who has begged for mercy,” Ye Tian said.
Lord Yuyi said, “I don’t want to die, and I can feel that this time you truly intend to kill me, so I can only beg for mercy. As long as you don’t kill me, I’ll agree to any condition.”
Ye Tian was silent for a moment, and a decision formed in his heart.
“I’ll ask you some things. If you answer truthfully, I won’t kill you.”
“Okay!”
Lord Yuyi hurriedly agreed.
Ye Tian asked, “I want to know the origins of Mo Shan.”
“I’ll tell you!” Lord Yuyi recounted the origins of Mo Shan one by one.
From Yuyi’s words, Ye Tian learned what kind of force Mo Shan was.
Mo Shan was a very ancient force, and Lord Yuyi was not clear about Mo Shan’s current situation. She only spoke of the Mo Shan she knew about.
Mo Shan had three legend realm lords, many legendary realm lords, and as for Immortal Realm lords, there were simply too many. To join a force like Mo Shan, the entry requirement was at least Eternal Realm or eighth-level half-step Eternal Realm; otherwise, one was not qualified to join Mo Shan at all.
Moreover, Mo Shan was absolutely ruthless toward traitors. Once someone joined Mo Shan, they were no longer allowed to join any other force; otherwise, they would definitely be hunted down by Mo Shan. There had even once been an extremely powerful legendary realm lord, an existence second only to legend realm lords, who betrayed Mo Shan and was still killed by Mo Shan’s legend realm lords.
Just as Ye Tian had guessed, Mo Shan was not a force of the Time-Space Territory, and Lord Yuyi also did not know anything about the Time-Space Territory. Both she and Mo Shan came from another place—the Boundless Sea.
The Boundless Sea was the world where Mo Shan existed, and Mo Shan was only one of many forces in the Boundless Sea. There were quite a few forces comparable to Mo Shan, and even forces even stronger than Mo Shan.
And within the Boundless Sea, legend realm lords were the true peak existences. Legendary realm lords could not even be considered top-tier combat strength, but they were still overlords of a region, while Immortal Realm lords could only be called invincible within a small area.
“Do you know Jingxu?”
Ye Tian asked.
“Jingxu?” Lord Yuyi recalled for a moment, then nodded. “I’ve heard of it. Jingxu’s strength is far weaker than Mo Shan; they are not on the same level. Jingxu should not have any legend realm lords, but it does have a half-step legend realm lord, which is why it has some fame in the Boundless Sea, though not much.”
·············asking for flowers············
“As expected, Jingxu and Mo Shan both belong to the same place. Back then, there should have been a great war erupting in the Boundless Sea, which caused the two places, Jingxu and Mo Shan, to directly traverse time and space and arrive here, becoming ruins here,” Ye Tian thought to himself.
“Then that True Void Legend Tower, have you heard of it?” Ye Tian asked.
“I have!”
Lord Yuyi immediately replied, “The True Void Legend Tower is the emblematic assessment tower of the True Void Sacred Land in the Boundless Sea. The True Void Sacred Land is a top force that stands above Mo Shan; it has more than ten legend realm lords alone, and is by no means comparable to Mo Shan.”
..... 0 .......
“Now this place is no longer in the Boundless Sea. Do you know how to go to the Boundless Sea?” Ye Tian asked again.
He would definitely want to go to a higher world in the future, so the Boundless Sea was certainly a very good choice.
“So it really is no longer in the Boundless Sea. Back then, I did sense a terrifying shock in the prison cell, and thought Mo Shan had been destroyed by enemies, but I never waited for the enemies of Mo Shan to arrive. If I had not used a secret technique to keep my will and mind from being affected, I might not have been able to endure that endless loneliness and may have gone mad as well. As for how to return to the Boundless Sea, I really don’t know. If this place truly detached from the Boundless Sea, then it would have entered a void region, and I cannot locate the Boundless Sea,” Lord Yuyi said, shaking her head.
Ye Tian also did not truly expect Lord Yuyi to be able to guide him to the Boundless Sea; he was only asking. Since Lord Yuyi could not help him now, he gave up on the idea. Perhaps when his strength became even greater, he would have a chance to find the Boundless Sea.
Afterwards.
Ye Tian continued communicating with Lord Yuyi and learned many secrets.
After a long time, Ye Tian finally left Lord Yuyi’s prison cell, and he also kept his promise and did not kill Lord Yuyi.
However, he would not release Lord Yuyi either; in fact, he could not release her anyway.
Next, Ye Tian continued killing the other prisoners, but on this day, he encountered a true opponent. The other side was definitely a master at hiding strength—despite having terrifying power, they never revealed it. If Ye Tian had not tried to kill him, he really would not have been able to force out his true strength and...

Chapter 1689 Eternal Supreme Treasure, Obtained!

Chapter 1689 Eternal Supreme Treasure, Obtained!

Mo Mountain Prison.
Ye Tian entered Lord Muchen’s prison and fought him for a while, severely injuring him. Just as he was about to kill him, a terrifying aura suddenly burst forth from Lord Muchen.
This Lord Muchen was a Seven-Step Immortal Realm Lord, while Ye Tian was a Six-Step Immortal Realm Lord. Even though he could unleash his full strength in this prison void, his cultivation was still inferior to the other party; after all, the prison void would only suppress cultivation, not enhance it.
However, Ye Tian could fight above his level, so he was not afraid.
But now, Lord Muchen had truly revealed his strength.
Buzz!
An invisible Domain enveloped the entire prison void, and in the next moment a beam of light instantly pierced through.
Facing that beam, it was as if all things were frozen. Even Ye Tian could not evade it; his will barrier was pierced through, and even his Void True Body could hardly withstand it. His body was directly penetrated.
Not only that, but a terrifying power was also destroying Ye Tian’s copied body.
“True My Myriad Hands!”
Boom!!!
One hand after another of Lord Muchen appeared in the void, bombarding Ye Tian. The power contained in each hand was comparable to the full-force strike of a legendary eternal technique, and when joined together they shattered all innate eternal rules, even crushing will itself.
This strike and the one before it both seemed to contain eternal power, will, and innate eternal rules, fused together as if the three powers had merged into a qualitatively new force.
Very quickly.
Ye Tian suffered a severe injury and simply could not contend with Lord Muchen.
This was also the first time Ye Tian had encountered such a terrifying Immortal Realm Lord, one who was far stronger than him by far. Even if he possessed more legendary eternal techniques and an even stronger foundation, he still could not contend with him.
In the end, Ye Tian’s copied body chose to leave this prison.
Outside the prison.
Ye Tian stood before the Stele and did not leave, but instead fell into thought.
“Lord Muchen has hidden himself very deeply. If I had not tried to kill him, he would not have exposed his strength. Perhaps even Mo Mountain doesn’t know Lord Muchen’s true power?” Ye Tian murmured.
After fighting Lord Muchen, although he lost, he still saw some clues.
However, he needed to fight Lord Muchen many more times before he could verify his conclusions.
After some time, Ye Tian could once again enter this prison, so he went in again and fought Lord Muchen, only to suffer another crushing defeat.
As the long years passed, Ye Tian fought Lord Muchen many times, and gradually came to understand his strangeness.
“The power Lord Muchen uses is a force produced after fusing will, body, and innate eternal rules. It is a power only a Legendary Realm Lord should possess, yet he is merely an Immortal Realm Lord. If he truly fused body, will, and innate eternal rules, then he could not possibly be an Immortal Realm Lord; he would be a Legendary Realm Lord.”
Ye Tian thought.
Moreover, he also sensed a special aura.
The reason Lord Muchen could use that kind of eternal technique was entirely because a Domain had descended. In other words, it was that Domain that granted Lord Muchen such means.
“That Domain should be an effect attached to an Eternal Supreme Treasure.”
Ye Tian guessed.
The special aura he sensed was precisely the aura of an Eternal Supreme Treasure. He had obtained fragments of an Eternal Supreme Treasure before, so he was somewhat familiar with its aura. Lord Muchen very likely possessed an Eternal Supreme Treasure, and this Eternal Supreme Treasure could allow him to create a special Domain. Within such a Domain, he could forcibly fuse body, will, and innate eternal rules, forming a brand-new power and thereby unleashing one legendary eternal technique after another.
Such a legendary eternal technique could in fact no longer be considered a legendary eternal technique, because the power it contained belonged to a level only a Legendary Realm could unleash. Therefore, such an eternal technique could be called a half-step legendary eternal technique.
Ye Tian’s strongest eternal techniques were only top-tier legendary eternal techniques; how could they compare to half-step legendary eternal techniques?
Moreover, Ye Tian’s cultivation was weaker than the other party’s, and his combat experience was even somewhat inferior.
Under such circumstances, Ye Tian naturally was far from his match.
But that did not mean Ye Tian could do nothing to him.
An Eternal Supreme Treasure, one that might even be complete, was enough to drive any Legendary Realm Lord mad, let alone him.
Therefore, he had to kill this prisoner at all costs and obtain the Eternal Supreme Treasure from him.
Compared with Lord Muchen, Ye Tian’s advantage was that he was free, while Lord Muchen was a prisoner in confinement, unable even to cultivate normally, and his recovery speed was very slow as well.
“If Lord Muchen is not given time to recover, his combat strength will actually slowly decline!”
Ye Tian thought.
Immediately after, he prepared to copy bodies one after another, and of different people at that, so that he could enter the prison without any time gap and keep fighting Lord Muchen. After all, different Immortal Realm Lords entering the prison would not be stopped by Mo Mountain Prison.
In this way, Lord Muchen would have no time to rest or recover.
As battle after battle continued, Lord Muchen’s power would grow weaker and weaker. Then Ye Tian would be able to kill him.
This was a flaw of Mo Mountain Prison, but it was a flaw aimed at prisoners, and prisoners had no status in Mo Mountain to begin with. Even if it knew of this flaw, Mo Mountain simply would not care.
Whoosh!
Ye Tian copied the body of a Six-Step Immortal Realm Lord, then entered Lord Muchen’s prison and fought with him. Very quickly, this copied body was killed in battle.
After that, Ye Tian continued copying another body to enter this prison, fighting Lord Muchen nonstop.
Just like that, Lord Muchen killed one Six-Step Immortal Realm Lord after another.
“Damn it, what is going on? Even if these Immortal Realm Lords are all clones and their fall only means losing a clone, why are they all willing to sacrifice their clones so willingly?”
Lord Muchen said angrily.
He had guessed that his Eternal Supreme Treasure might have been exposed, but in such a situation, he had no choice but to expose it. If he did not activate that Eternal Supreme Treasure, he simply could not defeat Ye Tian. He had not encountered many Immortal Realm prodigies as monstrous as this one.
So he had to activate that Eternal Supreme Treasure.
However, he roughly guessed the situation outside. Mo Mountain was very likely no longer there. After all, for countless ages, he had not encountered any Mo Mountain disciples. This time, however, it was strange: many Six-Step half-Immortal Realm experts had joined the siege, and some were even Immortal Realm experts he knew, who had once been captured by Mo Mountain and imprisoned here, yet now had run into his prison void to fight him.
Could it be that those Immortal Realm experts had been released and were now serving another force?
He tried to communicate with those Immortal Realm experts, but the other side simply ignored him and instead fought him to the death at all costs.
Gradually, his power was consumed greatly, and he had no way to recover in time. The energy provided by the prison void was too little, and restoring his strength would take a very long time.
Over a long period of time, he began to suffer injuries, and they were difficult to recover from.
At last, he became heavily injured and could no longer even defeat a Six-Step Immortal Realm Lord.
After he killed one Six-Step Immortal Realm expert at the cost of grave injury and near death, the familiar Ye Tian descended once again.
This time, Ye Tian descended into Lord Muchen’s prison void with a copied body modeled on his own true body.
Lord Muchen knew he had no way to kill Ye Tian again, and his face revealed despair.
“My lord, I can surrender and serve the force behind you. Please don’t kill me, all right?”
Lord Muchen begged for mercy.
“Do you think that by begging for mercy, I won’t kill you? You should know very well why I am killing you.” Ye Tian sneered.
Lord Muchen naturally understood: it was for the Eternal Supreme Treasure.
He was extremely reluctant to part with this Eternal Supreme Treasure. Back when he was captured by one of Mo Mountain’s Legendary Realm Lords, he had not exposed the Eternal Supreme Treasure, nor had he even resisted much, because he knew very well that once he activated the Eternal Supreme Treasure, he would surely die. Mo Mountain would definitely kill and seize the treasure.
And once he was captured, Mo Mountain would have difficulty searching out his Eternal Supreme Treasure, so even if he were imprisoned, he would still have hope of leaving in the future.
But this time, he truly had no hope left.
“I am willing to hand over the Eternal Supreme Treasure in my possession!”
Lord Muchen said.
“I don’t trust you! After killing you, the Eternal Supreme Treasure will still be mine!”
Ye Tian used Myriadfold Void and directly blasted the heavily injured, dying Lord Muchen to death.
After Lord Muchen was killed, the Eternal Supreme Treasure on his body could no longer be hidden and was easily found by Ye Tian.

Chapter 1690 Eternal Supreme Treasure, the Primordial Order!

Chapter 1690 Eternal Supreme Treasure, the Primordial Order!

What appeared before Ye Tian was a gray plaque. Having lost its master, its original aura as an Eternal Supreme Treasure spread out, even exerting a certain amount of suppression on Ye Tian.
Its aura was incomparably grand and majestic, filled with mysterious and towering power. This power diffused outward, forming a special Domain.
“It really is an Eternal Supreme Treasure, but it should be a very ordinary one!”
Ye Tian murmured.
He had obtained a fragment of an Eternal Supreme Treasure, and from the image in its aura, the green giant bell he had seen had far greater might than the Eternal Supreme Treasure before him.
Eternal Supreme Treasures all possess power that cannot be touched, and this gray plaque was the same. Surrounding it were endless space-time, which Ye Tian could sense but could hardly reach.
But he was very clear that there must be a way to touch an Eternal Supreme Treasure. Otherwise, how had Lord Mu Chen obtained this Eternal Supreme Treasure and refined it?
Yet after trying many times, he was still far from being able to reach this Eternal Supreme Treasure.
So, one of his clone bodies came to Lord Yuyi’s prison to seek advice from
Lord Yuyi.
Lord Yuyi did not want to die, so when Ye Tian sought her advice, she did not dare refuse to answer.
“Lord Yuyi, the Boundless Sea should have quite a few Eternal Supreme Treasures, right? If one finds an Eternal Supreme Treasure, how does one take it away? I discovered that Eternal Supreme Treasures seem to be deep within endless space-time, completely out of reach, as if they do not exist between heaven and earth, yet in fact they do exist.” Ye Tian asked.
Lord Yuyi replied: “The Boundless Sea does indeed possess Eternal Supreme Treasures, but the number is not many. Basically only Lords in the Legendary realm, or a few top-tier Lords in the Legendary realm, possess Eternal Supreme Treasures. And it is indeed not easy to take away an ownerless Eternal Supreme Treasure. Even if we Lords in the Immortal realm really encounter an Eternal Supreme Treasure, it is extremely difficult to take it away. Even some weaker Lords in the Legendary realm may not be able to take away an Eternal Supreme Treasure. But if you ask whether there is a method, there really is.”
“What method?”
Ye Tian asked hurriedly.
“In fact, any Eternal Supreme Treasure represents the ultimate existence of one or more Eternal Daos. For example, the Quiet Void you mentioned earlier—Quiet Void possesses an Eternal Supreme Treasure, the Azure Void Bell, and the Eternal Dao represented by the Azure Void Bell is the two Eternal Daos of Controlling the Void and Traversing the Void. Space, time, and the Daos of metal, wood, water, fire, and earth are actually the foundation. The true Eternal Dao is not a single foundation. Take the Traversing the Void Eternal Dao, for instance: it is mainly based on the Space Dao, while also containing many innate Eternal laws such as speed, light, and darkness. It is said that if one comprehends an Eternal Supreme Treasure and can comprehend one of its Eternal Daos to the Entry Stage, then there is hope of obtaining that Eternal Supreme Treasure. Of course, the prerequisite is that it must be an ownerless Eternal Supreme Treasure. If it already has an owner, then even if one comprehends it for endless Eternal years, there is no way to obtain that Eternal Supreme Treasure.” Lord Yuyi explained.
“So that’s how it is.”
Ye Tian nodded, then left this prison.
……
In Lord Mu Chen’s prison, this clone body of Ye Tian had never left. Now that he knew the method, he began to comprehend the Eternal Dao contained within this gray plaque.
Compared with the sword in the ruin where the True Void Legendary Tower was located, the feeling this plaque gave Ye Tian was much clearer.
At this moment, after comparing the two, Ye Tian was certain in his heart that the sword should not actually be on the True Void Legendary Tower side. It was probably still in the Boundless Sea, and the sword in that ruin was merely the space-time projection of the Eternal Supreme Treasure, while what everyone was comprehending was only that projection of the Eternal Supreme Treasure.
Comprehending a projection might have some effect, but one could never truly grasp its real Eternal Dao. At most, one could use the projection’s aura to cultivate a little, or use it to assist in comprehending and creating Eternal techniques or some secret arts.
And at this moment.
Ye Tian felt a powerful aura of Eternal Dao from this Eternal Supreme Treasure, and deeply sensed one of the Eternal Daos contained within it.
After a long while, he came to understand what this Eternal Dao represented.
Primordial Dao!
This was the Primordial Dao among the Eternal Daos, capable of blending various powers into one, forming an eternal Primordial Domain.
Compared with the others, the Primordial Dao was somewhat suited to Ye Tian, so he had a great chance of comprehending it to the Entry Stage within a certain period of time.
And the foundation of the Primordial Dao was various innate Eternal laws. Ye Tian used these innate Eternal laws to comprehend the Primordial Dao, and with the help of this Eternal Supreme Treasure, his understanding of the Primordial Dao grew deeper and deeper.
Year after year of Eternal time passed. Ye Tian’s cultivation was still at the Six-Step Immortal Lord realm, but his strength had been steadily increasing. For example, he had been continuously opening up his will world.
By now, his will world had already reached more than eighty thousand.
Moreover, he had once again entered the Void Legendary Tower, breaking through all the way to the nineteenth layer in one go, and then cultivated for a period of time in the Void Legendary Land, slightly improving the degree of fusion between his will and body. He was very close to becoming a Seven-Step Immortal Lord, but this step was not so easy to cross.
About ten thousand Eternal years passed.
On this day.
Ye Tian finally cultivated the Eternal Primordial Dao to the Entry Stage, and to his surprise, he discovered that the Eternal Primordial Dao was actually helpful in fusing will and body. However, the prerequisite was that one needed various precious resources, drawing out various powers to enhance the fusion of will and body, similar to fusion and transformation.
“Lord Mu Chen’s Eternal Primordial Dao must also have reached the Entry Stage. If he had not been captured by Mo Shan, he absolutely could have grown into a powerhouse; becoming a Lord in the Legendary realm would not have been very difficult.” Ye Tian thought to himself.
With the Entry Stage Eternal Primordial Dao, together with this Eternal Supreme Treasure, his cultivation speed in the future would be much faster. It definitely would not take long before he could advance to the Seven-Step Immortal Lord realm.
“Let’s see if I can take this Eternal Supreme Treasure away!”
Ye Tian reached out to grab this Eternal Supreme Treasure. The power of the Eternal Primordial Dao formed a weak Domain, blessing his hand as it plunged into endless space-time, passed through layer after layer of space-time, as if crossing an immeasurably distant distance, yet also as if it only crossed a few meters.
Finally, Ye Tian’s hand touched this Eternal Supreme Treasure.
Whoosh!
The Eternal Supreme Treasure was grasped in Ye Tian’s hand.
Then, Ye Tian began refining this Eternal Supreme Treasure, only then could he use it normally.
Time slowly passed. About several calamity cycles later, Ye Tian finally refined this Eternal Supreme Treasure.
At this point, he also learned the name of this Eternal Supreme Treasure—Primordial Order!
“With the Primordial Order, my strength has increased by more than tenfold!” Ye Tian said excitedly.
Moreover, it would not be long before he could advance to the Seven-Step Immortal Lord realm.
Very soon, another piece of good news arrived.

Chapter 1691 Eight-Step Immortal Realm Lord!

Chapter 1691 Eight-Step Immortal Realm Lord!

“The Bloodbone Domain is finally about to advance into an Eternal Spacetime Domain!”
Ye Tian said with a smile.
Many Eternal years ago, he had traded for the Heaven-Made Stele from Lord Bing Han, and placed the Heaven-Made Stele at the origin of the Bloodbone Domain, causing the Bloodbone Domain to continuously grow and evolve. However, advancing into an Eternal Spacetime Domain was not something that could be done all at once; it required a certain amount of time.
And for an Immortal Realm Lord, that amount of time was not too long.
Now, the Bloodbone Domain had finally completed the last step and ushered in its final major qualitative change.
Boom!!!!!
The Bloodbone Domain swelled continuously like a balloon, endlessly drawing vast amounts of origin energy from the Source Sea.
Moreover, the Bloodbone Domain was also extracting the energy from that section of bone within the Bloodbone Domain.
At this moment.
One of Ye Tian’s clone bodies was inside the Bloodbone Domain, observing its transformation.
He saw the Bloodbone Domain continuously growing larger, while also giving birth to large amounts of rare resources. One after another, mines, heavenly materials and earthly treasures, and rare lifeforms were born successively, and the blood-colored power contained within the bone was also absorbed by the Bloodbone Domain, making it a rather special Eternal Spacetime Domain.
After a long while, the transformation of the Bloodbone Domain was complete, and it had already become a true Eternal Spacetime Domain. The resources contained in this newly born Eternal Spacetime Domain were incomparably abundant.
Ye Tian did not plan to collect these resources. He intended to bring a group of human Supreme Beings and half-step Eternal Realm experts from the Dark Forbidden Domain to cultivate here, while also gathering some resources along the way.
In that way, these human powerhouses would grow rapidly, and they could also help him manage the Eternal Spacetime Domain.
“Huh, that suspected bone of a Legendary Realm Lord-level lifeform has shrunk a lot, and it has become much more fragile as well.”
Ye Tian came to the bottom of the Black Sea, sensing that piece of bone from a Legendary Realm Lord-level lifeform, and muttered.
It could be said that this bone of a Legendary Realm Lord had already ceased to affect the Bloodbone Domain; even if it were destroyed, it would not cause any impact on the Bloodbone Domain.
In the days that followed, Ye Tian relocated some human beings from the Source Sea Dark Forbidden Domain to the Eternal Spacetime Domain, and also opened a spacetime channel to ensure that humans could freely move in and out of the Bloodbone Spacetime Domain and the Dark Forbidden Domain.
Only then would he not need to manage these matters himself; otherwise, if any humans wanted to return and needed his help, he would not have that much free time.
After dealing with all of this, Ye Tian finally began to cultivate in earnest, striving to raise his cultivation to the Seven-Step Immortal Realm Lord as soon as possible.
With the help of the Hunyuan Token, the speed at which Ye Tian’s will and body fused became faster and faster. Finally, after dozens of Eternal years, the degree of fusion between Ye Tian’s body and will exceeded seventy percent, and he stepped into the Seven-Step Immortal Realm Lord level.
With his cultivation breakthrough, Ye Tian’s strength also increased considerably. Combined with the Hunyuan Token, he even had hope of fighting the weakest Legendary Realm Lord for a bit.
Of course, the gap in strength between an Immortal Realm Lord and a Legendary Realm Lord was far too great. Ye Tian’s strength was still somewhat below the six guild masters of the spacetime domain, but he no longer needed to fear their combat power; he now had genuine self-protection ability.
In the days that followed, Ye Tian’s main goal was not only to improve his cultivation, but also to create all kinds of top-tier Legendary Eternal Skills.
Only top-tier Legendary Eternal Skills, with the help of the Hunyuan Token, could display the power of a Half-Step Legendary Eternal Skill.
At present, he only had two top-tier Legendary Eternal Skills, Void Step and Ten Thousandfold Void Space. His other Legendary Eternal Skills were still rather ordinary, and he planned to refine and modify those ordinary Legendary Eternal Skills so that they would become top-tier Legendary Eternal Skills.
And when creating and perfecting Legendary Eternal Skills, the Eternal Hunyuan Domain forged by the Hunyuan Token could provide excellent assistance and reference.
Thus, Ye Tian continuously attempted to perfect his Legendary Eternal Skills within the Eternal Hunyuan Domain, and one Eternal year after another passed.
Unknowingly, one hundred thousand Eternal years had passed.
For Ye Tian, this was also an incomparably long period of seclusion.
During this time, the number of human half-step Eternal Realm experts increased greatly, and even several Extreme experts were born. Meanwhile, Ye Tian’s family members, with his help, had stepped into the Eternal Life Realm Lord level.
But compared with Ye Tian, their progress was negligible.
“An Eight-Step Immortal Realm Lord, dozens of top-tier Legendary Eternal Skills, 99,999 will worlds, and I’m about to break through to one hundred thousand will worlds. My strength is far greater than before.” Ye Tian said excitedly.
99,999 will worlds was equivalent to the peak of third-tier Eternal will. Once he broke through to 100,000 will worlds, the will worlds would undergo a transformation and become fourth-tier Eternal will.
And fourth-tier Eternal will was the will level of a Legendary Realm Lord. At present, only six Legendary Realm Lords had reached fourth-tier in will, while the other Immortal Realm Lords were all only at third-tier.
If his will broke through, that would also be a massive increase in strength for Ye Tian, perhaps even allowing his strength to match that of the six guild masters directly.
However, opening up this final will world was also incomparably difficult. Ye Tian tried many times, but never succeeded, and many of his clone bodies were even shattered in the process.
After countless attempts, Ye Tian realized one problem: the Will Worlds secret technique was not good enough and had major flaws. For him to reach the peak of third-tier will was already far too heaven-defying; he could rely on clone bodies to try again and again, but others could not.
Now, he had to refine the Will Worlds secret technique anew before it would be possible to break through the will bottleneck and advance to fourth-tier will.
Ye Tian had also obtained quite a few will cultivation secret techniques, and had even found some will technique inheritances in the Azure Void Ruins, but many of those will cultivation secret techniques were not suitable for him. Moreover, the foundation of his Will Worlds had already been established, so it was not suitable to casually switch techniques. Thus, he could only draw upon the essence of other techniques to perfect the Will Worlds secret technique.
And so, Ye Tian began to perfect the Will Worlds secret technique.
In any case, with clone bodies as experiments, Ye Tian could repeatedly refine and modify the Will Worlds secret technique, and thus his rate of improvement was very fast.
In just dozens of Eternal years, Ye Tian successfully raised the Will Worlds secret technique by several levels.
The new Will Worlds secret technique imitated the Source Sea, transforming the inner world into a will Source Sea, and other will worlds into spacetime domains surrounding the entire Source Sea will world. Such a will world would be extremely stable, and it would be very easy to open up new will worlds.
Of course, transforming the inner world into a will Source Sea was a very crucial step. Once such a will world took shape, it would become an incomparably terrifying will world.
He planned to merge all of his will into such a will world and go all out to open up a will Source Sea.
During this process, many will worlds would probably collapse, but as long as he succeeded in opening up the will Source Sea, he would be able to recover quickly.
This was a very bold move; if not for the clone bodies, Ye Tian would not dare to try it.

Chapter 1692 Four-Stage Eternal Will!

Chapter 1692 Four-Stage Eternal Will!

Inner World.
At this moment, Ye Tian had already turned this place into nothingness. The countless continents originally built within the Inner World had all become nothingness, everything returning to its original state. This was preparatory work for opening up the sea of the source of will.
Immediately afterward, countless will powers poured into this world. According to the operation of the new Will World secret art, the power of will continuously merged into the Inner World, beginning to form a source spring of will, constantly transforming this Inner World and turning it into a sea of the source of will.
However, the Inner World was not an ordinary particle cell, so to transform such a world into a sea of the source of will required endless resources and time.
Fortunately, Ye Tian had obtained too many treasures from those Mo Mountain prisoners. He could take out a few treasures at will and trade with the six great legendary lords or other Immortal Realm lords, thereby obtaining a large amount of resources, enough to complete this cultivation.
Time passed.
One Eternal Year after another went by. The time spent opening up the sea of the source of will was many times greater than the time spent opening up the Will World. Even though this was only an experiment, this time had to be spent. This was a crucial experiment affecting Will World cultivation.
If successful, he would not only break through the shackles of will and advance to Four-Stage Eternal Will, but could even continue cultivating to Five-Stage Will, and even higher will levels.
If he failed, he would be unable to break through and would have to create a new Will World from scratch.
After about ten Eternal Years, the sea of the source of will was finally opened up by Ye Tian.
At this time.
The sea of the source of will was filled with endless will power, but Ye Tian’s current condition was not particularly good. For this breakthrough, nearly all of the other will worlds within his body had collapsed. Still, the sea of the source of will had been opened up, and that was success.
Next, Ye Tian began testing again and again, striving to make the cost of opening up the sea of the source of will as small as possible and ensure there would be no side effects. This required multiple tests and thus a very long time.
However, for Ye Tian, spending a bit more time was worthwhile.
And so, Ye Tian opened up the sea of the source of will again and again. His experience became increasingly skilled, and the price he paid became smaller and smaller.
After about 3,000 Eternal Years, Ye Tian had tried 300 times in succession and could already open up the sea of the source of will at a very small cost. The consequences could all be slowly recovered from, without affecting his foundation.
Thus, on this day, Ye Tian began to formally condense the sea of the source of will.
Boom!!!!!!
The sea of the source of will was opened up, and then Ye Tian began repairing the side effects. Once fully repaired, he could reopen new Will Worlds.
Brand-new Will Worlds surrounded the sea of the source of will, and their number gradually increased.
After many years, the Will Worlds had once again returned to 99,999, and soon another one was condensed, reaching 100,000 Will Worlds.
At that moment, the transformation began.
Ye Tian’s will power continuously became more refined, and it grew stronger at an unbelievable speed. This was the breaking of the will shackles from Three-Stage Eternal Will to Four-Stage Eternal Will.
After a long while, all of Ye Tian’s will had undergone transformation and had already become Four-Stage Eternal Will.
Four-Stage Eternal Will was nearly ten times stronger than Three-Stage Eternal Will. It could even crush ordinary Immortal Realm lords using will alone. That was the power of Four-Stage Eternal Will.
With his will power raised to the fourth stage, Ye Tian’s strength greatly increased. Even without using the Eternal treasure Hunyuan Token, his true combat power could be compared to a relatively weak legendary lord. If he were to cooperate with the Hunyuan Token, among the six legendary lords of the spacetime territory, he might even rank in the middle.
Moreover, now that Ye Tian found it easier to open up Will Worlds, within a certain period of time his Four-Stage will would improve greatly, and his strength still had room to grow for some time.
As for the degree of fusion between will and body, that was also rapidly increasing. Perhaps it would not take too long before he could fuse ninety percent of his body with will and step into the realm of a Nine-Step Immortal Realm lord.
In the years that followed, Ye Tian devoted himself fully to raising his cultivation, accelerating the fusion of will and body, striving to reach the Nine-Step Immortal Realm lord realm as soon as possible.
At the same time, he was also helping some human geniuses, opening up many blessed lands, allowing the human race to gradually give birth to several Eternal Realm lords.
It could be said that the human race was now almost the number one race in the source sea.
From beginning to end, Ye Tian had never abandoned the Dark Forbidden Domain. Perhaps many forces did not value the source sea very much, thinking that it had no real resources and was merely vast in area.
But Ye Tian valued the source sea greatly. After all, no matter how good the spacetime territory was, it had to rely on the source sea, and only the source sea possessed the most complete innate eternal rules.
Thus, Ye Tian’s true body had always been in the Dark Forbidden Domain, using the Hunyuan Token to comprehend and improve his cultivation.
One hundred thousand Eternal Years!
Two hundred thousand Eternal Years!
Three hundred thousand Eternal Years!
Finally, on this day, the degree of fusion between Ye Tian’s will and body reached ninety percent, and he became a Nine-Step Immortal Realm lord. However, to completely fuse his body with his will and thereby step into the realm of a legendary lord would require even more time.
Yet Ye Tian did not care in the slightest about this time and cultivated with full force.
At the very least, he could see hope, whereas the spacetime territory also had several Nine-Step Immortal Realm lords who still had no hope of stepping into the level of legendary lord to this day. This showed just how difficult that step was.
If it were not difficult, the spacetime territory would not have only six legendary lords.
On this day.
Ye Tian was cultivating in the Dark Forbidden Domain when a Half-Step Eternal Realm human reported an item of information: a strange anomaly had appeared somewhere in the source sea, but they could not find the location of the anomaly, and they could not even fly to that place.
After receiving this news, Ye Tian rushed to that location immediately.
Source Sea, Shulong Blessed Land.
Ye Tian arrived here and saw a world. In the center of the world, a leaf was being nurtured.
His will tried to approach this place, but it could not extend into it.
“An Eternal treasure?”
Ye Tian guessed.
If that were truly the case, then it would be extraordinary. This might very well be a real Eternal treasure, not a spacetime projection.
With a tearing sound!
Space split open, and a figure appeared.
This person was completely shrouded in black mist and emitted a sinister aura.
“Greetings, Dark Mist Lord!”
Ye Tian said politely.
The person before him was one of the six legendary lords, and quite mysterious at that.
The Dark Mist Lord paid no attention to Ye Tian at all, merely staring intensely at the leaf within the anomaly.
