Chapter 1693: A Fierce Battle with Lord Dark Mist!

Chapter 1693: A Fierce Battle with Lord Dark Mist!

“An Eternal Supreme Treasure, huh!”
Lord Dark Mist was filled with excitement and greed. This was very likely an Eternal Supreme Treasure!
As one of the six legendary lords, he naturally knew very well that the relic in the Time-Space Domain did not contain a true Eternal Supreme Treasure at all. That sword was merely a projection of time and space; the real Eternal Supreme Treasure was not in the Time-Space Domain at all.
He had never encountered a true Eternal Supreme Treasure before, and now one had finally been born in the Source Sea.
“The Source Sea may be relatively young, but it also has the potential to give birth to an Eternal Supreme Treasure. I waited countless ages, and in the end I finally waited for this!”
Lord Dark Mist wanted to monopolize this Eternal Supreme Treasure and did not want to share it with the other legendary lords.
He had always stationed subordinates in the Source Sea, which was why he could arrive there at the first possible moment. As for the other five legendary-realm lords, they were not paying much attention to the Source Sea.
However, this Eternal Supreme Treasure had not yet fully formed. It still needed some time, and obtaining it would be extremely difficult and take a very long time. He simply could not hide it from the other five legendary-realm lords.
“Seal off this area. Those half-step Eternal Realm beings in the Source Sea are all nearly ignorant; they basically don’t even know what an Eternal Supreme Treasure is. If I occupy this area and do not allow any living being to approach, the news won’t spread.”
Lord Dark Mist thought to himself.
Of course, there was still one matter that needed handling right now, and that was the Lord of Endlessness before him.
This was a Lord of the Immortal Realm, and he even possessed a clone. He had to be subdued, otherwise if the Lord of Endlessness spread the news, he would be unable to stop it.
“Lord of Endlessness, submit to me and become a lord under my line. In the future, I will help you break through to the legendary-realm lord level. How about it?”
Lord Dark Mist said.
“Not good!” Ye Tian said coldly.
Lord Dark Mist still wanted to subdue him. How ridiculous.
“Lord of Endlessness, do you know the gap between us? Although you have a clone, I also have a clone. If I go all out against you, do you think you can still escape? And your foundation is the Source Sea and the Bloodbone Domain, right? You also have a race called the human race. If you offend me, you should know the consequences!” Lord Dark Mist began to threaten him.
Although he knew that threatening Ye Tian would make Ye Tian very angry, and even if he reluctantly agreed, it would still become a hidden danger in the future.
But he could not care that much anymore. He did not want news of the Eternal Supreme Treasure being born here to spread. He needed to buy time. The longer he delayed, the greater his chances of seizing this Eternal Supreme Treasure.
In the future, if he held an Eternal Supreme Treasure, then throughout the entire Source Sea and the Time-Space Domain, he would be an invincible existence.
By then, even if he offended all Eternal Realm beings, he would have nothing to fear.
“You’re threatening me?”
Ye Tian looked coldly at Lord Dark Mist. His aura turned cold and sharp, and strands of killing intent boiled through the void. His will erupted, causing even the void to begin shattering.
“Fourth-tier will!”
Lord Dark Mist was somewhat surprised.
Only legendary-realm lords possessed fourth-tier will, yet Ye Tian had not yet reached the level of a legendary-realm lord and had actually already attained fourth-tier will in advance. That difficulty was truly immense!
Even so, Lord Dark Mist still did not take Ye Tian seriously.
No matter how powerful an Immortal Realm lord was, he was still far from being a match for a legendary-realm lord.
“Lord of Endlessness, I’ll ask you again. Will you submit to me or not?”
Lord Dark Mist pressed.
“Scram!”
Ye Tian did not want to waste any more words and directly said coldly.
Boom!!!
Lord Dark Mist’s aura erupted, and countless billions upon countless billions of regions shattered. At this moment, he truly wanted to kill Ye Tian.
But in the end, he still held himself back.
If he really made a move, then he would undoubtedly stand on opposite sides from Ye Tian, and the news here would probably no longer be containable.
In an instant, Lord Dark Mist’s aura restrained itself, and his entire demeanor also became mild as he said, “Lord of Endlessness, you are a peak Immortal Realm lord. It’s quite normal that you don’t want to join my faction. But the opportunity here now belongs to me. As long as you swear an oath of will and heart not to leak the news here, and not to allow anyone to approach this place, I won’t attack you. Otherwise, you and I will be mortal enemies.”
Ye Tian sneered. “Lord Dark Mist, you want to monopolize the Eternal Supreme Treasure here and don’t want the other five legendary-realm lords to know about it, but aren’t you underestimating me a little too much? Let me tell you, this Eternal Supreme Treasure belongs to me. You should be the one to scram.”
The façade had been torn apart!
Lord Dark Mist could no longer endure the anger in his heart. If it were any other Immortal Realm lord in the Time-Space Domain, who would dare speak to him like this? Which one would not be deferential and respectful?
“Lord of Endlessness, this clone of yours is dead for sure. I will even keep hunting down your other clones until I completely kill you!”
As soon as his words fell, Lord Dark Mist made his move.
“Three Thousand Dark Mist Shadow Bodies!”
One gray shadow after another emerged, filling the surroundings.
In an instant, these gray shadows all attacked Ye Tian, and each one possessed strength comparable to an elite nine-step Immortal Realm lord.
If it were an ordinary nine-step Immortal Realm lord, they would probably be quickly blasted to death by Lord Dark Mist.
Facing a legendary-realm lord, Ye Tian would not underestimate his opponent.
Void True Body!
Will Barrier Light!
These two legendary Eternal Techniques had now also been perfected by Ye Tian to the level of top-tier legendary Eternal Techniques, and their power was extremely formidable.
Bang bang bang!!!
The attacks of the Three Thousand Dark Mist Shadow Bodies were all blocked by Ye Tian’s Will Barrier Light, unable to injure him at all.
The next moment.
Ye Tian unleashed the legendary Eternal Technique Ten Thousandfold Void, stacking countless layers of void to suppress Lord Dark Mist.
·········求鮮花······
Boom!!!
Lord Dark Mist’s expression changed, clearly affected by the Ten Thousandfold Void, and even his body began to tremble.
Layers upon layers of void compressed into a single layer, and stretches of region compressed into a tiny fragment, all in order to suppress Lord Dark Mist.
However, Lord Dark Mist was still very powerful. He forcibly tore through the suppression of the countless layers of void, and vast swathes of void shattered into nothingness.
Boom!!!!!
The two sides kept colliding and slaughtering each other, but overall, Ye Tian was still at a disadvantage.
If not for the Void True Body, Ye Tian in his normal state would not be a match for Lord Dark Mist at all.
“You actually possess the ability of a Void Beast. How did you do that?”
Lord Dark Mist asked in confusion.
But Ye Tian would not answer him.
Lord Dark Mist took out a top-tier Void Sacred Soldier specifically designed to counter Void Beasts, but under repeated strikes from Ye Tian’s will Severing Void Sword, that Void Sacred Soldier also gradually shattered.
... .. 0
From beginning to end, Ye Tian still had not activated the Eternal Supreme Treasure, the Primordial Token.
But after a long while, he had no choice but to use it.
Hum!!!!!
Another of Lord Dark Mist’s clones appeared in the Source Sea and directly headed for the Dark Forbidden Domain. This action completely enraged Ye Tian.
Lord Dark Mist had a total of two clones, plus his true body, making three major combat powers.
Now, aside from his true body, both clones had been deployed, and he even wanted to strike at the Dark Forbidden Domain. It was clear that he truly wanted an irreconcilable fight with Ye Tian.
Just as Lord Dark Mist’s second clone was about to descend upon the Dark Forbidden Domain, one of Ye Tian’s copied bodies intercepted him.
When Lord Dark Mist saw yet another body of Ye Tian, he thought it was Ye Tian’s true body and paid it no mind.
But very quickly, he was dumbfounded.
Whoosh whoosh!!
Two copied bodies appeared. At this moment, Ye Tian had already dispatched three major bodies for battle.
More importantly, one of Ye Tian’s copied bodies directly activated the Primordial Token.
Hum!
The Eternal Primordial Domain enveloped one of Lord Dark Mist’s copied bodies, and Ten Thousandfold Void was unleashed.
With the help of the Primordial Token, Ten Thousandfold Void had already fused with the power of the three great forces, reaching the might of a half-step legendary Eternal Technique.
Crack, crack, crack!!!!!
Lord Dark Mist’s Three Thousand Dark Mist Shadow Bodies all shattered, and that legendary Eternal Technique simply could no longer be sustained.
Then, Ye Tian’s Will Extreme Fist smashed directly into Lord Dark Mist, blasting him into the depths of time and space with one punch. Countless layers of time and space shattered, and Lord Dark Mist’s body also began to crack. This punch had truly injured him.
However, it was still somewhat difficult for Ye Tian to kill Lord Dark Mist.
On the other side.
Ye Tian once again sent two copied bodies toward Lord Dark Mist. He wanted Lord Dark Mist to know the consequences of offending him and.

Chapter 1694: All Six Bodies Join the Battle!

Chapter 1694: All Six Bodies Join the Battle!

Dark Mist Domain.
This was the Eternal Time-Space Domain of Dark Mist Lord, and one of the most top-tier Eternal Time-Space Domains. There were quite a few Eternal Realm lords here, as well as countless Half-Step Eternal Realm experts. It was also regarded by other Eternal Realm experts as one of the safest places in the time-space domains.
After all, with one of the six legendary lords, Dark Mist Lord, personally overseeing it, who would dare invade this place?
Even during the two wars between the time-space domains and the Void Beasts, Dark Mist Domain was never affected.
But today, Dark Mist Domain was invaded.
Rumble!!!!
The time-space barrier of Dark Mist Domain was torn apart, and an intent-slash void-breaking sword composed of will and innate Eternal rules crossed the void and struck the core area of Dark Mist Domain, which was also its headquarters, the cultivation ground of Dark Mist Lord.
Dark Mist Lord’s true body was not stationed in Dark Mist Domain. In fact, he was still cultivating in a ruin.
And his two clones had already gone to the Source Sea, which meant Dark Mist Domain simply could not withstand Ye Tian.
Crack!
In Dark Mist Domain, the divine mountain where Dark Mist Lord cultivated was shattered by a single strike, and the subordinates surrounding it all suffered the erosion of the intent-slash void-breaking sword.
Waves of sword light of will swept across the bodies of one Half-Step Eternal Realm expert after another. Even Seven-Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm experts or Eight-Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm experts could not withstand even a trace of that sword light of will, and each of them turned to dust.
“No!”
A Peak Immortal Realm lord revealed a look of despair and did everything he could to resist the waves of sword light of will. This was only the aftershock of the intent-slash void-breaking sword’s attack, yet he still could not withstand it.
The Peak Immortal Realm lord’s body was blasted into countless fragments by the sword light of will, his vitality completely dissipated, and his will was Annihilated. He had already fallen and died.
Not only this Peak Immortal Realm lord, but many other Immortal Realm lords also fell and died one after another.
Perhaps they had clones, but the one left here was definitely the true body. In their eyes, Dark Mist Domain was the safest place, and if the true body stayed here, it naturally would not fall. But who could have imagined that Dark Mist Domain would be invaded?
These Immortal Realm lords could not withstand Ye Tian’s sword light of will, but Dark Mist Lord’s subordinates also had two Immortal Realm lords.
These two Immortal Realm lords were cultivated by Dark Mist Lord, so their true bodies were also cultivating in Dark Mist Domain, while their clones managed their own time-space domains.
At this moment, they too had suffered the attack of the intent-slash void-breaking sword.
The Two-Step Immortal Realm lord was directly severely injured and on the verge of death, while the Seven-Step Immortal Realm lord was also heavily injured.
However, Ye Tian’s attack just now had not been aimed at them. If it had been, they would not have been able to withstand it.
“Quick, notify Lord Dark Mist!”
The two Immortal Realm lords immediately sent a message to Dark Mist Lord.
Then they tried to persuade Ye Tian.
“Lord Endless, you’ve invaded Dark Mist Domain. Aren’t you afraid of Lord Dark Mist’s fury? Leave at once, and you still have a chance to live,” the Two-Step Immortal Realm lord urged.
Void Step!
Ye Tian stepped in front of the Two-Step Immortal Realm lord and struck out with the Intent Extreme Punch.
Boom!
The Two-Step Immortal Realm lord was directly blasted apart by one punch, and the Intent Extreme Punch was an intent legendary Eternal technique. This Two-Step Immortal Realm lord did not know any intent defense Eternal techniques at all, and his will was not very strong either, so Ye Tian directly Annihilated his will.
Thus, this Two-Step Immortal Realm lord fell.
In the True Void Legend Land.
Inside the Eternal treasure time-space projection palace where the aura of sword dao was being comprehended, a number of Immortal Realm lords and the legendary lord Ice-Tough Lord were cultivating and comprehending the aura of sword dao there.
Suddenly, the body of one Immortal Realm lord collapsed and vanished between heaven and earth.
This scene immediately drew the attention of the other Immortal Realm lords, and even Ice-Tough Lord looked over.
“Why did Yuze Lord’s body suddenly collapse?”
“That’s Yuze Lord’s clone. It should be Yuze Lord himself dissipating his own clone, right?”
“Dissipating his own body? How is that possible? The cost of re-condensing a clone is enormous. How could Yuze Lord be so foolish as to dissipate his own body?”
“Yuze Lord is a subordinate lord of Dark Mist Lord. His true body should be in Dark Mist Domain. Could it be that Yuze Lord can actually fall?”
“I’ve received news that Dark Mist Domain has been invaded.”
“Who invaded Dark Mist Domain? Void Beasts?”
“Not Void Beasts, it’s Lord Endless!”
“What? Lord Endless? How dare he invade Dark Mist Domain? Lord Endless is only an Immortal Realm lord. Isn’t he afraid of being killed by Dark Mist Lord?”
“Come, let’s go take a look. Something huge must have happened!”
Whoosh whoosh whoosh!!!!
One Immortal Realm lord after another went to watch the commotion, and one of Ice-Tough Lord’s clones also headed to Dark Mist Domain. She was also extremely curious about this. .........
……
Dark Mist Domain.
The Seven-Step Immortal Realm lord was already critically injured and on the verge of death. He wanted to escape, but simply could not. The difference in strength between the two sides was too great.
“A Thousandfold Void!”
Ye Tian used this move.
Boom!
Layers upon layers of void compressed in, and the Seven-Step Immortal Realm lord turned into a gigantic body of hundreds of millions of zhang to resist the suppression of the Thousandfold Void, but in an instant he was crushed into dust, and even the Thousandfold Void itself turned into countless fragments.
The Seven-Step Immortal Realm lord had also fallen.
And all of this happened in a very short time. The speed was too fast, and even Dark Mist Lord had no time to rescue him.
Just after this Seven-Step Immortal Realm lord fell, Dark Mist Lord’s true body rushed back from a ruin somewhere.
“Lord Endless, you’ve gone too far!!!!”
Dark Mist Lord said angrily.
“Too far? I never provoked you, yet you wanted to kill me, and you even wanted to target my Dark Forbidden Domain. Since you dared to do that, then you must bear my fury!” Ye Tian said coldly.
Without another word, the two immediately began slaughtering each other in the Void Region.
Rumble rumble rumble!!!!!
The aftermath of their battle even affected Dark Mist Domain. Dark Mist Lord tried to move farther away from Dark Mist Domain and lure Ye Tian to a more distant place to fight. Ye Tian did not care about that.
His goal was not to destroy Dark Mist Domain. Having already killed so many Eternal Realm experts in Dark Mist Domain, that was enough. In fact, he now even wanted to kill Dark Mist Lord.
Of course, he knew that would be very difficult, but he could try.
The Ye Tian who came here had two copied bodies, so he was fighting two against one and had a slight advantage.
Unfortunately, there was only one Yuanmeng Token, so it could not be equipped on either copied body.
What Ye Tian wanted to do now was first eliminate one of Dark Mist Lord’s clones. Then he would have the hands free to deal with Dark Mist Domain’s true body and the other clone.
Very quickly.
Ye Tian’s true body also made a move. In the Source Sea, he joined the two copied bodies in attacking one of Dark Mist Lord’s clones.
This was three against one, and with the help of the Yuanmeng Token, it completely crushed this clone of Dark Mist Lord.

Chapter 1695: Dark Mist Lord flees for his life!

Chapter 1695: Dark Mist Lord flees for his life!

Near Dark Mist Territory, Ye Tian’s two replicated bodies were locked in fierce combat with Dark Mist Lord’s true body.
At this time, Ice Container Lord was watching, and several other Legendary Realm Lords were observing this battle as well.
“Lord of Endlessness actually possesses such powerful strength!”
Saint Peak Lord was shocked.
Although Dark Mist Lord’s strength was not the strongest among the six Legendary Realm Lords, it was not the weakest either, and he had already been a Legendary Realm Lord for a very long time, so his strength was much greater than that of a newly broken-through Legendary Realm Lord.
Moreover, an Immortal Realm Lord was far too weak compared with a Legendary Realm Lord. Normally speaking, a Legendary Realm Lord could heavily injure or even kill the most top-tier Immortal Realm Lords.
Yet Ye Tian was actually able to contend with a Legendary Realm Lord like Dark Mist Lord. This was simply unbelievable.
“Lord of Endlessness can already match a true Legendary Realm Lord!”
Ice Container Lord muttered.
They did not participate in the battle between Ye Tian and Dark Mist Lord. Although they had known Dark Mist Lord for a longer time, they were also in a competitive relationship and would not offend Ye Tian just for Dark Mist Lord’s sake.
In addition, they could see that Ye Tian, while still at the Immortal Realm Lord level, already possessed battle strength comparable to a Legendary Realm Lord. If Ye Tian were to break through to the Legendary Realm Lord level, his strength would absolutely surpass theirs.
Therefore, they did not want to offend Ye Tian.
If Dark Mist Lord had learned of Ye Tian’s strength earlier, he would not have wanted to become enemies with Ye Tian either. But now that they were already enemies, there was naturally no room for reconciliation.
Time slowly passed. The battle between Ye Tian and Dark Mist Lord had already spread throughout the entire Time-Space Territory. Many, many Eternal Realm beings came to observe this battle, but none dared to approach; they watched from a distant area instead.
If they came closer, they might be blasted to death by the shockwaves from Ye Tian and Dark Mist Lord’s battle.
At first, they did not know the reason why Ye Tian and Dark Mist Lord were fighting, but it was soon exposed.
After all, Ye Tian and Dark Mist Lord’s avatars were fighting in the Source Sea, and those few Legendary Realm Lords only had to investigate a little to know the truth.
Immediately, the other five Legendary Lords became excited.
This was an Eternal Treasure, a true Eternal Treasure, not a temporal projection of an Eternal Treasure. It was also the first Eternal Treasure in the Source Sea, which made its significance enormous.
If they obtained this Eternal Treasure, their strength would surely soar.
At this point, the five Legendary Lords finally understood why Ye Tian was fighting Dark Mist Lord—it must have been for this Eternal Treasure.
Whoosh whoosh whoosh!!!
The avatars of the five Legendary Lords arrived at the Source Sea, silently waiting at the place where that Eternal Treasure was being born. Even though Ye Tian and Dark Mist Lord were fighting nearby, they did not care at all.
……
“Lord of Endlessness, the other five Legendary Realm Lords have already discovered the Eternal Treasure here. There is no point in continuing this battle!”
Dark Mist Lord said.
He no longer wanted to keep fighting because he was at a disadvantage.
If the battle continued, he really might fall.
Even if only an avatar perished, that would still be a huge loss, so he wanted to call a truce with Ye Tian.
“Dream on!”
Ye Tian directly refused.
Dark Mist Lord wanted to stop, but Ye Tian did not.
Dark Mist Lord had dared to threaten him and even wanted to act against the Dark Forbidden Zone. That was equivalent to touching his reverse scale.
As for the Eternal Treasure being discovered, so be it. In any case, the Eternal Treasure had not truly finished forming yet, and he was not in the least anxious.
In the days that followed, Ye Tian crazily surrounded and killed Dark Mist Lord’s three bodies.
As time went on, the avatar of Dark Mist Lord that was besieged by Ye Tian’s three bodies could no longer hold on. After all, those three bodies also had the assistance of the Primordial Order Token, so Dark Mist Lord was naturally far from their match.
At this time,
Dark Mist Lord’s avatar was covered in cracks, and countless particles inside its body had been shattered by the Half-Step Legendary Eternal Technique.
Finally, on this day, this avatar of Dark Mist Lord was completely blasted to death by Ye Tian.
One avatar killed—that was a catastrophic disaster for Dark Mist Lord!
Whoosh!!!
Ye Tian’s three bodies tore through the spacetime barrier of the Source Sea and headed toward Dark Mist Territory, preparing to join the other two bodies and use all five bodies to surround and kill Dark Mist Lord’s true body.
Once Dark Mist Lord’s true body was killed, the other avatar would also collapse.
Boom boom boom!!!
The arrival of Ye Tian’s three bodies caused Dark Mist Lord’s true body to tremble all over.
Although the true body possessed the most weapons and trump cards, it was not much stronger than the other two avatars. It simply could not withstand Ye Tian’s five bodies. Once surrounded, there would truly be a risk of falling.
Losing an avatar was one thing. Although the loss was severe, it was not unbearable. But if the true body were to fall, then it would truly be dead.
After all, Dark Mist Lord was not like Ye Tian, whose six bodies could all be counted as true bodies.
“Run!”
Dark Mist Lord panicked and fled at all costs.
Very quickly, Dark Mist Lord fled into a more distant region of void, while Ye Tian’s five bodies pursued him.
But at this moment, the avatar of Dark Mist Lord left in the Source Sea began charging madly toward the Dark Forbidden Zone.
Ye Tian’s strength was indeed very powerful, but he could not completely stop Dark Mist Lord from attacking the Dark Forbidden Zone. If Dark Mist Lord fought desperately, he could still heavily injure or even destroy the Dark Forbidden Zone.
Helplessly, Ye Tian had to withdraw several replicated bodies to assist the replicated body remaining in the Source Sea, thereby stopping Dark Mist Lord.
In that case, Dark Mist Lord’s true body would have a great chance of escaping.
It was obvious that Dark Mist Lord was sacrificing his second avatar in order to gain a chance to flee.
“He still let Dark Mist Lord’s true body escape!”
Ye Tian said helplessly.
Dark Mist Lord’s speed was not particularly fast, but he had many trump cards, and he also had a special Eternal Treasure that directly helped him flee into the depths of the void region, making it impossible to lock onto his position for the time being.
Since his position could not be locked down in a short time, with Dark Mist Lord’s speed, he naturally escaped to who-knew-where.
Afterwards,
Ye Tian’s six bodies joined forces to surround the avatar Dark Mist Lord had left in the Source Sea, and soon killed it.
By this point, only Dark Mist Lord’s true body had escaped, while his two avatars had perished in the Source Sea.
As for Dark Mist Lord’s outcome, the other five Legendary Realm Lords were very shocked, and thus all became extremely wary of Ye Tian.
Not long after, the Eternal Treasure in the Source Sea was finally fully formed.
At this point, it would depend on who could take away this Eternal Treasure.

Chapter 1696: The Five Legendary Domain Lords Were Dumbfounded!

Chapter 1696: The Five Legendary Domain Lords Were Dumbfounded!

Source Sea.
The place where the Eternal Treasure was born, Ye Tian and the five Legendary Domain Lords of the Time-Space Territory were all here.
At this moment, Domain Lord Bing Han proposed, “Everyone, the Eternal Treasure is extremely rare, and it is very difficult to take away. Whoever takes it away gets it. We must not kill one another. How about that?”
“I agree!”
Domain Lord Holy Peak immediately agreed.
The other Legendary Domain Lords also agreed one after another, and Ye Tian naturally agreed as well. He had no way of contending against the combined strength of the other five Legendary Domain Lords. This time, when dealing with Domain Lord Dark Mist, if even one Legendary Domain Lord had helped, he would not have been able to kill Dark Mist Lord’s clone.
He did not want to become the target of everyone, so he agreed to Domain Lord Bing Han’s proposal.
However, everyone clearly stated that Immortal Domain Lords were not allowed to approach this place. If an Immortal Domain Lord took away the Eternal Treasure, then it would be difficult to deal with.
Although the possibility of an Immortal Domain Lord taking away the Eternal Treasure was too small, it could not be ignored.
Of course, if other Immortal experts also possessed combat strength on par with Ye Tian’s, then they would naturally be qualified to participate as well. However, within the Time-Space Territory, there was only one Immortal Domain Lord like Ye Tian.
Next, Ye Tian and the five Legendary Domain Lords sealed off this area, not allowing any living beings to approach.
Ye Tian also arranged a few clone bodies in the Dark Forbidden Domain to prevent Domain Lord Dark Mist from running back and destroying the Dark Forbidden Domain.
The chance of that happening was very small, but Ye Tian still had to guard against it.
……
Ye Tian knew that if he wanted to take away the Eternal Treasure, he had to comprehend the corresponding Eternal Dao, and only after reaching Entry could he take away the Eternal Treasure. Otherwise, he would need the strength of a Legendary expert. None of the Legendary Domain Lords present had that kind of strength, so they could only obediently comprehend the Eternal Dao.
However, the five Legendary Domain Lords still tried once.
Boom！！！！
The five Legendary Domain Lords all rushed toward the location of the Eternal Treasure, but after flying for a long time, they still could not get close to it.
Afterward, they all obediently sat down and began comprehending the Eternal Dao.
Clearly, they also knew the method of obtaining the Eternal Treasure. After all, they had been Legendary Domain Lords for a very long time, and they had obtained who knew how many inheritances. Knowing this secret was not strange.
Ye Tian also immediately began comprehending the Eternal Dao contained within this Eternal Treasure. His will continuously approached the Eternal Treasure, sensing its aura in order to comprehend its Eternal Dao.
After a long time, Ye Tian roughly understood what kind of Eternal Dao this leaf-like Eternal Treasure contained.
“All-Life…”
“Division!”
These were two kinds of Eternal Dao.
The All-Life Eternal Dao could heal injuries, cure the injuries of all things, or restore the vitality of all things. As for Division, it could divide into one fake clone after another. It was similar to Domain Lord Dark Mist’s Dark Mist Shadow Body; in fact, the effect was about the same. If the Division Eternal Dao were cultivated to the Extreme, it could permanently form a true clone.
For many Immortal experts, if they wanted to add another clone, they could cultivate the Division Eternal Dao.
However, comprehending a true Eternal Dao was difficult to begin with, and cultivating it to the Extreme was naturally even harder.
“I’ll still cultivate the All-Life Eternal Dao. If I can cultivate it to Entry, I can take away this Eternal Treasure!”
Ye Tian decided.
Ye Tian’s realm was only Immortal, and compared with the Legendary Domain Lords, his realm was much lower. But he possessed many Legendary Innate Abilities and Immortal Innate Abilities, so he had a huge advantage in comprehending the Eternal Dao.
Moreover, Ye Tian could also use clone bodies to study the All-Life Eternal Dao, using his own body as an experiment, which would further increase his comprehension speed.
Therefore, Ye Tian was fully confident that he would be the first to comprehend the All-Life Eternal Dao to Entry and thus take away this Eternal Treasure.
As for the five Legendary Domain Lords, they were destined to end up with nothing.
Time slowly passed, and before anyone knew it, ten thousand Eternal Years had passed in the Source Sea.
Ye Tian and the five Legendary Domain Lords had been in closed-door cultivation here for such a long time.
The five Legendary Domain Lords appeared very patient. Perhaps to them, a mere ten thousand Eternal Years was only a very short time. They remained calm and unhurried, seemingly not believing that anyone could cultivate the Eternal Dao contained within the Eternal Treasure to Entry in such a short time.
What they did not know was that Ye Tian had really cultivated the All-Life Eternal Dao to Entry.
“All-Life Eternal Dao, Entry!”
Ye Tian opened his eyes, his gaze filled entirely with joy.
Immediately after, he walked toward that Eternal Treasure. As the power of the All-Life Eternal Dao unfolded, the endless space-time was pushed aside by Ye Tian.
Very soon, Ye Tian reached the front of that Eternal Treasure and took it in one hand.
Buzz！！！！
The leaf-like Eternal Treasure landed before Ye Tian and truly became an object in his hand.
“It really is an Eternal Treasure!”
Before, there had been a ninety-nine percent chance, but now that it was in his hand, it was one hundred percent certain.
Whoosh whoosh whoosh！！！！
One clone body after another of Ye Tian descended here; this was to ensure the safety of the Eternal Treasure.
After all, facing an Eternal Treasure, he was not afraid that the other five Legendary Domain Lords would be unable to resist making a move.
If they really did make a move and he could not contend with them, then he would have no choice but to take his family and flee the Source Sea.
At that time, the five Legendary Domain Lords would have to face Ye Tian’s retaliation in the future.
“W-what, the Invincible Domain Lord took away the Eternal Treasure?”
“How could he comprehend the All-Life Eternal Dao and one of the Division Eternal Dao so quickly to Entry? We are Legendary Domain Lords, and we have not even cultivated them to Entry at all?”
“Unless he had already come into contact with the All-Life Eternal Dao and Division Eternal Dao before, which is why he entered so quickly this time!”
At this moment, the five Legendary Domain Lords all looked unconcerned on the surface, yet they were itching to rush up and seize it immediately.
But they hesitated. If they robbed him, they would completely offend Ye Tian, and they might not even be able to seize it successfully.
If Ye Tian escaped, then when Ye Tian broke through to Legendary Domain Lord and returned to the Time-Space Territory, that would be their doom.
After all, Ye Tian was too monstrous; they had to admit that in terms of talent and aptitude, they were far inferior to Ye Tian.
So they did not dare take the risk.
“Congratulations, Invincible Domain Lord!”
Domain Lord Bing Han was the first to offer congratulations. Her words indicated her stance; it was tantamount to completely giving up on seizing the Eternal Treasure and acknowledging that this Eternal Treasure belonged to Ye Tian.
Afterward, the other Legendary Domain Lords also congratulated Ye Tian one after another and did not make a move. After all, the price of making a move was too great. They were Legendary Domain Lords, the true rulers of the Time-Space Territory, eternal and indestructible existences; there was no need to take such a risk.
Now that the first Eternal Treasure had been born in the Source Sea, perhaps a second or even a third Eternal Treasure would be born in the future, and perhaps it would land in their hands.
Thus, they suppressed the urge to act.
“Thank you, everyone!”
Ye Tian said gratefully, and at the same time, he also let out a sigh of relief. After all, as long as they did not break ties, the Dark Forbidden Domain and his family would be safe. Otherwise, he could not guarantee their safety.

Chapter 1697 Calan Leaf! Auxiliary Eternal Treasure!

Chapter 1697 Calan Leaf! Auxiliary Eternal Treasure!

The five Legendary Realm lords did not linger in the Source Sea for too long; otherwise, the moment they saw Ye Tian, they would have thought of the Eternal Treasures and could not help but make a move, which would have completely torn their faces with Ye Tian.
Therefore, they still chose to leave the Source Sea with no sight of it, no pain in their hearts, and directly returned to their own eternal temporal-spatial territories.
However, they did send quite a few of their subordinates to garrison the temporal-spatial territories. If the Source Sea continued to give birth to Eternal Treasures, they would be able to know at the first moment.
……
Dark Forbidden Domain.
Ye Tian was studying the Eternal Treasure he had just obtained. Through refining it, he learned that this Eternal Treasure was called the Calan Leaf. Judging from its power, the Calan Leaf was much better than the Eternal Treasure Hunyuan Token, and was fully comparable to Qingxu Bell, which belonged to Jingxu.
The Calan Leaf had no small number of uses. It could save his life and also help Ye Tian escape, making it an auxiliary Eternal Treasure.
This kind of Eternal Treasure was extremely popular, and was even rarer than attack-type Eternal Treasures.
Especially when exploring certain ruins, preserving one’s life was particularly important.
Sometimes, having stronger attack power was of no use at all; when facing a desperate situation, one could hardly survive.
The Calan Leaf could allow Ye Tian, when facing a fatal attack, to almost protect all the particles in his body. This method made him nearly immortal, unless the enemy he faced was too powerful.
Moreover, the Calan Leaf could allow Ye Tian to split into countless forms and flee, similar to the Void Light method of a Tier 5 Void Beast. A Tier 5 Void Beast could transform into billions upon billions of strands of Void Light and rush into the depths of the void region; even Legendary Realm lords would not have time to stop it.
The Calan Leaf had a similar effect as well, and even a better one, with greater speed. It did not even require self-mutilation, whereas the Void Light of a Void Beast was in fact a self-damaging method. Although it could save one’s life, the cost was great, so unless a Tier 5 Void Beast was facing utter desperation, it would not use it.
So to a certain extent, the Calan Leaf was too heaven-defying.
“Not bad. Hunyuan Token can enhance my strength, while the Calan Leaf can enhance my life-preserving ability. With these two Eternal Treasures in hand, even if the five Legendary Realm lords of the temporal-spatial territories join forces to besiege me, I still won’t fear them!”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
In addition, if Ye Tian’s clone body were to conduct experiments in the future, with the help of the Calan Leaf, it would not collapse so easily, which would be of even greater help to Ye Tian.
“My next goal is still to cultivate to the level of a Legendary Realm lord as soon as possible. As long as I do not reach the Legendary Realm lord realm, it will be very difficult to suppress other Legendary Realm lords.”
Thus, Ye Tian worked hard at cultivation, increasing the degree of fusion between his will and body, allowing his cultivation to constantly approach the Extreme of a Nine-Step Immortal Realm lord. Only when he reached the Extreme of a Nine-Step Immortal Realm lord could he attempt to break through to the Legendary Realm lord realm.
With the help of Hunyuan Token, Ye Tian was naturally drawing closer and closer to the Extreme of a Nine-Step Immortal Realm lord. In fact, he was not too far from the Extreme of a Nine-Step Immortal Realm lord now; only, the closer one got to the Limit, the harder it became to improve.
For example, going from 96% to 97% fusion was already extremely difficult, and 98% to 99% was also extremely difficult.
The so-called Extreme was ninety-nine point ninety-nine ninety-nine...
This was infinitely close to 100% fusion, and even looked like 100% fusion, but in the dark, there was still that tiny bit that had not fused. This was the Extreme of a Nine-Step Immortal Realm lord, and also a bottleneck and shackle. In fact, many Nine-Step Immortal Realm lords at the Extreme could not even find that last unfused trace, and simply did not know how to attempt a breakthrough to the Legendary Realm lord realm.
This was the so-called bottleneck shackle!
If one truly found it, then the shackle would be broken and one would advance to become a Legendary Realm lord, but very few could truly break through.
However, Ye Tian was still very confident in himself; he believed 100% that he could break through.
In the blink of an eye, five hundred thousand Eternal years passed.
At this time, the degree of fusion between Ye Tian’s will and body had already reached more than 99%, and exactly how far it had reached was difficult to estimate.
However, Ye Tian felt that he was still a tiny bit short of the peak of the Nine-Step Immortal Realm lord, because he could still continue to fuse his will and body, albeit very, very slowly.
Finally, after another fifty thousand Eternal years had passed, Ye Tian felt that his entire body had already completely fused with his will, but he still had not broken through to the Legendary Realm lord realm.
At this point, Ye Tian knew clearly that he had already reached the Extreme of a Nine-Step Immortal Realm lord, and was only one last thread away from breaking through to the Legendary Realm lord tier.
For a very long time after that, Ye Tian made no progress at all, as if he had been blocked by a bottleneck.
But Ye Tian was not anxious in the slightest. Every clone body was cultivating on its own, preparing for the assault on the Legendary Realm lord realm.
On this day.
Ye Tian discussed the Dao with Lord Bing Han. Among the five Legendary Realm lords, Ye Tian and Lord Bing Han had a rather good relationship.
“Lord Bing Han, how can an Immortal Realm lord break through to the Legendary Realm lord realm?” Ye Tian asked for guidance.
Lord Bing Han smiled slightly and said, “It seems that Lord Endless has cultivated to the Extreme of a Nine-Step Immortal Realm lord. This speed really makes me ashamed. As for how to break through to the Legendary Realm lord, every Legendary Realm lord’s breakthrough method is different. Some experienced endless battles and finally comprehended it, thereby breaking through to the Legendary Realm lord. Some took certain eternal treasures and thus completed the breakthrough. Some experienced long years of bitter cultivation and, without realizing it, broke through. As for me, I entered a wondrous sight and fell into a long period of enlightenment, which allowed me to completely finish the last trace of fusion and break through to the Legendary Realm lord. If you asked me to give some advice, I really wouldn’t know what to say.”
“So that’s how it is. Many thanks for Lord Bing Han’s guidance!”
Ye Tian said gratefully.
After some time, the Dao discussion between Ye Tian and Lord Bing Han ended.
On this day.
Ye Tian was cultivating, pondering how to break through to the Legendary Realm lord realm.
Suddenly, he thought of one point.
The Legendary Realm lords on the temporal-spatial territories’ side cultivated by fusing their will with the innate eternal rules, and only in this way could they grow step by step and eventually attempt to reach the Lord of Legends realm.
In fact, his attainments in the fusion of will and innate eternal rules had surpassed many Legendary Realm lords.
If he forcibly fused the power after the fusion of will and innate eternal rules with his body, it would be equivalent to stimulating the body. This would count as forced fusion, but it might reveal the final point of inability within the body.
If that were the case, he could break through to the Legendary Realm lord realm.

Chapter 1698: Break Through to Become a Legendary Lord!

Chapter 1698: Break Through to Become a Legendary Lord!

In the secluded cultivation site.
Ye Tian began forcibly merging the power of the will law with his body. This was equivalent to merging the body, will, and innate eternal law in all three aspects, a kind of cultivation that only a Legendary Lord had the qualification to touch.
At this moment, Ye Tian was also undergoing such cultivation.
Buzz!!!
An odd power seemed about to be born, but Ye Tian's body could no longer bear it; it seemed about to shatter.
At this time, Ye Tian had been paying attention to the condition inside his body.
If his body were turned into an endless world of particles, then these three powers at this moment would be interwoven across countless particle worlds, appearing extremely clear.
As time passed, Ye Tian's body gradually collapsed, but he did not care in the slightest and still carefully observed the changes inside his body.
No one knew how much time had passed when Ye Tian suddenly sensed something unusual somewhere in his body.
At a certain spot in the barrier of the will source sea within his body, the will and body here had not fully merged; they were still lacking the slightest bit. However, this place was on the will source sea itself and covered by countless will powers, so it was extremely difficult to detect.
But now, during the process of forcibly merging the will law power with the body, this place was exposed.
With a boom!
Ye Tian's body exploded along with it, but he had already found the source of the problem. Afterward, he only needed to completely merge this spot, and he could break through the shackle, fully fuse his will and body to 100%, which also meant stepping into the realm of a Legendary Lord.
His true self.
“Begin!”
Ye Tian found the location and began merging the will and body there. This final bit was very difficult to merge, to the point that he could not even feel that it had not yet fused. At first, there was almost no reaction. If he had not been certain, he would have already given up.
Time passed little by little, and Ye Tian gradually sensed the problem here, doing his utmost to merge will and body.
In this way, one tribulation era after another passed, but this final trace remained unbelievably stubborn.
It took a full six eternal years before Ye Tian finally completely fused that last trace.
The moment the fusion succeeded, Ye Tian's entire body began to transform.
Boom!!!!!
The leap began!
Ye Tian's Immortal Stage body was transforming into a Legendary Stage body, his eternal power was also surging, and his willpower was rapidly increasing.
Endless source energy poured from the source sea into his body, spurring him to break through even faster.
At the same time.
One after another, the Legendary Lords in the Time-Space Territory sensed Ye Tian's breakthrough. After all, the commotion was too great, and there was no concealment at all, so it was hard for them not to know.
“The Endless Ancestor broke through just like that?”
Lord Bing Han was shocked.
Previously, Ye Tian had come to ask her about breaking through, and she had been unable to give any useful advice. She had even thought that Ye Tian would remain at this level for at least tens of millions of eternal years, or even hundreds of millions of eternal years, which was all very normal.
If luck were bad, it was not impossible for him to remain stuck at the Immortal Stage Lord realm forever.
Yet only a few eternal years had passed, and Ye Tian had already broken through. This speed was simply too fast.
The other Legendary Stage Lords were even more shocked, because there had been no sign of it at all before. They had not even known Ye Tian had reached the level where he could attempt to impact the Legendary Lord realm, and it felt as if, all of a sudden, Ye Tian had broken through. Everything had happened too abruptly.
Ye Tian's breakthrough was not exactly a good thing for them. Although it strengthened the Time-Space Territory, from their individual perspective, there was now a Legendary Stage Lord far above them, and their future actions would be restricted, as they would be afraid of offending Ye Tian.
However, they had no way to stop Ye Tian from breaking through; everything was already settled.
After a long stretch of time, Ye Tian's realm finally stabilized.
-
“My strength has actually increased so much!”
Ye Tian was incomparably excited.
At this moment, his body was more than ten times stronger, his eternal power had increased by several dozen times, and his willpower had also become several times stronger.
Now, even without relying on the Primordial Token, he could easily beat and even suppress Dark Mist Lord to death. If he used the Primordial Token, he could probably kill Dark Mist Lord within a short time.
More importantly, he had now become a Legendary Stage Lord, allowing him to merge his will and innate eternal law, and since his will itself had already merged with his body, he could attempt to fuse all three powers together.
By then, he would be able to create a legendary eternal technique of his own.
Once he mastered a legendary eternal technique, his strength would rise even further.
Of course, the Primordial Token could now also raise his legendary eternal technique to the level of a weaker legendary eternal technique, but it would definitely not be as good as a true legendary eternal technique when used.
In short, during this period just after breaking through to the Legendary Stage Lord realm, his strength would still rise enormously.
Thus, Ye Tian continued cultivating and improving, while his other clone bodies appeared in public.
At the first opportunity, the five Legendary Stage Lords of the Time-Space Territory came to the Bloodbone Territory to congratulate Ye Tian.
“Congratulations to Lord Endless on ascending to the Legendary Stage Lord realm!”
“Congratulations to Lord Endless on ascending to the Legendary Stage Lord realm!”
“Congratulations to Lord Endless on ascending to the Legendary Stage Lord realm!”
· ·········Ask for flowers··· ·····
One Legendary Stage Lord after another offered their congratulations.
“Thank you, everyone!”
Ye Tian was also quite happy, and immediately invited the five Legendary Stage Lords into his palace, where a feast began.
During the feast, everyone discussed the Dao and exchanged insights, and only after a long time did they disperse.
By exchanging with these five Legendary Stage Lords, Ye Tian gained quite a lot. Before, he had only had a rough idea of the division among Legendary Stage Lords, but after discussing it with these five, the distinctions in strength among Legendary Stage Lords became much clearer to him.
Immortal Stage Lords are divided according to the degree of fusion between will and body into first through ninth-step Immortal Stage Lords, but the classification of Legendary Lords is different.
On the Time-Space Territory side, Legendary Lords have their will and body fused, and their body and innate eternal law fused. In theory, the will and innate eternal law are also fused, but that is not actually the case. It is like an egg with two yolks: the egg is the body, and the two yolks are respectively the will and the innate eternal law.
..... .. 0
However.
The will and innate eternal law themselves have no limit. Even if the will and innate eternal law inside the body have fused, they can still continue to fuse without any end.
However, once the will and innate eternal law within the body's particles begin to fuse, such a Legendary Lord is called a Initial Stage Legendary Lord; if the will and innate eternal law within the body are all fused, such a Legendary Lord is called a Perfected Stage Legendary Lord; and if one continues to fuse will and innate eternal law, although they can no longer fuse with the body because the body has already been fully fused, the will and innate eternal law are infinite, allowing one to accumulate endless will-law power. When that will-law power accumulates to a certain degree, a will-law domain can be formed, and such a Legendary Lord is called a Domain-level Legendary Lord. For many Legendary Lords, a Domain-level Legendary Lord is almost the peak of a Legendary Lord, but there is still one more level of Legendary Lord, and that is the Transcendence Stage Legendary Lord. As for how to reach that level, even the five Legendary Lords did not know.
Ordinary Legendary Lord, Initial Stage Legendary Lord, Perfected Stage Legendary Lord, Domain Stage Legendary Lord, and Transcendence Stage Legendary Lord.
These are the five major realms of Legendary Lords.
And a newly broken-through Legendary Lord belongs to the category of Ordinary Legendary Lord, while Ye Tian was in fact not yet considered a Legendary Lord, because he had not yet fused the three powers. However, for him, that could be accomplished very easily, after all, he had already begun fusing his will and innate eternal law long ago.
Therefore, it would not take long before he could become a Initial Stage Legendary Lord and.

Chapter 1699 Legendary Eternal Technique!

Chapter 1699 Legendary Eternal Technique!

After Ye Tian broke through to the Lord of the Legendary Realm, he spent the next ten Eternal years consolidating his realm, silently increasing his Eternal power and physical strength, and did not immediately attempt to break into the Initial Stage Lord of the Legendary Realm.
Very quickly, ten Eternal years passed.
Thus, Ye Tian began to break into the Initial Stage.
The gap between an ordinary Lord of the Legendary Realm and an Initial Stage Lord was not very big, but compared with the top existences among the Initial Stage, an ordinary Lord of the Legendary Realm fell far behind.
For other Lords of the Legendary Realm, how to fuse willpower with the innate Eternal law was an incomparably difficult step. For example, a Legendary Lord like Lord Bing Han had not taken this step, which was why he kept searching for all kinds of cultivation secret arts that fused willpower with the innate Eternal law, in order to seek a breakthrough point.
Among the five Legendary Lords in the Time-Space Territory at present, Ye Tian estimated that only Lord Sheng Feng had truly broken through to the Initial Stage, but that was only a suspicion, because Lord Sheng Feng hid himself very deeply. If he did not reveal his true strength, then with Ye Tian’s current cultivation realm, it would still be difficult to see through his realm at a glance.
Ye Tian began to merge his willpower, body, and innate Eternal law, and this process did not encounter any bottleneck at all. Very quickly, the three aspects began to fuse, producing a power of a higher level.
In the Time-Space Territory and the Source Sea, there was no description or definition of this power, but in the Boundless Sea, the power formed after the fusion of body, willpower, and innate Eternal law was called Eternal Original Power, a higher-level version of Eternal power.
With the birth of Eternal Original Power, Ye Tian’s body underwent a slight change, but because the degree of fusion was not high, this transformation was not very obvious.
This degree of fusion, like the Lord level of the Immortal Realm, was also divided into ten parts. Once the fusion reached ten parts, it meant a Perfected Stage Legendary Lord, while from zero to 99 percent all belonged to an Initial Stage Legendary Lord.
Since Ye Tian himself already had a considerable degree of fusion between his willpower and innate Eternal law, cultivation was very easy at the beginning of the Initial Stage Legendary Lord realm, with no bottleneck or obstacle at all.
In less than one Eternal year, Ye Tian’s cultivation had reached the third step of the Initial Stage Legendary Lord, which meant the fusion degree of body, willpower, and innate Eternal law had reached thirty percent, and thirty percent Eternal Original Power had been born within his body.
Such strength was naturally much stronger than that of a newly broken-through Initial Stage Legendary Lord.
Moreover, Ye Tian was also trying to create a Legendary Eternal Technique, and he already had a rudimentary form of it; it was not far from truly creating it.
This day.
Ye Tian came to the Black Mountain Prison, prepared to challenge those Legendary Realm Lord prisoners in the Black Mountain Prison.
Not only could he fight these Legendary Realm Lord prisoners to increase his combat experience, but he also had a chance to gain benefits and opportunities from them, so sending a clone body here to fight for a long time was not a problem.
Thus, Ye Tian entered one of the prisons holding a Legendary Realm Lord prisoner.
This Legendary Realm Lord was called Lord Shu Hai. Ye Tian entered Lord Shu Hai’s prison and saw this Lord Shu Hai.
“Initial Stage Legendary Lord!” Ye Tian saw through the other’s cultivation realm.
To be more specific, this Lord Shu Hai’s cultivation was at the fifth step of the Initial Stage Legendary Lord, with fifty percent Eternal Original Power contained within his body, which was even higher than Ye Tian’s cultivation.
However, a higher cultivation did not mean greater combat strength.
For example, Ye Tian had a very solid foundation, had created many top-tier Legendary Eternal Techniques, and was even about to create a Legendary-grade Eternal Technique. If he borrowed the Hunyuan Token, he could even match a Perfected Stage Legendary Lord.
However, Ye Tian did not activate either the Hunyuan Token or the Jialan Leaf, these two Eternal supreme treasures, but instead relied on his own strength to battle the other party.
Fighting Lord Shu Hai, Ye Tian discovered that the other party’s use of Eternal Original Power had reached a very exquisite level, worthy of his study.
In addition, Lord Shu Hai also possessed several top-tier Legendary Eternal Techniques and was skilled in many kinds of Eternal Paths.
Without the Hunyuan Token and the Jialan Leaf, Ye Tian could only barely contend with the other party a little; it was unexpectedly somewhat difficult to completely defeat him.
Ye Tian also knew that the Legendary Lords imprisoned here for endless ages were all far from simple, so he did not find this strange at all.
Just like that, over the long years that followed, Ye Tian’s clone body sought out one Legendary Realm Lord prisoner after another, using them to temper his combat strength and his adaptation to the Lord level of the Legendary Realm, and his use of Eternal Original Power became even more skillful.
After several Eternal years, Ye Tian’s cultivation did not increase much, but his combat strength was already enough to suppress Lord Shu Hai.
Before he knew it, tens of thousands of Eternal years passed.
After enduring such a long period of bitter cultivation, Ye Tian’s cultivation greatly increased.
Now, he had already reached the seventh step of the Initial Stage Lord, with seven percent Eternal Original Power contained throughout his body, and his physical toughness had also far surpassed the past. ..........
In addition.
He had also created a Legendary-grade Eternal Technique, and not just one, but basically they had all been perfected based on his previous top-tier Legendary Eternal Techniques.
For example, Void Step, Ten-Thousandfold Void, Void True Body, Will Wall Light, and Will Severing Void Sword had all become Legendary-grade Eternal Techniques.
If he borrowed the Hunyuan Token, these Legendary-grade Eternal Techniques could all obtain a certain boost, and by using the Hunyuan Token he could also form an willpower law domain similar to that of a Domain Ancestor Legendary Lord, making his strength naturally even more powerful.
With Ye Tian’s current strength, he could easily suppress any Initial Stage Legendary Lord.
“My regular combat strength should now be enough to match a Perfected Stage Legendary Lord. If I borrow the Hunyuan Token and the Jialan Leaf, these two Eternal supreme treasures, I even have a chance to contend with a Domain Ancestor Legendary Lord a little.” Ye Tian said confidently.
Even in the Boundless Sea, Domain Ancestor Legendary Lords were not many, and were definitely counted as overlords of a region.
-
Somewhere in the Void Region.
A group of people was rapidly traversing here, and one of them was none other than the Dark Mist Lord whom Ye Tian knew.
At this moment, the Dark Mist Lord was respectfully communicating with a Legendary Realm Lord.
“Young Master Qin Yu, in not much time, we will be able to reach the Time-Space Territory of the Source Sea.” Dark Mist Lord said.
The Legendary Realm Lord known as Young Master Qin Yu said coldly, “Dark Mist Lord, you said your Source Sea is very weak, with only six Legendary Lords and one or even two Eternal supreme treasures. If this information is wrong and has delayed me for so long, I will not spare you.”
“Young Master Qin Yu, I would not dare to deceive you. Everything I said is true. I only hope that Young Master Qin Yu can help me kill that Nine-Step Immortal Realm Lord.” Dark Mist Lord hurriedly said.
“Rest assured, it’s merely an Immortal Realm Lord. I can kill him with a wave of my hand!” Young Master Qin Yu said with full confidence.
Dark Mist Lord knew that Qin Yu was not bragging, but truly had that strength.
Qin Yu was a peak Initial Stage Legendary Lord from the Boundless Sea, only one step away from the Perfected Stage, and he also possessed an Eternal supreme treasure. His own strength was even greater than that of an ordinary Perfected Stage.
By accident, Dark Mist Lord found his way to the Boundless Sea, and was seized by Qin Yu. Only then did he exchange the information about the Source Sea and the Eternal supreme treasure for his life, and now he had completely thrown in his lot with Qin Yu.
“Limitless Lord, once I descend upon the Source Sea, you are dead for sure!”
Dark Mist Lord thought darkly.

Chapter 1700: People from Wuliang Sea!

Chapter 1700: People from Wuliang Sea!

“I never expected that I would actually find another weak Eternal Sea!”
Qin Yu was greatly excited in his heart.
Wuliang Sea was an Eternal Sea, and Yuan Sea was also an Eternal Sea.
And the Eternal Seas he knew of were not just one, but each and every one of them was extremely powerful. This was the first time he had ever seen an Eternal Sea like Yuan Sea, whose strongest beings were only a few legendary realm lords.
Such an Eternal Sea was bound to be very young. Although the resources born from it might not be many, once such an Eternal Sea was controlled and one’s own power developed, then in the future even if some precious resources were born, such as Eternal Supreme Treasures, they could all fall into his hands.
This was a huge opportunity!
What’s more, there was still a possibility of obtaining two Eternal Supreme Treasures.
The Qin family, which was powerful in Wuliang Sea, did not have many Eternal Supreme Treasures either. And as a direct descendant young master of the Qin family, he had only been granted one Eternal Supreme Treasure. If he could obtain a few more Eternal Supreme Treasures, his strength would increase greatly.
“This time my luck is not bad. Luckily I seized Dark Mist Lord in time. Otherwise, this opportunity would not have fallen into my hands, and those perfected realm or even domain realm legendary lords would probably all want to come here.” Qin Yu thought to himself.
From Dark Mist Lord’s mouth, he learned that the several legendary realm lords in Yuan Sea’s time-space territory were relatively weak, and almost all of them were ordinary legendary lords; at most, there was only one initial realm legendary lord.
And this time he had brought eighteen ordinary legendary lords and three initial realm lords, plus himself, a top initial realm legendary lord capable of rivaling a perfected realm legendary lord. That was enough to occupy Yuan Sea and make the many Eternal realm beings submit.
Once Yuan Sea was fully occupied, he would then establish a time-space staircase to connect it with Wuliang Sea. Then traveling between Yuan Sea and Wuliang Sea would be very easy, and he could even summon experts from the Qin family at any time to garrison this place and ensure that no other force would seize it away.
Another stretch of time passed.
On this day.
Dark Mist Lord brought Qin Yu and these legendary lords to an area outside the time-space territory, where one could sense one time-space territory after another.
“It really is another Eternal Sea, but its structure is somewhat different from Wuliang Sea. The resources of Yuan Sea are mainly concentrated in the time-space territories, using Yuan Sea’s origin energy to nourish the time-space territories, whereas our Wuliang Sea birthed countless Wuliang Islands on its own, and the Wuliang Islands float on Wuliang Sea.”
Qin Yu murmured.
Whoosh, whoosh, whoosh!!!!
These legendary realm lords instantly crossed this stretch of void and descended into the time-space territory.
At this moment, Qin Yu ordered, “Dark Mist Lord, take me to the headquarters of your lord alliance.”
Dark Mist Lord said in a low voice, “Young Master Qin Yu, shouldn’t we go kill Ye Tian? This person has five clones. If we let him escape, that would be bad.”
“You want to disobey my order? Besides, a mere Immortal realm lord is not worth mentioning. If I handle my own matters well, I will casually help you eliminate him. If you say one more word of nonsense, you know the consequences.” Qin Yu said impatiently.
Dark Mist Lord’s expression changed drastically, and he immediately did not dare speak anymore.
Although Qin Yu had violated his promise, his strength was too weak, and he simply could not resist Qin Yu. Even if Qin Yu really did not help him, he could do nothing about it.
In fact, Qin Yu did not care at all about the so-called promise, after all Dark Mist Lord had not much value to him now.
However, Ye Tian definitely had to be killed. After all, there was a very high possibility that Ye Tian possessed an Eternal Supreme Treasure capable of enhancing one’s strength; otherwise, there was no way he could defeat Dark Mist Lord, a legendary realm lord, while still at the Immortal realm level.
But first, he had to control the lord alliance before dealing with Ye Tian.
Also.
As for the Eternal Supreme Treasure born in Yuan Sea, whoever it ended up in could be found out as long as he controlled the lord alliance here.
Right now, controlling the lord alliance was the most urgent matter.
Whoosh, whoosh, whoosh!!!
Qin Yu led the many legendary realm lords and shuttled to the headquarters of the lord alliance.
Boom!!!!
Wave after wave of legendary realm lord aura spread out, instantly making the many Eternal realm beings in the lord alliance tremble endlessly.
At this time, Holy Peak Lord, Ice Seal Lord, Great Wilderness Lord, Extreme Light Lord, and Six Suns Lord all appeared.
“So many legendary lords!!!”
Holy Peak Lord’s expression changed drastically, looking utterly incredulous.
When had the time-space territory ever had so many legendary lords? And they were all unfamiliar faces, definitely not from the time-space territory.
Moreover, Holy Peak Lord also spotted a familiar face among these legendary lords—Dark Mist Lord.
This almost made it possible to guess that these legendary lords were brought here by Dark Mist Lord, and might have come from a place like Yuan Sea, such as Wuliang Sea.
After all, there were several relics in the time-space territory that came from Wuliang Sea, so these people were very likely from Wuliang Sea.
“You are the five legendary lords of the Yuan Sea time-space territory lord alliance, right? From today onward, your time-space territory lord alliance will serve me. I come from the Qin family of Wuliang Sea. My name is Qin Yu, also known as True Yu Lord, but I prefer people to call me Young Master Qin Yu.”
Qin Yu said.
“Serve you?”
The five great legendary lords immediately showed a trace of anger on their faces, but because of Qin Yu and the others’ strength, they did not act rashly.
At this time, Ice Seal Lord secretly informed Ye Tian.
The time-space territory side was not without the power to fight back, after all these legendary lords who came from Wuliang Sea had not brought all of their true bodies and clones; they had certainly only brought one body each.
And on the time-space territory side, with the five great lords plus Ye Tian’s copy body, they were not inferior to Qin Yu’s side in terms of numbers.
As long as Ye Tian could defeat Qin Yu, then they would have the right to speak.
In short, serving Qin Yu was impossible.
As legendary realm lords, Ice Seal Lord and the others did not want to serve anyone else.
-
Blood Bone Territory.
Ice Seal Lord’s clone descended here, and Ye Tian sensed it immediately.
“Ice Seal Lord, you seem a little flustered. Did something happen?” Ye Tian asked.
Ice Seal Lord hurriedly said, “Something huge has happened. A group of legendary lords has come from Wuliang Sea, and Dark Mist Lord is among them. We suspect that Dark Mist Lord found Wuliang Sea. We searched for endless ages and never found Wuliang Sea, but unexpectedly Dark Mist Lord did. Now these legendary lords from Wuliang Sea should have been brought here by Dark Mist Lord. The leader is a legendary lord named Qin Yu, titled True Yu Lord. His strength is probably very formidable, and we are no match for him.”
“Delay them for a while. I’ll be there immediately!”
Ye Tian said.
This matter was related to him, so he could not ignore it.
“This time, it seems I’ll need to unleash my true strength!”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
